programme.title: Capture Wild School
programme.desc: Very quick intro to the history of the course and the make up of the influx of new students as well as a look at some of the lecturers and their characters. Darting practice and drug theory: Students practice with dart guns from certain distances and learn the theory of dangerous drugs. The next step is learning to dart from a helicopter. A moving target is towed by a vehicle, and students have 1 dart to prove their accuracy. Darting practice on donkeys: 3 teams are formed and they have 3 donkeys to dart and check all vital signs. Darting 2 young antelope: 2 students are chosen to dart a young Rhone antelope and young Sable needing medical attention.

programme.title: Capture Wild School
programme.desc: A student darter is selected to dart from the helicopter and soon a suitable giraffe is located. The dart location is perfect and the giraffe begins to slow down as the rest of the team jump into action. The giraffe becomes more of a challenge as it wrestles with the rope and breaks free. The drugs eventually take full effect and the giraffe is subdued. The team carry out all the checkups, take samples and reverse the drug in good time to see it run off in good health. The vet lecturers give the debrief and conclude with all the positives and negatives.

programme.title: Capture Wild School
programme.desc: One of the students is selected and soon locate a huge bull elephant from the helicopter. The dart successfully finds it mark and the bull takes 20 minutes to lie down. The rest of the team rush in to do the necessary data entries and reverse the drug within 20 minutes. The vet lecturers give the debrief and conclude with all the positives and negatives.

programme.title: Big Five Challenge
programme.desc: Meet the 6 dynamic model contestants. Kate from Australia, Karina from UK, Jesse from USA, Angela from Canada, Mun from India and Mike from Germany. The Big 5 Challengers are staying at one of the top 10 safari lodges in Africa, Singita Pamushana Lodge in the Malilangwe conservancy in the South East of Zimbabwe. The contestants are placed into 3 teams of 2 and meet their professional guides. The presenter, Saami Sabiti, gives the contestants a quick orientation tour of the wildlife reserve and the guides explain the "do's and don'ts" of big 5 animal approaches.

programme.title: Big Five Challenge
programme.desc: Today's mission is to track and locate a bull elephant with tusks longer than 50 cm, get within 50 meters on foot and stay in that range for 10 minutes to qualify. The best elephant picture of the day will be judged by wildlife photographer, Kimi Stewart. Team terminator's approach on a huge bull elephant suddenly takes a different turn as the wind direction changes. Adrenaline begins to flow as the elephant mock charges and breaks a tree to show his strength. Team Invincibles hold their ground as an elephant draws closer to investigate their presence. A long standoff takes place as the huge beast towers over Mun (Indian contestant). The silence is broken as the elephant chooses to mock charge before crashing through the bush. Team Devil and Prada deal with their own drama as their elephant encounter gets too close for comfort. Kimi Stewart, the photographic judge chooses the best photograph of the day and the presenter, Sami Sabiti declares the leader of the day at the leader board session.

programme.title: Race of Life
programme.desc: Deserts are dry. Deserts are extreme. True deserts get less than 18 cm of rain per year. True deserts have very few plants. Semi-desert habitats have enough rainfall to support more plant and animal life. Either way, deserts are not easy places for animals to live. Desert animals have evolved to handle the desert's heat and lack of water. They have adapted their bodies and behaviors to the desert climate. Most can survive on small amounts of water and many get all of their water from their food. Some drink maybe once a week and travel considerable distances to find isolated waterholes and springs. Large animals seek shade during the hottest part of the day. Some animals dig a hollow depression into the ground and lie in the cooler soil while others are nocturnal. Many reptiles and other animals protect themselves from the extreme temperature by spending their time in burrows. The scorpion is one of the most ancient creatures on earth, in existence since life first crawled out of the sea. One look and you can see why they're born survivors. Not only are their bodies armoured against the desert heat - and other predators - but all scorpions have pincers at the front and a poisonous sting at the end of their tail. Rattlesnakes can be two meters long. They're fast, tough and with a deadly venom, making them one of the most dangerous snakes in the world. But nobody seems to have told the Roadrunner, who regard rattlesnakes as quite suitable prey.

programme.title: Race of Life
programme.desc: These are Nature's own Battletanks, and (with the exception of the Indian Elephant), all endemic to the African continent. The African Savannah is the stage for thousands of battles every day. How do elephants, these large, cumbersome creatures survive and even prosper on a diet that even the strictest vegetarian would pass on! Well for one thing, most other animals get out of their way. But lions and hyenas are not always so easily moved – they prey on young, sick and old elephants in particular. This seemingly gentle giant has been revealed to have a darker side in the last few years too. They may survive on just plant life, but that doesn't mean they don't like a fight – to the death. Elephants have been observed attacking and killing Rhinos in the last 20 years. It's a savage clash. Meanwhile, the Rhino, a tough looking customer if ever there was one, is an endangered species. When the great herds go on the search for food, predators go on the hunt for them. If ever there was an animal that seems destined to survive, it's the Rhino, which has been around for over 6 million years. But it too has an enemy: mankind – the deadliest foe of all. Then there's the hippopotamus. An adult hippo is a huge, aggressive animal, and even the largest crocodiles tend to stay away from it. However, when baby hippos stray from their mothers, then crocodiles, lions and hyenas will have a go if they can get away without being attacked themselves by adults in the baby hippo's herd. That's why baby hippos must stay close to Mum

programme.title: Race of Life
programme.desc: Males and females of most species will fight viciously in self-defense. And females, can be even more aggressive than males when defending their young. In this episode we'll explore the Race of Life from the point of view of food, territory, social status, and mates. Though some fights occur between two different species, most battles are fought between members of the same species. Though the wildlife warriors in these battles usually are not trying to kill each other, the fighting can result in death. Why would members of the same species fight with such ferocity? Food is one reason. Animals that store and horde food for survival will aggressively protect their pantries. Animals are also willing to fight to protect their food indirectly. For example, predators will defend a territory that provides them with enough prey, or food, to survive. This territorial aggression serves to space out members of a species across their range in a way that maintains sufficient food within each territory. But it also may limit population size. For example, if a pack of wolves cannot find, defend, or take over a suitable territory, the members may starve to death. Though food, territory, social status, and mates may be won and kept by fighting, aggression takes its toll. Animal combatants face exhaustion, injuries, time away from resting and eating, and the ultimate cost of battle: death. Thus, just like human beings, it's often in an animal's interest to win a war before it ever begins - or to avoid confrontation altogether.

programme.title: Nature's Force
programme.desc: Heatwaves have caused cities to literally meltdown and systems to fail, how are we working with nature's heat? When two Cyclones collide, we get the Fujiwhara Effect, how is this possible and how does it manifest? Floods occur around the world and the world is learning how to cope, combat and prevent damage and share lessons. How do you classify a Blizzard, and let's look at some of the worst blizzards that have occurred on earth. Do you really know how to measure Rainfall and how to identify violent rain from a shower or appreciate when we have had enough or too much?

programme.title: Nature's Force
programme.desc: A snapshot of Seasons, how they work together and keep the globe in balance. Droughts are explored in terms of how we can predict them, proof our lives from them and collect data because of them. Hurricanes are explained, their power revealed and the measures that are used to help us survive their impact. Thunderstorms have a few stages of development that roll out in a particular order.

programme.title: Animal Embassy
programme.desc: The dilemma faced by every 21st Century wildlife park is how to attract and educate the public, while maintaining first class conditions for its inhabitants and leading the way in scientific research and environmental protection. Tucked away in the Canary Islands, one zoo is providing a masterclass in the art. For the past 2 years running, Loro Parque has been voted "The World's Best Zoo" by subscribers of Trip Advisor, echoing the highest possible accreditations of animal welfare, conservation and environmental bodies across the globe. It is now considered more popular than the prestigious San Diego, Singapore, ZooParc de Beauval, Prague, Chester and St.Louis Zoos. So how has a privately-owned zoo in a Spanish colony off the West coast of Africa earned such recognition? How does it balance the meticulous care and presentation of thousands of species, with the multi-million-dollar research and conservation programs dedicated to saving many of them from extinction? What's the strategy behind its educational commitment to turning every pleasure-seeking tourist into a die-hard environmentalist? And who manages the harvest of tonnes of organic fruit needed to feed the animals daily? What began 45 years ago with one man's passion for animals and an obsession with excellence has become a monument to best practice ideals. Boasting leading experts in all branches of zoology, animal handling, nutrition and veterinary science, as well as state of the art facilities and cutting-edge technology, Loro Parque talks the talk and walks the walk. Animal Embassy peels back the layers of Loro Parque to expose its pumping heart: the intimate connections, the scale of operations, the dramas, the discoveries, the camaraderie, the hilarity, the uncompromising attention to detail and the unshakable devotion to animal welfare. Entertaining, inspiring and informative, this series is packed with engaging, returnable characters - both animal and human. programme.title: Animal Embassy
programme.desc: Federica the turtle has arrived from Italy after a run in with a container ship. Loro Parque's offered to be her 'forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? You've heard of a fish out of water - try a turtle! Esmeralda the iguana has a lumpy belly and Jorge the vet is worried. He's hoping it's a bounty of eggs but knows he shouldn't count his iguanas before they hatch. Its fingers crossed for some scaly babies!

programme.title: Travel Quest
programme.desc: Bill Ball breaks the rules and stereo types of travel shows as he ventures beyond the highlights. What do you do after you've lead groups to over 140 countries and all 7 continents? Welcome to Bill's bucket list on steroids... Travel Quest. This new, fast-paced series chases Bill around the globe as he seeks out anything but the mundane and ordinary—coming face-to-face with the largest crocodiles in the world, snorkeling with thousands of jellyfish, walking on the rim of an exploding volcano, feeding a group of sharks without a cage, bicycling across the Serengeti... this is not your typical travel show!

programme.title: Travel Quest
programme.desc: Bill Ball breaks the rules and stereo types of travel shows as he ventures beyond the highlights. What do you do after you've lead groups to over 140 countries and all 7 continents? Welcome to Bill's bucket list on steroids... Travel Quest. This new, fast-paced series chases Bill around the globe as he seeks out anything but the mundane and ordinary—coming face-to-face with the largest crocodiles in the world, snorkeling with thousands of jellyfish, walking on the rim of an exploding volcano, feeding a group of sharks without a cage, bicycling across the Serengeti... this is not your typical travel show!

programme.title: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: A resident baboon on one of the ranches requires some human help to extract a snare. The splinters pack run into a coalition of cheetahs. Jess visits the new-born Splinters pups. Pungwe are on the hunt for big game as they take on formidable buffalo. The Splinters once again demonstrate their extraordinary hunting tactics.

programme.title: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: As a new year starts in the heart of Africa, the rainy season has come to the Okavango Delta in Botswana, and with it begins a season of plenty and the luxury of permanent and abundant water sources. In South Africa's Hluhluwe-Imfolozi Game Reserve, a group of rare samango monkeys take advantage of the abundant fruit born by a large Natal fig tree. In Thailand, a group of rhesus macaques have discovered a mango tree, and are busy feeding and stuffing their throat pouches with the fruit. Back in the Okavango Delta, the rains have also brought large buffalo herds back to the Xakanaxa area, the territory of a powerful pride of lions. Life and death are also a close-run thing for young gannet fledglings on their massive breeding colony of 50.000 birds on Malgas Island off the South African coast. As the young birds attempt to spread their wings and take to the air, some end up in the water. Many young animals have to run a gauntlet early on in life, and as a young loggerhead turtle hatches out of its egg and emerges from the sand on a beach in Mozambique, it faces a gruelling journey from its nest on the beach down to the sea. African penguins, too, are adapted to life at sea, but rest, breed and mate on land. Penguins elsewhere in the world face an almost unbelievable challenge to breed and rear their young. When it comes to raising animals, the African plains are no more forgiving than the sub-Antarctic. At this time of year, the Serengeti plains in Tanzania are teeming with herds of wildebeest and zebra with their young. Predators are never far away. In a Thai forest, stingless bees are busy building a cone-shaped nest in a tree, combining forces for the greater good of the colony. Kamfers Dam in South Africa is one of only four breeding colonies of Lesser Flamingos, at times reaching up to 50.000 birds. The sun sets over the spectacular sight of thousands of flamingos, straining the water for food and taking to the air.

programme.title: Street Football In My Country
programme.desc: Street Football is a worldwide phenomenon that can be played by anyone, no matter their age, their gender or where they come from. It can be played anywhere, no need for a stadium, white lines, green grasses or even shoes ! In each episode of these series we take you to an emerging country where Football has become a way of helping children and bringing hope by life changing their habits. Discover the attaching portraits of these children that might one day become some of the greatest players in the world just like before them C. Ronaldo, Messi, Neymar and so many others.

programme.title: Past Hunters
programme.desc: Blackpool Pleasure Beach is one of the most visited attractions in the United Kingdom. People visit it not only for the fun, but to also hopefully catch a glimpse of the many ghosts that haunt there.

programme.title: Music Voyager
programme.desc: Music Voyager is a music and travel broadcast series (television/cable, broadband, in-flight and mobile) that invites viewers to discover the exciting sounds of the planet. The host is Jacob Edgar, an explorer who does not search for lost cities or ancient ruins. He's on the quest for a different kind of treasure…music. As an ethnomusicologist and world music record producer, Edgar travels the globe hunting for the best songs the world has to offer, and he suffers through some of the worst…so you don't have to. Along the way, he's rewarded with a backstage pass to concert halls, street festivals, recording studios and rehearsal rooms. With local musicians as his guide, Edgar tastes exotic and occasionally ghastly food, visits off-the-beaten path attractions and parties the night away to amazing concerts at hidden venues that only the locals know. Join music voyager for unexpected adventures and surprising discoveries that unveil the magic, mystery and music of far off lands.

programme.title: Music Voyager

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Bonjour! We're headed to Quebec Province on today's show. First, we get blown away by the thunderous pipes at Montreal's Notre Dame Basilica. After that, we go underneath the city at the Pointe a Calliere archaeology museum. Next, we'll learn about the native ecosystem at the gigantic, indoor, BioDome. Lastly, we'll learn about the 1967 Montreal Expo at the structures that are still visited today.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Un-Belizable! We're off on a Central American Mayan excursion. We head up the steps of the ancient high temple at Lamanai. Then we take a city tour of the main tourist destination, Belize City. We learn about Belize's colonial roots at the Belize City History Museum and dive the amazing Blue Hole.

programme.title: Show Me Where You Live
programme.desc: Show me where you live is a documentary series that aims to answer the following question: How can human beings claim ownership to a space so that they can live safely within it, function as a society, and above all be in harmony with the environment around them? As we discover cultures and emblematic populations, we follow Philippe Simay who is at the heart of Inhabiting the World and represents its identity and originality. Philippe takes us on an epic adventure around the Human Habitat and sets the tone for the journey. As a humanist and philosopher, Philippe is a tireless surveyor of the city, and an explorer of living spaces. Determined to travel around the world, Philippe unveils how the populations that he encounters claim the space they occupy, shapes it and adjust to it. In this series of 20 films, of 26 minutes each, the habitat will be a major showcase revealing our capacity to adapt ourselves at a time where we need to find solutions in order to address immense changes.

programme.title: Rip Files
programme.desc: Long-hidden secrets are revealed through the R.I.P. team's talents and unique experiences, including those thought to be lost forever.

programme.title: Rip Files
programme.desc: The R.I.P. Files features a group of paranormal investigators, who use intuitive abilities and a deep knowledge of metaphysical techniques to interact with the entities they encounter at haunted locations. They encourage the spirits to share their stories in their own words through amazing EVPs and other evidence that is bridging the gap between the worlds of science and spirituality.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: Criminal Minds shows everyday life of an elite team of special agents who work in the FBI's Behavioral Analysis Unit. They are trained to analyse line of thinking of criminals and foretell their next step and so prevent evil from happening. These specialists come to the rescue when all forces of police are engaged but the criminal is not detected. The agents use their unbelievable psychological methods, make themselves think like a criminal, analyse their characters and personalities.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A cop show with a difference as divorced Detective Charlie Hudson is teamed up with his new partner Rex, a highly trained law enforcement German Shepherd who was scheduled to be put to sleep after his former partner died. This action packed police procedural drama is set in the fictional St. John's Police Department and focuses on the partnership of man and dog and how they solve puzzling crimes using Charlie's skilled detective work and Rex's exceptional canine senses of smell and hearing. The pair are aided in their endeavours by Superintendent Donovan, Forensics Chief Truong, and IT Specialist Mills. Most of the episodes centre around different murders, each with their own unique twist.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The series follows the patrol officers and the Intelligence Unit of the 21st District of the Chicago Police Department as they pursue the pursue criminals. Every day they have to fight for safety in their beloved city and risk their lives. Detective Sergeant Henry Voight is the enigmatic and tough chief of the Chicago P.D.'s Intelligence Unit. He is very loyal to the cops and detectives serving under him and has no limits on how far he will go to get criminals off the streets.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Jackie is back, but Zoey has mixed feelings about her return. Jackie bonds with an emotionally unstable, but charming, patient Vigilante Jones who claims to be a superhero. Dr. Prince inadvertently puts a patients life at risk, forcing Jackie to perform an important procedure on her own. Alarmed by his behavior, Jackie goes to Akalitus. Meanwhile, Zoey is shocked by Carries secret. Eddies in hot water at his job which could jeopardize Jackies position at All Saints.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: Max puts CSI on lockdown when evidence in a new murder tips Grissom and Sara to a new suspect in the crime lab. Also, Folsom and Allie investigate a series of chilling killings at a dilapidated clown-themed hotel.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: The team follows the clues provided by an abandoned horse that was found covered in blood before they arrive at a halfway home for convicted murderers; Sarah and Grissom narrow in on their prime suspect regarding David Hodges' case.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: When the team is called to investigate human remains found in a convention center owner's bathtub, Sara and Grissom use the case to get close to attorney Anson Wix's star forensic expert witness, just days before David Hodges' trial begins.

programme.title: Monk
programme.desc: American comedy-drama detective mystery television series. Adrian Monk used to be a brilliant detective until his wife's death. Adrian believes her death is connected to her journalistic investigation but he can't find the killer. Loss of his beloved wife causes serious mental issues, numerous phobias and obsessive compulsive disorder. Thanks to his assistant, Sharona Fleming Adrian manages to break through and becomes a private detective and a consultant for the homicide unit.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Special Agent Leroy Jethro Gibbs is the leader of a team of special agents belonging to the NCIS (Naval Criminal Investigative Service) Major Case Response Team. Gibbs, a former Marine, is a tough investigator and a highly skilled interrogator who relies on his gut instinct as much as evidence. Gibbs' second in command is Senior Field Agent Tony DiNozzo, a womanizing, movie-quoting former Baltimore Homicide Detective, who despite being the class clown always gets the job done. The team also consists of probationary field agent Ziva David, a former Mossad officer who is a skilled fighter, as well as Junior Field Agent Timothy McGee, a computer-savvy agent often mocked by DiNozzo. Assisting them are Abby Sciuto, the energetic-but-Goth lab tech who is like a daughter to Gibbs, and Dr. Donald Mallard, nicknamed Ducky, the eccentric medical examiner full of unusual stories.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Contemporary reboot of the classic US crime series from 1868, focusing on a specialized police task force – Five-0 – led by former Navy SEAL Lt. Commander Steve McGarrett. Together with his chosen team of former New Jersey detective Danny Williams, a veteran Honolulu detective Chin Ho Kelly and his cousin, a rookie cop Kono Kalakaua, they pursue all manner of criminals in order to keep Hawaii safe.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A middle aged, almost retired female detective works for the fictional Northumberland & City Police. Vera Stanhope is an eccentric and unique character. She is solitary, temperamental and even rude, but also brilliant when on the job. Her sharp mind makes her one of the best fictional detectives of British television. Supported by the colleagues she befriends, detectives Joe Ashworth and Aiden Healy, nothing can stop her from solving a case. Overly devoted to her work, Vera is trying to escape her inner demons.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates the murder of a trainee forensic psychologist, whose body has been dumped in a Northumberland landfill site, surroundings that make evidence of how she died impossible to verify. Vera discovers that the dead woman had been working for the prison service re-investigating a crime that a former prisoner had been convicted of, and realises she must finish what the victim started in order to discover who may have wanted her dead. Paul Kaye plays a new pathologist alongside fellow guest star Peter Davison.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: It's 1958 in Grantchester, and the vicarage family and the Keatings are on a much-needed summer break at Merries Holiday Camp - only for it to turn into something of a busman's holiday for Will and Geordie, when the camp's owner Roy Reeves is found dead in suspicious circumstances. Between unhappily married guests, frustrated entertainment staff and Roy's put-upon wife, Will and Geordie discover almost everyone had a grudge against Roy.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: When a baptism service is disrupted by a man claiming he's the rightful father of the child, and not the smiling parents around the font, Will and Geordie find themselves drawn into a complicated family dispute which seems to be connected to the murder of Joan Beaumont, the head of a local adoption agency. With both sets of parents having reasons to want Joan silenced, are any of them responsible for her death?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An American procedural drama and the second installment in the successful CSI franchise. The show centeres around detectives and scientists in the Miami-Dade Police Department, led by Lieutenant Horatio Caine, a bomb-disposal expert. He is aided by Detective Calleigh Duquesne, a ballistic specialist, and together they lead a team of investigators, indlucing Megan Donner, Erik Delko, Natalia Boa Vista, Ryan Wolfe, and others.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates the discovery of an unidentified teenage boy's body in a coastal town's shipyard, who is revealed to be listed as a missing person, having absconded from the care of his support worker. Vera discovers that the quiet community where he was found is plagued by a serious drugs problem - despite the fact that the only known dealer in the area has turned his back on crime. The victim could be the answer to the mystery, but a wall of silence surrounds his death. Mark Addy guest stars

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Drama series set in the 1950s and adapted from the novels by James Runcie. Sidney and Geordie investigate a series of post office robberies that appear to be the work of Cambridgeshire's very own Bonnie and Clyde. Meanwhile, Sidney finds Amanda and baby Grace in the vicarage after a morning run; they exchange pleasantries but keep their distance. Later, when Leonard and his sweetheart Hilary witness an armed robbery at the post office, Leonard identifies the man involved as a known criminal.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Grantchester is a British detective drama, set in the 1950s Cambridgeshire village of the same name. It features first Anglican vicar Sidney Chambers and his successor Reverend Will Davenport, who join their forces with the overworked Detective Inspector Geordie Keating in order investigate a series of mysterious terrifying crimes in their once-peaceful village. Sidney is in love with Amanda Kendall, but she is planning to marry someone else.

The agents use their unbelievable psychological methods, make themselves think like a criminal, analyse their characters and personalities.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: Criminal Minds shows everyday life of an elite team of special agents who work in the FBI's Behavioral Analysis Unit. They are trained to analyse line of thinking of criminals and foretell their next step and so prevent evil from happening. These specialists come to the rescue when all forces of police are engaged but the criminal is not detected. The agents use their unbelievable psychological methods, make themselves think like a criminal, analyse their characters and personalities.

programme.title: Monk
programme.desc: American comedy-drama detective mystery television series. Adrian Monk used to be a brilliant detective until his wife's death. Adrian believes her death is connected to her journalistic investigation but he can't find the killer. Loss of his beloved wife causes serious mental issues, numerous phobias and obsessive compulsive disorder. Thanks to his assistant, Sharona Fleming Adrian manages to break through and becomes a private detective and a consultant for the homicide unit.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Special Agent Leroy Jethro Gibbs is the leader of a team of special agents belonging to the NCIS (Naval Criminal Investigative Service) Major Case Response Team. Gibbs, a former Marine, is a tough investigator and a highly skilled interrogator who relies on his gut instinct as much as evidence. Gibbs' second in command is Senior Field Agent Tony DiNozzo, a womanizing, movie-quoting former Baltimore Homicide Detective, who despite being the class clown always gets the job done. The team also consists of probationary field agent Ziva David, a former Mossad officer who is a skilled fighter, as well as Junior Field Agent Timothy McGee, a computer-savvy agent often mocked by DiNozzo. Assisting them are Abby Sciuto, the energetic-but-Goth lab tech who is like a daughter to Gibbs, and Dr. Donald Mallard, nicknamed Ducky, the eccentric medical examiner full of unusual stories.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The series follows the patrol officers and the Intelligence Unit of the 21st District of the Chicago Police Department as they pursue the pursue criminals. Every day they have to fight for safety in their beloved city and risk their lives. Detective Sergeant Henry Voight is the enigmatic and tough chief of the Chicago P.D.'s Intelligence Unit. He is very loyal to the cops and detectives serving under him and has no limits on how far he will go to get criminals off the streets.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Contemporary reboot of the classic US crime series from 1868, focusing on a specialized police task force – Five-0 – led by former Navy SEAL Lt. Commander Steve McGarrett. Together with his chosen team of former New Jersey detective Danny Williams, a veteran Honolulu detective Chin Ho Kelly and his cousin, a rookie cop Kono Kalakaua, they pursue all manner of criminals in order to keep Hawaii safe.

programme.title: Unustamatud jõulumaitsed
programme.desc: Õde-venda Colluccia püüavad taasluua oma lahkunud vanaema legendaarset pastakastet, et ergutada dementsusega vaevleva vanaisa mälu.

programme.title: Eksid rannal - kehad vormi
programme.desc: Jourdan tahab kaalust alla võtta, et leida üles oma Beyoncé kumerused ja Liam tahab kaalus juurde võtta, et näitlejana läbi lüüa. Kas nad jõuavad oma kehad ümber modelleerida, enne kui peavad kõik paljastama?

programme.title: Ja nii ongi?
programme.desc: See on saade, mis kutsub koos Eesti tippteadlastega avastama, kuidas asjad meie igapäevaelus tegelikult toimivad. Pakume põnevaid ja lihtsaid lahendusi, tuues teaduse meile lähemale. Saatejuht on Eeva Esse-Sõõrumaa.

programme.title: Mitme näoga Eesti
programme.desc: Kelle näoga on Eesti? Eesti on näiteks Jüri, Pireti ja Roberti nägu. Aga Eesti on ka Balli, Felipe, Migle, Reza, Steffeni ja Stephanie nägu. Vaata, millised ägedad inimesed rikastavad Eestit oma kultuuri ja kommetega telesaatest "Mitme näoga Eesti". Saatejuhid on Jüri Butšakov, Piret Laos ja Robert Rool. Esimeses saates kutsub Gruusia mees ühe leedulanna ja saatejuhi Jüri Butšakovi tõelisele Gruusia peole. Mis on Gruusias ja Leedus teisiti kui Eestis ning kuidas nemad on meie kultuuri omaks võtnud, selgub juba saatest!

programme.title: Jälg
programme.desc: Nii vastutustundlikud ehitajad kui ka riik on astumas samme selle poole, et ehitussektori keskkonna jalajälg hakkaks juba lähitulevikus vähenema. Võimalusi on täna veel napilt, kuid siiski leiab isegi tulevase kiire rongitee Ülemiste terminalist nutikaid lahendusi, kuidas efektiivselt suur-rajatisi luua. Lisaks uurime, kuidas mõjutab inimese tarbimisharjumust kasutatud nutiseadmete valik kestlikke lahenduste abil disainitud telekomettevõtte esinduspoes.

programme.title: Kodustiil
programme.desc: Saates pakume inspiratsiooni, ideid ja praktilisi lahendusi, kuidas muuta oma kodu stiilsemaks, hubasemaks, nutikamaks, turvalisemaks, energiatõhusamaks ning üldse paigaks, kus on hea olla igal ajal ja iga ilmaga! Väärt ideid ja näpunäiteid jagub nii suvilasse, korterisse kui ka suurde majja ning aeda. Loome koos kodud hubaseks ja stiilseks!

programme.title: Hooaeg
programme.desc: Saade annab vastused mitmetele küsimustele: Millised on uued kaubamärgid Eesti turul naha- ja kehahoolduses, dekoratiivkosmeetikas ning juuksemaailmas? Milliseid tooteid kasutada kodus ning miks tasub minna ennast turgutama ilusalongi? Millised on uued rõiva- ja jalatsikollektsioonid kiirelt arenevas moemaailmas? Millist rõivastust endale valida? Millised on ehtemaailma uudised? Elustiili osas avardavad silmaringi lastega seotud teemad, lemmikloomad, autod, toitlustuskohad, erinevad puhkuse veetmise võimalused nagu spaad ja treeningklubid, muuseumid ja uued raamatud.

programme.title: Nadia koduköök
programme.desc: Nadia Lim jagab lihtsaid ja maitsvaid Itaalia retsepte, mis tõstavad teie meeleolu piirangute perioodil! Ta näitab, kuidas valmistada koduseid gnocchisid tomatikastmega ja serveerib magustoiduks panna cottat marjadega.

programme.title: Nadia koduköök
programme.desc: Nadial on mõned suurepärased ideed, mis aitavad teie laste toimetamised köögis huvitavaks muuta. Ta jagab kolme lihtsat retsepti, mis meeldivad kogu perele - juustu-tšatni rullid, banaani-šokolaadimuffinid ning kreemjas tuunikalapasta vorm!

programme.title: Vallaline kaunitar
programme.desc: Kaunitar Elly viib ühe kosilastest julgele privaatkohtingule, mille käigus tuleb neil ka mägedes kuristiku kohal rippuda; õde Becky veedab aga koos karismaatilise poissmehega kvaliteetaega mõisas.

programme.title: Vallaline kaunitar
programme.desc: Õhus on tunda särinat, kui Becky ja noormees räägivad avameelselt elust, armastusest ja tulevikulootustest. Poissmehed pole rahul ühega endi seast ja kokteilipeol saab kõik avalikuks.

programme.title: Pühadekoristus
programme.desc: Uhke kinnisvara omanik palkab antiigikaupmehe müüma majas olevaid esemeid ja seda jõuluks kaunistama. Majas töötab ka tema eks, kes juhib koristusfirmat, kus töötavad ainult veteranid. Avastades majas leiduvaid aardeid, leiavad nad viisi, kuidas äratada erakuna elavas majaomanikus side jõuludega.

programme.title: Veel üks jõulujuhus
programme.desc: Alice ja Jack, kaks väga erineva eluga võõrast inimest, tutvuvad juhuslikult pulmapidustustel. Neil tekib hea klapp, aga Alice'il on pärast äsja lõppenud armulugu tõrge uute suhete vastu. Kuid pikk rida juhuseid toob Alice'i ja Jacki teineteisele aina lähemale ja nad armuvad. Kuid üha keerulisemaks muutuva elu tõttu peavad Alice ja Jack leidma viisi, kuidas tulla toime takistustega, mida elu nende suhte teele seab.

programme.title: Eksid rannal - kehad vormi
programme.desc: Deano tahab meeleheitlikult lahti saada oma liiga lopsakast ülakehast ning Paris tahab oma kumerusi taltsutada ning enesekindlust tagasi saada. Kuid kas nad saavad sellega enne paljastusi hakkama?

programme.title: Minu köök on parim: Uus-Meremaa
programme.desc: Käes on sõprade Jaxi ja Manzi kord võõrustada kõiki oma kodurestoranis ja näidata oma võtteid klassikalises rahvusköögis. Kuid kas enesekindlus saab nende hukatuseks?

programme.title: Blogija jõuluüllatus
programme.desc: Caroline Williams on tuntud sotsiaalmeedia reisiblogija, kes saab ülesandeks külastada pika ajalooga jõuluparaadi New Mexicos Carte de Amori linnas. Caroline on pehmelt öeldes pettunud ülesandes, kuid läheb siiski ja tutvub ootamatult muusikaõpetaja Oscar Orizi, kes õpetab teda täiesti uutmoodi jõule nägema. Nende kaheteistkümne päevaga muutub kogu Caroline'i maailm.

programme.title: Alasti ahvatlus
programme.desc: Itaalia versioon omanäolisest kohtingusaatest, kus valik tehakse aeglaselt paljastuvate alasti kehade põhjal.

programme.title: Alasti ahvatlus
programme.desc: Itaalia versioon omanäolisest kohtingusaatest, kus valik tehakse aeglaselt paljastuvate alasti kehade põhjal.

programme.title: Armastuse saar: Inglismaa
programme.desc: Kuues nädal "Armastuse saarel" jätkub, nagu ka flirtimine, tülitsemine ja lustimine päikese käes. Kuna mängus on suur auhind, siis igaüks neist teeb kõik, et jõuda kolme nädala kaugusel terendavale lõpusirgele. Kas kedagi saab enam üldse usaldada?

programme.title: Blogija jõuluüllatus
programme.desc: Caroline Williams on tuntud sotsiaalmeedia reisiblogija, kes saab ülesandeks külastada pika ajalooga jõuluparaadi New Mexicos Carte de Amori linnas. Caroline on pehmelt öeldes pettunud ülesandes, kuid läheb siiski ja tutvub ootamatult muusikaõpetaja Oscar Orizi, kes õpetab teda täiesti uutmoodi jõule nägema. Nende kaheteistkümne päevaga muutub kogu Caroline'i maailm.

programme.title: Polaarpoiss
programme.desc: Eesti menufilm. Abiturient Mattias plaanib välismaale fotograafiat õppima minna, kuid tormiline armumine hulljulgesse Hannasse lööb kõik plaanid segamini. Bipolaarse häirega Hanna tõmbab Mattiase ohtlikku sündmustekeerisesse - püüdes tüdrukut päästa, sooritab poiss kuriteo, mis ähvardab ta aastateks trellide taha viia. Karistusest pääsemiseks on ainult üks viis - teeselda ainsat psüühikahäiret, mida ta tunneb. Bipolaarsust...

programme.title: Postimees.ee
programme.desc: No description available

programme.title: Lotovõitja unistuste kodu
programme.desc: Nelly ja Pablo jõudsid abielus olla vaid loetud kuud, kui nad lotoga miljoni võitsid. Nüüd aitab David Bromstad neil koos sugulasest abilisega leida unistuste kodu Utah' mägedesse.

programme.title: Pilvede all
programme.desc: Pireti kannatus katkeb ja ta kolib kodust välja. Mari ei mõista Pireti käitumist, kuid kasutab olukorda enda huvides ära. Riina püüab Indrekuga leppida. Inna muretseb Alberti tervise pärast. Sirje üritab Gunnarit veenda uut, kuid sünget äri alustama.

programme.title: Robson Greeni suured slämmid
programme.desc: Robsoni seiklused on viinud ta Kuubale Inshore'i suure slämmi turniirile, kus ta peab ühe päeva jooksul saama kätte kolm ette nähtud kalaliiki. Tugev tuul ja vihm ähvardavad ta võistlust saboteerida, kuid Robson ei anna kergelt alla.

programme.title: Rooli võim
programme.desc: Eesti staažikaim liiklussaade, mille teemade ring ulatub automarkidest kindlustuseni. Saade paneb proovile ka tuntud inimeste sõiduoskused ning nad paljastavad, mis neid siinses liikluses häirib ning mida tuleks liikluses ümber korraldada. Muu hulgas osalevad saate tegijad ka liiklusreididel. Rooli Võim ei ole mõeldud üksnes tänastele autoomanikele ja juhtidele, vaid kõigile, kel tuleb rohkemal või vähemal määral liiklusega kokku puutuda, ehk siis ka jalakäijatele ja ühistranspordiga liiklejatele.

programme.title: Krimi
programme.desc: Eesti staažikaim politseisaade toob vaatajateni olulisemad krimiuudised. Uudiseid elu pahupoolelt vahendab saatejuht Taavi Otsus.

programme.title: Reporter+
programme.desc: Uudistemagasinide lipulaev, mis toob olulisemad ja põnevamad uudised kodumaalt ja mujalt maailmast vaatajateni Reporterile omasel mahlakal moel. Saatejuhid on alati soliidsed Jaanus Koort, Simon Suviste ja Tõnis Sarap.

programme.title: Kuldvillak
programme.desc: "Kuldvillak" on kaasakiskuv telemäng. Igas saates asuvad võistlustulle kolm inimest. Nad peavad valima endale sobiva teema. Kui saatejuht Eeva Esse on küsimuse esitanud, loeb võrdselt nii mängija reaktsioonikiirus kui ka teadmiste hulk. Kes kõige kiiremini reageerib, saab õiguse vastata. Õige vastus toob mängija arvele küsimuse väärtuses raha, kui aga vastaja eksib, tuleb suu rahast puhtaks pühkida! Vale vastuse korral ütleb saatejuht õige vastuse ja see aitab kodusel televaatajal ka oma teadmisi proovile panna, kaasa mängida ja seeläbi end harida. Kui mängijal õnnestub aga võita viis saadet järjest, on ta tunnistatud Kuldvillaku tšempioniks ja ta annab võimaluse järgmistele...

programme.title: Kaks Kanget Kagu-Aasias
programme.desc: Vana-aasta viimast hommikut tervitavad kaks kanget Hua Hini rikaste ja ilusate golfiväljakul. Uusaasta pidustusteks kihutavad Teet ja Kristjan tuk-tukiga kesklinna, kus neid tabab pettumus. Pärast kuningas Rama IX surma oktoobrikuus on riigis välja kuulutatud pikk leinaperiood, mis surub avalikule pralletamisele peale vaoshoituse pitseri.

programme.title: Grand Tour
programme.desc: Grand Touri saatejuhid loobuvad oma tavalisest telgist ning reisivad läbi Namiibia, igaüks oma spetsifikatsioonide järgi Volkswageni Põrnikast ümber ehitatud rannabagis - selleks, et lükata ümber Grand Touri bossi väide, et rannabagid on kohutavad.

programme.title: Saalihoki MM
programme.desc: Eesti koondise alagrupi vastased MM finaalturniiril on Kanada, Austraalia ja Filipiinid. Avamängus kohtuti Austraalia koondisega, teine vastane sel turniiril on Kanada meeskond, kellega mängiti viimati 2022. aasta MM-il, kui saavutati kindel 13:5 võit.

programme.title: Minu pere mõrvamüsteerium
programme.desc: Vandeadvokaadid uurivad kurikuulsat Dorseti koduperenaise juhtumit, keda süüdistati oma abikaasa mõrvas. Nad soovivad eraldada fakte väljamõeldistest, kuna see lugu inspireeris Thomas Hardy romaani "D'Urberville'ide Tess".

programme.title: Minu pere mõrvamüsteerium
programme.desc: Sasha ja Jeremy uurivad oma esimest Šoti juhtumit, 1952. aastal toimunud erakliku pensionäri mõrva, mille eest anti kohtu alla kaks meest, kuid ainult üks hukati.

programme.title: Minu pere mõrvamüsteerium
programme.desc: Vandeadvokaadid Sasha Wass ja Jeremy Dein võtavad uuesti käsile jõuka naisüürniku juhtumi, kelle üürileandja mürgitas pärast rahalise tehingu sõlmimist vahetult enne tema surma 1911. aastal.

programme.title: Tere tulemast mõrvalinna
programme.desc: Mack's Creekis, Missouri osariigis mõrvatakse 42-aastane Trudy Darby. Kui kadunuks jääb veel kaks kohalikku naist, kahtlustab politsei sarimõrvari tegu. Linnas valitseb vaikus, kuni ootamatult saabunud kõne paljastab, et mõrvarid on lähemal, kui arvata võib.

programme.title: Tere tulemast mõrvalinna
programme.desc: Altoonast, Pennsylvaniast, kaob 23-aastane Sherry Leighty, jättes maha kolm väikest last. Pärast 13 aastat kestnud otsinguid avastab ta õde, et kuulujutt, mille järgi ta oma uue poiss-sõbraga linnast põgenes, ei vasta tõele ja et Sherryle lähedased inimesed on varjanud tumedat saladust.

programme.title: Grand Tour
programme.desc: Jätkub bagiretk läbi Namiibia. Kõrbest välja pääsenud, panevad konarlikud teed masinad korralikult proovile ja just siis, kui tundub et finiš terendab silme ees, ootab ees kõige raskem katsumus.

programme.title: Pidurdamatu
programme.desc: Tõestisündinud lool põhinev adrenaliinirikas märulipõnevik. Frank Barnes on töötanud raudteel juba 28 aastat. Praktikant Will Colsonil on staazhi veidi vähem, kõigest 4 kuud. Ent päeval, mil ohtlikke kemikaale vedav juhita kaubarong ähvardab hävitada terve linna, on need kaks ainsad, kel on mingisugunegi lootus ohvriterohke katastroof ära hoida.

programme.title: Meie emad ja isad
programme.desc: Saksa väesalk valmistub viimaseks rünnakuks, kuid saatusel on Friedhelmile ja Wilhelmile teised plaanid. Greta saadetakse Lääne frondile sõduritele moraalseks toeks, kus ta peab neile enne Kurski lahingut esinema. Viktor põgeneb koos neiu Alinaga rongilt, mis viib juudid natsislikku kontsentratsiooni/hävituslaagrisse Saksamaa poolt okupeeritud Poola territooriumil. Wilhelmi rühm saab käsu telegraafijaama kaaperdamiseks. Rünnak ei möödu plaanipäraselt ning Wilhelm kaotab mitu kamraadi.

programme.title: Kire hind
programme.desc: Pingeline duell tõsiuskliku kristlase ja ateisti vahel ähvardab väljuda kõigist mõistlikest piiridest.

programme.title: Reporter+
programme.desc: Uudistemagasinide lipulaev, mis toob olulisemad ja põnevamad uudised kodumaalt ja mujalt maailmast vaatajateni Reporterile omasel mahlakal moel. Saatejuhid on alati soliidsed Jaanus Koort, Simon Suviste ja Tõnis Sarap.

programme.desc: No description available

programme.title: Kriminaalselt naljakas
programme.desc: Ebaõnnestunud sissemurdmised, veidrad poevargused ja mannetud tagaajamised politsei poolt ... kuritegelik käitumine pole kunagi olnud nii lõbus.

programme.title: Jälg
programme.desc: Tänases saates võtab Marko Matvere keskkonnasõbrad kaasa Ruhnu saarele, kuhu on püsti pandud ainulaadne ja kompleksne taastuvenergia lahendus. Kui veel mõned aastad tagasi toodeti kogu Ruhnule vajalik elektrienergia diislist, siis nüüd tuleb suurem osa saare elektrist taastuvenergiast. Milline on ruhnlaste jalajälg ja kuidas käib elu väikesaarel, sellest täna räägimegi.

programme.title: Reporter+
programme.desc: Uudistemagasinide lipulaev, mis toob olulisemad ja põnevamad uudised kodumaalt ja mujalt maailmast vaatajateni Reporterile omasel mahlakal moel. Saatejuhid on alati soliidsed Jaanus Koort, Simon Suviste ja Tõnis Sarap.

programme.title: Duo Mix
programme.desc: A night full of music videos for different music tastes. Dance, sing along or just enjoy the music under the blanket.

programme.title: Murder, Mystery and My Family
programme.desc: Leading criminal barristers Jeremy Dein QC and Sasha Wass QC investigate the mysterious shooting of a landowning farmer in rural Ireland. After two trials, two men were executed for the crime. County Kerry, Ireland, 1882. On an autumnal afternoon in the small village of Dromulton, two boys making their way home from school witnessed a shocking crime. Farmer and landowner Thomas Browne was tending his fields when he was approached by two men in distinctive long black coats. After a short conversation, Browne turned to flee but was shot by the men multiple times at close range. He died instantly. Despite no murder weapon being recovered, unemployed tenant farmer Sylvester Poff and his cousin James Barrett were arrested within days and charged with Browne's murder. An eyewitness claimed she had seen the two men that day, walking near Browne's field just before his murder. Poff and Barrett stood trial twice, and despite vehemently protesting their innocence, at the second trial they were found guilty and sentenced to death. On 23 January 1883, at Tralee jail, both Sylvester Poff and James Barrett were hanged. Today, Sylvester Poff's great-grandsons Tomo and Michael are determined to prove that their great-grandfather was innocent and the case was a miscarriage of justice. They have enlisted the help of the barristers to re-examine the case. Exploring questions around the reliability of the eyewitness evidence and looking at the turbulent social and political backdrop, Sasha and Jeremy hope to present compelling arguments to Judge Radford that the two convictions were unsafe.

programme.title: Murder, Mystery and My Family
programme.desc: Top criminal barristers Sasha Wass and Jeremy Dein look back at their examination of the troubling case of Edward Devlin and Alfred Burns, who were arrested and sentenced to death for the murder of Beatrice Rimmer, found dead in her home in Liverpool in 1951. Devlin and Burns were petty criminals, known to the police for a series of robberies around their native Manchester. During the trial, the prosecution alleged that the motive for the murder was robbery, but nothing was taken from Beatrice's home. Sasha and Jeremy teamed up with Lindsay, a relative of Edward Devlin who had flown over 10,000 miles from Australia, to examine the case in more detail. Questions about the murder weapon and the evidence of key witnesses raised concerns for the barristers. When troubling evidence of corruption on the part of the lead investigating police officer came to light, they put it to Judge Radford that the conviction of Devin and Burns may have been unsafe. It has been over two years since the barristers' original investigation, and Lindsay has returned to London to investigate new leads that could yet persuade the CCRC to review the case. As Jeremy and Sasha catch up with Lindsay to hear about her progress, they discover that it has not been all plain sailing.

programme.title: Forensics: The Real CSI
programme.desc: A parent rings 999 to report that their 12-year-old daughter has been approached by a man on social media and has been raped by him several times. West Midlands Police quickly identify and arrest the suspect and bring him into custody. As the victim was too scared to tell anyone at first, there is limited physical forensic evidence. The investigation therefore has to rely heavily on digital forensics, and the police attempt to hack into the suspect's phones.

programme.title: Forensics: The Real CSI
programme.desc: West Midlands Police are called after staff working in a tip yard make a grisly discovery: a decomposing body in a freezer which has been brought in for disposal following a flat clearance. A forensics team attends the scene, and the body and freezer are both removed for forensic tests. The team must first identify the body, eventually leading the police to a surprising discovery after one of the deceased's friends admits to knowing about his death for some time.

programme.title: Forensics: The Real CSI
programme.desc: When police discover 32-year-old Marlene Doyle dead in a Coventry flat after being reported missing by her mother, police turn to forensic evidence to identify her killer. A search begins immediately for her boyfriend Patryk Skupinski, with whom she'd been staying, while Marlene's body is removed for forensic tests and forensic officers search the address for any sign of an intruder. With a combination of phone analysis, DNA evidence from clothing and the arrival of a witness, police gradually close the net on their suspect.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: True crime documentary series. In these close-knitted communities, horrific murders have occurred, shaking them to the core. Every episode tells the story of a gruesome murder that happened in a small town. Delve into the heart of the cases through interviews with investigators, family members, prosecutors and neighbours. Various twists and turns can make you question reality, and the final outcome can surprise everyone involved. How well do you know the people next door?

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: Disappeared is an American documentary TV show that contains dramatic re-enactments and interviews with law enforcement officers, investigators, and relatives connected with cases in which individuals have gone missing without a trace. The stories are heartbreaking and unbelievable, the families of people who have gone missing never give up hope. Some cases have tragic endings, some are heartwarming, but most of them are still open which makes the agony of the families go on.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: Chilling true-crime documentary series that tells the stories of some of the most dangerous siblings that commited gruesome crimes. Through exclusive interviews and firsthand accounts, the series will try to explain what drove them to partner up and commit some of the most heinous and sophisticated homicides. The audience will have a chance to hear tales of their childhoods, details of their crimes and the investigations that put them behind bars. From teen brothers with a dream to become mass murderers, a sheriff's deputy who killed his wife's lover by employing his brothers, to delusional brothers who believed it's their duty to cleanse the world of those living in sin, and many others, these are their shocking stories.

programme.title: Murder, Mystery and My Family
programme.desc: Leading criminal barristers Jeremy Dein QC and Sasha Wass QC investigate the mysterious shooting of a landowning farmer in rural Ireland. After two trials, two men were executed for the crime. County Kerry, Ireland, 1882. On an autumnal afternoon in the small village of Dromulton, two boys making their way home from school witnessed a shocking crime. Farmer and landowner Thomas Browne was tending his fields when he was approached by two men in distinctive long black coats. After a short conversation, Browne turned to flee but was shot by the men multiple times at close range. He died instantly. Despite no murder weapon being recovered, unemployed tenant farmer Sylvester Poff and his cousin James Barrett were arrested within days and charged with Browne's murder. An eyewitness claimed she had seen the two men that day, walking near Browne's field just before his murder. Poff and Barrett stood trial twice, and despite vehemently protesting their innocence, at the second trial they were found guilty and sentenced to death. On 23 January 1883, at Tralee jail, both Sylvester Poff and James Barrett were hanged. Today, Sylvester Poff's great-grandsons Tomo and Michael are determined to prove that their great-grandfather was innocent and the case was a miscarriage of justice. They have enlisted the help of the barristers to re-examine the case. Exploring questions around the reliability of the eyewitness evidence and looking at the turbulent social and political backdrop, Sasha and Jeremy hope to present compelling arguments to Judge Radford that the two convictions were unsafe.

programme.title: Duo Mix
programme.desc: A night full of music videos for different music tastes. Dance, sing along or just enjoy the music under the blanket.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: After his divorce, Alan Harper, a struggling chiropractor, moves in with his brother Charlie Harper, a womanizer and successful jingle writer as Charlie "temporarily" allows him and his son Jake, a food-obsessed, lazy kid to join him in his luxurious beach-house complicating Charlie's carefree life. Compulsively neat and control-freak Alan, hedonistic free spirited bachelor Charlie, Jake and other peculiar characters - Evelyn, their vain mother, Charlie's outspoken cleaning lady Berta and his rich, self-confessed stalker neighbor Rose soon get themselves into an abundance of crazy and hilarious situations.

programme.title: Married ... with Children
programme.desc: American comedy series. Al Bundy (Ed O'Neill) was once a promising young high school American football player. Now he is a middle-aged and cynical shoe salesman living in the suburbs of Chicago. After a long day working in his unfulfilling job, he goes home to a family who irritate and disrespect him. His wife Peggy (Katey Sagal) is a lazy woman who spends the families money on herself and openly mocks and taunts Al. Their two children are Kelly and Bud. Kelly, the eldest daughter is not a bright kid. She dates a string of guys much to the annoyance of her father. Her younger brother Bud is a smart boy, but he's not what he would like to be - a hit with the ladies. Starring Christina Applegate as Kelly and David Faustino as Bud.

programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: American sitcom about Christy, a single mother-of-two in recovery. Even after years of being sober, she is struggling with her addictions. She tries to stay positive but she is pushed to her limits when her mother, also a recovering alcoholic, returns back into her life. Together, this troubled daughter/mother duo try to rebuild their relationship and support each other to stay clean. The quarrels with her boss, teenage daughter and ex-husband do not make Christy's life any easier either. This comedy series deals not only with issues of addiction but a number of important topics in society including teen pregnancy, homelessness, domestic violence and death. Starring Anna Faris and Allison Janney as Christy and Bonnie Plunkett.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran Fine, a fashionista and make-up saleswoman, shows up on the doorstep of the Sheffield family and becomes the nanny to Maggie, Brighton, and Grace, the children of British Broadway producer Maxwell Sheffield. The householf is managed by the acerbic butler Niles, who supports Fran, and often visited by Maxwell's business partner C.C. Babcock, who is determined to undermine her, as she sees Maxwell's attraction to Fran but is interested in him herself.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: For young Sheldon Cooper, it isn't easy growing up in East Texas. Being a once-in-a-generation mind capable of advanced mathematics and science isn't always helpful in a land where church and football are king. And while the vulnerable, gifted and somewhat naïve Sheldon deals with the world, his very normal family must find a way to deal with him. For 12 years on The Big Bang Theory, audiences have come to know the iconic, eccentric and extraordinary Sheldon Cooper. This comedy series gives us the chance to meet him in childhood, as he embarks on his innocent, awkward and hopeful journey toward the man he will become.

programme.title: Young Sheldon

And while the vulnerable, gifted and somewhat naïve Sheldon deals with the world, his very normal family must find a way to deal with him. His father, George, is struggling to find his way as a high school football coach and as father to a boy he doesn't understand. Sheldon's mother, Mary, fiercely protects and nurtures her son in a town where he just doesn't fit in. Sheldon's older brother, Georgie, does the best he can in high school, but it's tough to be cool when you're in the same classes with your odd 11-year-old brother. Finally, there's Sheldon's twin sister, Missy, who sometimes resents all the attention Sheldon gets, but also remains the one person who can reliably tell Sheldon the truth.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: For young Sheldon Cooper, it isn't easy growing up in East Texas. Being a once-in-a-generation mind capable of advanced mathematics and science isn't always helpful in a land where church and football are king. And while the vulnerable, gifted and somewhat naïve Sheldon deals with the world, his very normal family must find a way to deal with him. For 12 years on The Big Bang Theory, audiences have come to know the iconic, eccentric and extraordinary Sheldon Cooper. This comedy series gives us the chance to meet him in childhood, as he embarks on his innocent, awkward and hopeful journey toward the man he will become.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: For 11-year-old Sheldon Cooper, it isn't easy growing up in East Texas. Sheldon's mother, Mary, fiercely protects and nurtures her son in a town where he just doesn't fit in. Sheldon's older brother, Georgie, does the best he can in high school, but it's tough to be cool when you're in the same classes with your odd 11-year-old brother. Finally, there's Sheldon's twin sister, Missy, who sometimes resents all the attention Sheldon gets, but also remains the one person who can reliably tell Sheldon the truth.

programme.title: 30 Rock
programme.desc: Jenna sends Liz to ask the Head on a date but Liz ends up with the Hair, a guy she feels out of her league. Jack has Kenneth switch jobs with him for a day. Tracy gets help writing his memoirs, pressing Frank and Toofer to meet deadline.

programme.title: 30 Rock
programme.desc: Jack asks Liz to accompany him to a societal event, the birthday party of a royal. When Jack's ex-wife arrives, he introduces Liz as a girlfriend. To help Pete reclaim his manhood, Tracy holds a party in the office, inviting girl dancers.

programme.title: 30 Rock
programme.desc: Liz makes staff work on Valentine's Day all night. She gets flowers but from whom? Jack and Bianca meet to finalize their divorce. He celebrates with Tracy who is role playing with his wife in a hotel room but Jack brings a hooker there.

programme.title: 30 Rock
programme.desc: Meet Liz Lemon, the executive show runner for a late night comedy show hosted by her close friend Jenna Maroney. Her life gets extremely complicated when the network's new president Jack Donaghy forces Liz to hire the unpredictable movie star, Tracy Jordan, as Jenna's co-star. Liz ends up in the middle of chaos, having to deal with arrogant Jack, neurotic Jenna, and crazy Tracy, while trying to run a successful TV show.

programme.title: 30 Rock
programme.desc: Kenneth is added to Tracy's entourage but doesn't realize he is used to Grizz and Dot Com giving preferential treatment. Jenna is named funniest woman but is quoted as saying she hates the troops. Jack plays hard ball in Josh negotiation.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake Peralta is Brooklyn's 99th precinct's best detective. The only mystery he hasn't solved, is how to grow up. When captain Holt is assigned as the precinct's new captain, Jake greets him with resistance, but after learning the challenges Holt has faced to get where he is today, the two begin to bond. Along with Amy Santiago, Rosa Diaz, Charles Boyle, Terry Jeffords, and the rest of the precinct, Jake solves crimes of the city, pursues criminal masterminds like the Pontiac bandit and tackles the hurdles of life in New York.

programme.title: Married ... with Children
programme.desc: American comedy series. Al Bundy (Ed O'Neill) was once a promising young high school American football player. Now he is a middle-aged and cynical shoe salesman living in the suburbs of Chicago. After a long day working in his unfulfilling job, he goes home to a family who irritate and disrespect him. His wife Peggy (Katey Sagal) is a lazy woman who spends the families money on herself and openly mocks and taunts Al. Their two children are Kelly and Bud. Kelly, the eldest daughter is not a bright kid. She dates a string of guys much to the annoyance of her father. Her younger brother Bud is a smart boy, but he's not what he would like to be - a hit with the ladies. Starring Christina Applegate as Kelly and David Faustino as Bud.

programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: American sitcom about Christy, a single mother-of-two in recovery. Even after years of being sober, she is struggling with her addictions. She tries to stay positive but she is pushed to her limits when her mother, also a recovering alcoholic, returns back into her life. Together, this troubled daughter/mother duo try to rebuild their relationship and support each other to stay clean. The quarrels with her boss, teenage daughter and ex-husband do not make Christy's life any easier either. This comedy series deals not only with issues of addiction but a number of important topics in society including teen pregnancy, homelessness, domestic violence and death. Starring Anna Faris and Allison Janney as Christy and Bonnie Plunkett.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Meet four brilliant but socially awkward scientists- Leonard Hofstadter, an experimental physicist with an IQ of 173, Sheldon Cooper, a theoretical physicist researching quantum mechanics and string theory, who are roommates, colleagues and best friends, and their friends Howard Wolowitz, an aerospace engineer and Rajesh Koothrappali, a particle astrophysicist. When they are not working, boys are hanging out together, playing video games, watching science-fiction movies or reading comic books. Their lives will change forever when a pretty woman and an aspiring actress named Penny moves into an apartment across the hall from Leonard and Sheldon showing them there is more to life outside the laboratory.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran Fine, a fashionista and make-up saleswoman, shows up on the doorstep of the Sheffield family and becomes the nanny to Maggie, Brighton, and Grace, the children of British Broadway producer Maxwell Sheffield. The householf is managed by the acerbic butler Niles, who supports Fran, and often visited by Maxwell's business partner C.C. Babcock, who is determined to undermine her, as she sees Maxwell's attraction to Fran but is interested in him herself.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: After his divorce, Alan Harper, a struggling chiropractor, moves in with his brother Charlie Harper, a womanizer and successful jingle writer as Charlie "temporarily" allows him and his son Jake, a food-obsessed, lazy kid to join him in his luxurious beach-house complicating Charlie's carefree life. Compulsively neat and control-freak Alan, hedonistic free spirited bachelor Charlie, Jake and other peculiar characters - Evelyn, their vain mother, Charlie's outspoken cleaning lady Berta and his rich, self-confessed stalker neighbor Rose soon get themselves into an abundance of crazy and hilarious situations.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Delve into the hearts and minds of six friends living in New York City as they explore the anxieties and absurdities of true adulthood. This smart, sophisticated series offers a hilarious take on dating and working in the big city. As Rachel, Monica, Phoebe, Joey, Chandler and Ross realize, the search for happiness often seems to turn up more questions than answers. But while they look within for fulfillment, they also look out for one another during this exciting time when everything seems possible – as long as they've got Friends.

Their lives will change forever when a pretty woman and an aspiring actress named Penny moves into an apartment across the hall from Leonard and Sheldon showing them there is more to life outside the laboratory.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: For young Sheldon Cooper, it isn't easy growing up in East Texas. Being a once-in-a-generation mind capable of advanced mathematics and science isn't always helpful in a land where church and football are king. And while the vulnerable, gifted and somewhat naïve Sheldon deals with the world, his very normal family must find a way to deal with him. For 12 years on The Big Bang Theory, audiences have come to know the iconic, eccentric and extraordinary Sheldon Cooper. This comedy series gives us the chance to meet him in childhood, as he embarks on his innocent, awkward and hopeful journey toward the man he will become.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: For 11-year-old Sheldon Cooper, it isn't easy growing up in East Texas. Being a once-in-a-generation mind capable of advanced mathematics and science isn't always helpful in a land where church and football are king. And while the vulnerable, gifted and somewhat naïve Sheldon deals with the world, his very normal family must find a way to deal with him. His father, George, is struggling to find his way as a high school football coach and as father to a boy he doesn't understand. Sheldon's mother, Mary, fiercely protects and nurtures her son in a town where he just doesn't fit in. Sheldon's older brother, Georgie, does the best he can in high school, but it's tough to be cool when you're in the same classes with your odd 11-year-old brother. Finally, there's Sheldon's twin sister, Missy, who sometimes resents all the attention Sheldon gets, but also remains the one person who can reliably tell Sheldon the truth.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake Peralta is Brooklyn's 99th precinct's best detective. The only mystery he hasn't solved, is how to grow up. When captain Holt is assigned as the precinct's new captain, Jake greets him with resistance, but after learning the challenges Holt has faced to get where he is today, the two begin to bond. Along with Amy Santiago, Rosa Diaz, Charles Boyle, Terry Jeffords, and the rest of the precinct, Jake solves crimes of the city, pursues criminal masterminds like the Pontiac bandit and tackles the hurdles of life in New York.

programme.title: Married ... with Children
programme.desc: American comedy series. Al Bundy (Ed O'Neill) was once a promising young high school American football player. Now he is a middle-aged and cynical shoe salesman living in the suburbs of Chicago. After a long day working in his unfulfilling job, he goes home to a family who irritate and disrespect him. His wife Peggy (Katey Sagal) is a lazy woman who spends the families money on herself and openly mocks and taunts Al. Their two children are Kelly and Bud. Kelly, the eldest daughter is not a bright kid. She dates a string of guys much to the annoyance of her father. Her younger brother Bud is a smart boy, but he's not what he would like to be - a hit with the ladies. Starring Christina Applegate as Kelly and David Faustino as Bud.

programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: American sitcom about Christy, a single mother-of-two in recovery. Even after years of being sober, she is struggling with her addictions. She tries to stay positive but she is pushed to her limits when her mother, also a recovering alcoholic, returns back into her life. Together, this troubled daughter/mother duo try to rebuild their relationship and support each other to stay clean. The quarrels with her boss, teenage daughter and ex-husband do not make Christy's life any easier either. This comedy series deals not only with issues of addiction but a number of important topics in society including teen pregnancy, homelessness, domestic violence and death. Starring Anna Faris and Allison Janney as Christy and Bonnie Plunkett.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran Fine, a fashionista and make-up saleswoman, shows up on the doorstep of the Sheffield family and becomes the nanny to Maggie, Brighton, and Grace, the children of British Broadway producer Maxwell Sheffield. The householf is managed by the acerbic butler Niles, who supports Fran, and often visited by Maxwell's business partner C.C. Babcock, who is determined to undermine her, as she sees Maxwell's attraction to Fran but is interested in him herself.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Delve into the hearts and minds of six friends living in New York City as they explore the anxieties and absurdities of true adulthood. This smart, sophisticated series offers a hilarious take on dating and working in the big city. As Rachel, Monica, Phoebe, Joey, Chandler and Ross realize, the search for happiness often seems to turn up more questions than answers. But while they look within for fulfillment, they also look out for one another during this exciting time when everything seems possible – as long as they've got Friends.

programme.desc: Meet four brilliant but socially awkward scientists- Leonard Hofstadter, an experimental physicist with an IQ of 173, Sheldon Cooper, a theoretical physicist researching quantum mechanics and string theory, who are roommates, colleagues and best friends, and their friends Howard Wolowitz, an aerospace engineer and Rajesh Koothrappali, a particle astrophysicist. When they are not working, boys are hanging out together, playing video games, watching science-fiction movies or reading comic books. Their lives will change forever when a pretty woman and an aspiring actress named Penny moves into an apartment across the hall from Leonard and Sheldon showing them there is more to life outside the laboratory.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

When they are not working, boys are hanging out together, playing video games, watching science-fiction movies or reading comic books. Their lives will change forever when a pretty woman and an aspiring actress named Penny moves into an apartment across the hall from Leonard and Sheldon showing them there is more to life outside the laboratory.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: For young Sheldon Cooper, it isn't easy growing up in East Texas. Being a once-in-a-generation mind capable of advanced mathematics and science isn't always helpful in a land where church and football are king. And while the vulnerable, gifted and somewhat naïve Sheldon deals with the world, his very normal family must find a way to deal with him. For 12 years on The Big Bang Theory, audiences have come to know the iconic, eccentric and extraordinary Sheldon Cooper. This comedy series gives us the chance to meet him in childhood, as he embarks on his innocent, awkward and hopeful journey toward the man he will become.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: For 11-year-old Sheldon Cooper, it isn't easy growing up in East Texas. Being a once-in-a-generation mind capable of advanced mathematics and science isn't always helpful in a land where church and football are king. And while the vulnerable, gifted and somewhat naïve Sheldon deals with the world, his very normal family must find a way to deal with him. His father, George, is struggling to find his way as a high school football coach and as father to a boy he doesn't understand. Sheldon's mother, Mary, fiercely protects and nurtures her son in a town where he just doesn't fit in. Sheldon's older brother, Georgie, does the best he can in high school, but it's tough to be cool when you're in the same classes with your odd 11-year-old brother. Finally, there's Sheldon's twin sister, Missy, who sometimes resents all the attention Sheldon gets, but also remains the one person who can reliably tell Sheldon the truth.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake Peralta is Brooklyn's 99th precinct's best detective. The only mystery he hasn't solved, is how to grow up. When captain Holt is assigned as the precinct's new captain, Jake greets him with resistance, but after learning the challenges Holt has faced to get where he is today, the two begin to bond. Along with Amy Santiago, Rosa Diaz, Charles Boyle, Terry Jeffords, and the rest of the precinct, Jake solves crimes of the city, pursues criminal masterminds like the Pontiac bandit and tackles the hurdles of life in New York.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Emilio, a 33-year-old gay journalist, and Marcelo; A 28-year-old Afro-Galician who declares himself bisexual, faces a complicated decision: choose the possible love of his life guided only by the physical attraction, or not, generated by their teeth. Together with them we will discover the importance that a small detail can mark when choosing who to have a date with; Of course, this time dressed. And it is that everything counts in the difficult work of looking for love.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: In this episode of Naked Attraction, our host Marta Flich will accompany Ricky, a 31-year-old PR and Steffany, a 24-year-old waitress, in their search for love. Both will be surprised, laugh, play and fantasize about the infinite possibilitiesthat are presented to them from the moment the booths open to meet, totally naked, their six suitors.

programme.title: Married ... with Children
programme.desc: American comedy series. Al Bundy (Ed O'Neill) was once a promising young high school American football player. Now he is a middle-aged and cynical shoe salesman living in the suburbs of Chicago. After a long day working in his unfulfilling job, he goes home to a family who irritate and disrespect him. His wife Peggy (Katey Sagal) is a lazy woman who spends the families money on herself and openly mocks and taunts Al. Their two children are Kelly and Bud. Kelly, the eldest daughter is not a bright kid. She dates a string of guys much to the annoyance of her father. Her younger brother Bud is a smart boy, but he's not what he would like to be - a hit with the ladies. Starring Christina Applegate as Kelly and David Faustino as Bud.
