programme.title: The Elf on the Shelf: Sweet Showdown
programme.desc: Cooking - Ep. 2. Baking show.

programme.title: Save the Leftovers
programme.desc: A Tale Of Two Fridges. Food truck owner Omayra Dakis and chef Dominque Crisp turn leftovers into tacos and ramen. Then, they make dishes for Antonia Lofaso and Jake Smollett.

programme.title: Best Baker in America
programme.desc: Cooking competition show in which professional and home bakers compete in a baking tournament. For six weeks, eight skilled bakers are challenged to use their style and technical abilities to make stunning, tasty treats and impress the judges - from macarons, fruit tarts, creme brulee to spectacular and elaborately-decorated cakes. One person gets eliminated every week by the panel of judges, until the final where the best three bakers compete for the grand prize of $25,000 and the title of ''Best Baker in America''.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: Supermarket Stakeout is an American cooking competition TV series presented by chef Alex Guarnaschelli. Every participant of the show has a budget of $500 to purchase the groceries from the customers of a nearby supermarket, and create dishes later out of it. In each round the host assigns the theme of the dish to cook. The chef whose dish is judged the least satisfactory is eliminated from the competition, and the final chef remaining gets a prize of $10,000.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

One baker will be selected to compete in the finale, where they will have a chance of winning the whopping cash prize.

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: Combining edibility and artistry, America's best bakers team up with expert ice sculptors to create phenomenal Christmas-themed cakes. Hosted by Casey Webb, who presents each episode's teams with their tricky challenges, the series pushes these bakers' talents to the limit, as each team hopes to impress the judges and move on to the finale, where a whopping $25,000 is up for grabs.

programme.title: The Elf on the Shelf: Sweet Showdown
programme.desc: Cooking - Ep. 2. Baking show.

programme.title: Save the Leftovers
programme.desc: A Tale Of Two Fridges. Food truck owner Omayra Dakis and chef Dominque Crisp turn leftovers into tacos and ramen. Then, they make dishes for Antonia Lofaso and Jake Smollett.

programme.title: Best Baker in America
programme.desc: Cooking competition show in which professional and home bakers compete in a baking tournament. For six weeks, eight skilled bakers are challenged to use their style and technical abilities to make stunning, tasty treats and impress the judges - from macarons, fruit tarts, creme brulee to spectacular and elaborately-decorated cakes. One person gets eliminated every week by the panel of judges, until the final where the best three bakers compete for the grand prize of $25,000 and the title of ''Best Baker in America''.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: Supermarket Stakeout is an American cooking competition TV series presented by chef Alex Guarnaschelli. Every participant of the show has a budget of $500 to purchase the groceries from the customers of a nearby supermarket, and create dishes later out of it. In each round the host assigns the theme of the dish to cook. The chef whose dish is judged the least satisfactory is eliminated from the competition, and the final chef remaining gets a prize of $10,000.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and host Eric Adjepong welcome three aspiring shellfish experts and watch them cook up a storm, as they go through two rounds of cooking. The hosts select their favourite contestant and dish, after which they discuss the judges' comments.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwoodd is a famous country singer who has won a number of awards in her career, including Grammy. But for many people, she's even more famous for her culinary show Trisha's Southern Kitchen. In her show together with her husband and friends she has fun while presenting food traditions and mouthwatering recipes of the American South. Have a look at yummy desserts, family dinners, traditional dishes from Trisha's childhood, family barbecues spiced up with Southern hospitality and humor.

programme.title: Chopped Junior
programme.desc: Ted Allen hosts this hearty American cooking show that sees four little chefs showcasing their cooking abilities as they prepare and present delicious dishes for the chance to win a whopping $10,000 cash prize. This spin off version of popular cooking competition Chopped is like a breathe of fresh air as these young prodigies bring their youthful energy and originality to the Chopped kitchen. The delicious treats and competitive format is bound to leave you wanting more.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Holiday Throwdown
programme.desc: It's the most competitive time of the year! The Food Network family reunites for more heated holiday throwdowns, with everyone set on taking Bobby Flay down! Familiar faces form their ultimate culinary team to battle Bobby with holiday-inspired dishes.

programme.title: M.O.D.O.K.
programme.desc: M.O.D.O.K brings Melissa and Lou along to a remote GRUMBL leadership conference. After learning that he's not the guest of honor, M.O.D.O.K. enlists Melissa's help in manipulating the executives into respecting him. His schemes accidentally lead to him opening up a portal that brings the dangerously hedonistic alien species, the Ciegrimites, to the conference. While the aliens are initially the life of the party, executives begin to drop dead from partying too hard, leading M.O.D.O.K. and Melissa to wipe out the Ciegrimites and save the conference.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: American post-apocalyptic horror TV series follows survivors of a zombie apocalypse, trying to stay alive. Sheriff's deputy Rick Grimes awakens from a coma to find out that the world has drastically changed. He leads a group of survivors and together they struggle to pull through in the world overrun by zombies, that are attracted to noise and to different scents, especially the human scent. Humans bitten or scratched by them become infected and turn into zombies as well.

programme.title: Solar Opposites
programme.desc: When the Pupa turns orange, Korvo realizes he left important Pupa information in his wallet on Shlorp. He and Terry travel back in time to the day they evacuated Shlorp, and knock Korvo's wallet into their spaceship. Returning to the present, they realize the Pupa merely ate something orange, but the time stream has been altered and they now live with Vanbo, an obnoxious Shlorpian. Returning to the past to set things right, Korvo and Terry learn they did not want each other as evacuation partners, but reconcile and beat up Vanbo. Yumyulack discovers Jesse has simulated a nicer version of himself in the "Pretend-O-Deck". His simulated self teaches him to be a better brother to Jesse, but one Yumyulack kills the other.

programme.title: Solar Opposites
programme.desc: Inside the Wall, Tim - imprisoned and tortured on the Duke's orders - is convinced by his cellmate Jean-Pierre to write letters calling for revolution. They are rescued by Cherie and her fellow rebels, and prepare to overthrow the Duke. Tim and Cherie spend a passionate night together, and copies of Tim's letters spread throughout the Wall, drawing people to their cause; Cherie urges Tim to lead them. As the Duke addresses a congregation, his sheriff spots Tim in the crowd and attacks, killing Jean-Pierre. Tim unites the oppressed inhabitants of the Wall in an open rebellion. The Duke floods the lower levels, drowning countless people; a farmer named Steven is unable to save his beloved mouse, Molly.

The series follows the lives of Los Angeles first responders: police officers, paramedics, firefighters and dispatchers and their high-pressure experience. These heroic people work day and night to ensure safety and support to those in trouble. First responders have to work together as one strong unit, as various accidents can happen anytime anywhere and if they do not react, the consequences will be horrible. Every day in the city and around it extreme emergencies happen, requiring immediate response.

The series follows the lives of Los Angeles first responders: police officers, paramedics, firefighters and dispatchers and their high-pressure experience. These heroic people work day and night to ensure safety and support to those in trouble. First responders have to work together as one strong unit, as various accidents can happen anytime anywhere and if they do not react, the consequences will be horrible. Every day in the city and around it extreme emergencies happen, requiring immediate response.

programme.title: Solar Opposites
programme.desc: Threatened with expulsion, Yumyulack and Jesse continue to attend their empty high school after the school year ends. Unaware of the summer break, they believe they are being tested, and attempt to teach each other. They realize their mistake and wreak havoc on the school, and are bribed with straight As after discovering Principal Cooke and Mrs. Frankie having sex in the cafeteria. Korvo and Terry enroll in a junior college, but Terry shoots Korvo with a raygun that makes him dumber. Korvo joins Terry's hard-partying college experience, but accidentally causes the "ice lava" that powers their spaceship to flood the city, freezing everyone in its path.

programme.title: Solar Opposites
programme.desc: One year after escaping the destruction of their planet Shlorp and crashing on Earth, aliens Korvo, Terry, and their child-replicants Yumyulack and Jesse adjust to their new lives. Korvo is determined to repair their spaceship, but Terry introduces him to the television show Funbucket. Realizing that the titular alien is fictional, they create a real Funbucket, who tires of them and befriends humans Travis and Avery. Forced to attend high school, Yumyulack and Jesse are menaced by their classmates and faculty. They shrink a bully named Lydia, hoping to use her to study human behavior. As the Shlorpian family have dinner together, it is revealed that their pet, the Pupa, will one day evolve and destroy Earth to terraform a new Shlorp.

programme.title: Solar Opposites
programme.desc: Korvo tries to get the family involved in repairing the spaceship, but they attend a birthday party instead, where he is inspired to become a magician. Using his computer system Aisha, Korvo creates a technologically advanced magic act; he goes viral and prepares for a Las Vegas show, which will culminate in him leaping through a black hole. Korvo ignores his family's warning that jealous magicians plan to kill him; the family save him from being shot, but he dies when the black hole trick goes awry. The grieving family agree to repair the ship in Korvo's memory, and he reappears, having faked his death to bring them closer together. Yumyulack adds a woman named Cherie to his shrunken collection.

programme.title: Solar Opposites
programme.desc: How would Earth look to alien settlers? Awesome or awful? Well that's the contrasting opinions of an alien family in this animated American sitcom. A year ago, the alien family fled the destruction of their planet Shlorp and crashed on Earth, beginning a new life in foreign surroundings, where they must adjust to the idiosyncrasies of the human world. The family is made up of partners Korvo and Terry, and their child-replicants Yumyulack and Jesse. The show was created by Justin Roiland (Rick and Morty) and Mike McMahan, with voices provided by Roiland, Thomas Middleditch, Sean Giambrone, and Mary Mack, among others.

programme.title: This Is Us
programme.desc: Follow the extraordinary lives of parents Jack and Rebecca Pearson, and their three children known as the ''Big Three'' - Kevin, Kate and Randall, through several different time frames. Rebecca had a difficult pregnancy with triplets, and after they lost one child, the Pearsons decide to adopt Randall who was born the same day. As years go by, we have a chance to see their incredible journeys and struggles after Jack's death - Rebecca's new marriage, Randall's story as he becomes a successful finance professional and a father of three, Kevin's life as an actor while struggling to be taken seriously, and Kate's struggles with weight issues.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Adrenaline-filled dramedy series that follows the crime-solving adventures of a forensic anthropologist, Dr. Temperance ''Bones'' Brennan, and an FBI agent Seeley Booth. The unusual couple investigates various murder cases and discovers causes of death by examining human remains. Dr. Brennan and her team at the Jeffersonian Institute Medico-Legal Lab, provide scientific expertise and Special Agent Seeley Booth provides FBI criminal investigation technique for each case, and together, they are a match made in heaven when it comes to solving some strange and gripping mysteries and bringing culprits to justice.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: Though a missing grad student is thought to have succumbed to the pressures of his research grant, his professor sister turns Colter onto the trail of a deadly campus conspiracy involving explicit photographs and messages.

programme.title: Will Trent
programme.desc: Drama Series - Ep. 11. Will goes under cover as Bill Black, a criminal with a troubled past, to take down a drug organization and find a missing DEA agent; Angie aims to put her relationship with Will behind her.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: Criminal Minds shows everyday life of an elite team of special agents who work in the FBI's Behavioral Analysis Unit. They are trained to analyse line of thinking of criminals and foretell their next step and so prevent evil from happening. These specialists come to the rescue when all forces of police are engaged but the criminal is not detected. The agents use their unbelievable psychological methods, make themselves think like a criminal, analyse their characters and personalities.

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: H. G. Wells' classic War of the Worlds is given a fresh look in this chilling re-telling set-in modern-day Europe that begins with French scientists receiving a signal confirming the existence of extra-terrestrials. The 8-episode TV mini-series follows a group of survivors facing the post-apocalyptic world left behind after an alien strike wipes out all but only a handful of the Earths' population. The FOX developed series is an Anglo-French production starring Georgina Rich and Michael Marcus trying to find their way through their new existence in a world that bares similarities to 'Walking Dead'.

programme.title: M.O.D.O.K.
programme.desc: Lou, feeling like M.O.D.O.K. is stifling his individuality ahead of his bar mitzvah, jumps into M.O.D.O.K.'s portal to Asgard. There, Lou is taken by a tribe of goblins known as Kobolds, but wins them over with his magic tricks and becomes their leader. He refuses to go back home with his dad, so M.O.D.O.K. takes control of an army of Asgardian warriors and wages war against his son. Eventually, M.O.D.O.K. and Lou strike a deal and use Lou's magic tricks to pacify the Kobolds. Meanwhile, the Super Adaptoid agrees to help young M.O.D.O.K.

programme.title: M.O.D.O.K.
programme.desc: Jodie's celebrity is on the rise and M.O.D.O.K. plans on winning her back from her new boyfriend, the superhero Wonder Man. Jodie and her publicist invite M.O.D.O.K. to a party, knowing his temper will bring publicity. M.O.D.O.K. provokes Wonder Man into attacking him at the party and is kicked out. Wonder Man leaves Jodie when he sees she's only using him for exposure. Melissa and Lou bond over their disappointment in their parents. M.O.D.O.K. and Jodie have sex when he goes to apologize, and it is revealed who exactly was behind her publicist's actions.

The series follows the lives of Los Angeles first responders: police officers, paramedics, firefighters and dispatchers and their high-pressure experience. These heroic people work day and night to ensure safety and support to those in trouble. First responders have to work together as one strong unit, as various accidents can happen anytime anywhere and if they do not react, the consequences will be horrible. Every day in the city and around it extreme emergencies happen, requiring immediate response.

programme.title: Solar Opposites
programme.desc: Threatened with expulsion, Yumyulack and Jesse continue to attend their empty high school after the school year ends. Unaware of the summer break, they believe they are being tested, and attempt to teach each other. They realize their mistake and wreak havoc on the school, and are bribed with straight As after discovering Principal Cooke and Mrs. Frankie having sex in the cafeteria. Korvo and Terry enroll in a junior college, but Terry shoots Korvo with a raygun that makes him dumber. Korvo joins Terry's hard-partying college experience, but accidentally causes the "ice lava" that powers their spaceship to flood the city, freezing everyone in its path.

programme.title: Solar Opposites
programme.desc: One year after escaping the destruction of their planet Shlorp and crashing on Earth, aliens Korvo, Terry, and their child-replicants Yumyulack and Jesse adjust to their new lives. Korvo is determined to repair their spaceship, but Terry introduces him to the television show Funbucket. Realizing that the titular alien is fictional, they create a real Funbucket, who tires of them and befriends humans Travis and Avery. Forced to attend high school, Yumyulack and Jesse are menaced by their classmates and faculty. They shrink a bully named Lydia, hoping to use her to study human behavior. As the Shlorpian family have dinner together, it is revealed that their pet, the Pupa, will one day evolve and destroy Earth to terraform a new Shlorp.

programme.title: Solar Opposites
programme.desc: Korvo tries to get the family involved in repairing the spaceship, but they attend a birthday party instead, where he is inspired to become a magician. Using his computer system Aisha, Korvo creates a technologically advanced magic act; he goes viral and prepares for a Las Vegas show, which will culminate in him leaping through a black hole. Korvo ignores his family's warning that jealous magicians plan to kill him; the family save him from being shot, but he dies when the black hole trick goes awry. The grieving family agree to repair the ship in Korvo's memory, and he reappears, having faked his death to bring them closer together. Yumyulack adds a woman named Cherie to his shrunken collection.

programme.title: Solar Opposites
programme.desc: How would Earth look to alien settlers? Awesome or awful? Well that's the contrasting opinions of an alien family in this animated American sitcom. A year ago, the alien family fled the destruction of their planet Shlorp and crashed on Earth, beginning a new life in foreign surroundings, where they must adjust to the idiosyncrasies of the human world. The family is made up of partners Korvo and Terry, and their child-replicants Yumyulack and Jesse. The show was created by Justin Roiland (Rick and Morty) and Mike McMahan, with voices provided by Roiland, Thomas Middleditch, Sean Giambrone, and Mary Mack, among others.

programme.title: This Is Us
programme.desc: Follow the extraordinary lives of parents Jack and Rebecca Pearson, and their three children known as the ''Big Three'' - Kevin, Kate and Randall, through several different time frames. Rebecca had a difficult pregnancy with triplets, and after they lost one child, the Pearsons decide to adopt Randall who was born the same day. As years go by, we have a chance to see their incredible journeys and struggles after Jack's death - Rebecca's new marriage, Randall's story as he becomes a successful finance professional and a father of three, Kevin's life as an actor while struggling to be taken seriously, and Kate's struggles with weight issues.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Adrenaline-filled dramedy series that follows the crime-solving adventures of a forensic anthropologist, Dr. Temperance ''Bones'' Brennan, and an FBI agent Seeley Booth. The unusual couple investigates various murder cases and discovers causes of death by examining human remains. Dr. Brennan and her team at the Jeffersonian Institute Medico-Legal Lab, provide scientific expertise and Special Agent Seeley Booth provides FBI criminal investigation technique for each case, and together, they are a match made in heaven when it comes to solving some strange and gripping mysteries and bringing culprits to justice.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: Criminal Minds shows everyday life of an elite team of special agents who work in the FBI's Behavioral Analysis Unit. They are trained to analyse line of thinking of criminals and foretell their next step and so prevent evil from happening. These specialists come to the rescue when all forces of police are engaged but the criminal is not detected. The agents use their unbelievable psychological methods, make themselves think like a criminal, analyse their characters and personalities.

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: H. G. Wells' classic War of the Worlds is given a fresh look in this chilling re-telling set-in modern-day Europe that begins with French scientists receiving a signal confirming the existence of extra-terrestrials. The 8-episode TV mini-series follows a group of survivors facing the post-apocalyptic world left behind after an alien strike wipes out all but only a handful of the Earths' population. The FOX developed series is an Anglo-French production starring Georgina Rich and Michael Marcus trying to find their way through their new existence in a world that bares similarities to 'Walking Dead'.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: American post-apocalyptic horror TV series follows survivors of a zombie apocalypse, trying to stay alive. Sheriff's deputy Rick Grimes awakens from a coma to find out that the world has drastically changed. He leads a group of survivors and together they struggle to pull through in the world overrun by zombies, that are attracted to noise and to different scents, especially the human scent. Humans bitten or scratched by them become infected and turn into zombies as well.

programme.title: M.O.D.O.K.
programme.desc: M.O.D.O.K brings Melissa and Lou along to a remote GRUMBL leadership conference. After learning that he's not the guest of honor, M.O.D.O.K. enlists Melissa's help in manipulating the executives into respecting him. His schemes accidentally lead to him opening up a portal that brings the dangerously hedonistic alien species, the Ciegrimites, to the conference. While the aliens are initially the life of the party, executives begin to drop dead from partying too hard, leading M.O.D.O.K. and Melissa to wipe out the Ciegrimites and save the conference.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: American post-apocalyptic horror TV series follows survivors of a zombie apocalypse, trying to stay alive. programme.title: Solar Opposites
programme.desc: When the Pupa turns orange, Korvo realizes he left important Pupa information in his wallet on Shlorp. He and Terry travel back in time to the day they evacuated Shlorp, and knock Korvo's wallet into their spaceship. Returning to the present, they realize the Pupa merely ate something orange, but the time stream has been altered and they now live with Vanbo, an obnoxious Shlorpian. Returning to the past to set things right, Korvo and Terry learn they did not want each other as evacuation partners, but reconcile and beat up Vanbo. Yumyulack discovers Jesse has simulated a nicer version of himself in the "Pretend-O-Deck". His simulated self teaches him to be a better brother to Jesse, but one Yumyulack kills the other.

programme.title: Solar Opposites
programme.desc: Inside the Wall, Tim - imprisoned and tortured on the Duke's orders - is convinced by his cellmate Jean-Pierre to write letters calling for revolution. They are rescued by Cherie and her fellow rebels, and prepare to overthrow the Duke. Tim and Cherie spend a passionate night together, and copies of Tim's letters spread throughout the Wall, drawing people to their cause; Cherie urges Tim to lead them. As the Duke addresses a congregation, his sheriff spots Tim in the crowd and attacks, killing Jean-Pierre. Tim unites the oppressed inhabitants of the Wall in an open rebellion. The Duke floods the lower levels, drowning countless people; a farmer named Steven is unable to save his beloved mouse, Molly.

The FOX developed series is an Anglo-French production starring Georgina Rich and Michael Marcus trying to find their way through their new existence in a world that bares similarities to 'Walking Dead'.

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: H. G. Wells' classic War of the Worlds is given a fresh look in this chilling re-telling set-in modern-day Europe that begins with French scientists receiving a signal confirming the existence of extra-terrestrials. The 8-episode TV mini-series follows a group of survivors facing the post-apocalyptic world left behind after an alien strike wipes out all but only a handful of the Earths' population. The FOX developed series is an Anglo-French production starring Georgina Rich and Michael Marcus trying to find their way through their new existence in a world that bares similarities to 'Walking Dead'.

programme.title: M.O.D.O.K.
programme.desc: Lou, feeling like M.O.D.O.K. is stifling his individuality ahead of his bar mitzvah, jumps into M.O.D.O.K.'s portal to Asgard. There, Lou is taken by a tribe of goblins known as Kobolds, but wins them over with his magic tricks and becomes their leader. He refuses to go back home with his dad, so M.O.D.O.K. takes control of an army of Asgardian warriors and wages war against his son. Eventually, M.O.D.O.K. and Lou strike a deal and use Lou's magic tricks to pacify the Kobolds. Meanwhile, the Super Adaptoid agrees to help young M.O.D.O.K.

programme.title: M.O.D.O.K.
programme.desc: Jodie's celebrity is on the rise and M.O.D.O.K. plans on winning her back from her new boyfriend, the superhero Wonder Man. Jodie and her publicist invite M.O.D.O.K. to a party, knowing his temper will bring publicity. M.O.D.O.K. provokes Wonder Man into attacking him at the party and is kicked out. Wonder Man leaves Jodie when he sees she's only using him for exposure. Melissa and Lou bond over their disappointment in their parents. M.O.D.O.K. and Jodie have sex when he goes to apologize, and it is revealed who exactly was behind her publicist's actions.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: American post-apocalyptic horror TV series follows survivors of a zombie apocalypse, trying to stay alive. Sheriff's deputy Rick Grimes awakens from a coma to find out that the world has drastically changed. He leads a group of survivors and together they struggle to pull through in the world overrun by zombies, that are attracted to noise and to different scents, especially the human scent. Humans bitten or scratched by them become infected and turn into zombies as well.

programme.title: White Collar
programme.desc: Neal Caffrey, a renowned con artist, forger, and thief, breaks out of jail three months before his sentence of four years was completed but is quickly caught again by the FBI Agent Peter Burke. Caffrey proposes a deal to help Burke apprehend dangerous white collar criminals as part of a work-release program, which also gives him an opportunity to pursue his lost girlfriend, Kate, on the side.

programme.title: White Collar
programme.desc: Neal Caffrey, a renowned con artist, forger, and thief, breaks out of jail three months before his sentence of four years was completed but is quickly caught again by the FBI Agent Peter Burke. Caffrey proposes a deal to help Burke apprehend dangerous white collar criminals as part of a work-release program, which also gives him an opportunity to pursue his lost girlfriend, Kate, on the side.

programme.title: White Collar
programme.desc: Kidnapped, Neal tries to turn the tables on his captor by helping him pass a test to get into the elite group of thieves known as the Pink Panthers. Aided by Mozzie, Peter tries to find Neal before it's too late.

programme.title: White Collar
programme.desc: In order to cement his trust with the Pink Panthers, Neal must align with a dangerous enemy from his past and obtain an extremely valuable artifact. Peter finds it difficult to keep their secret from Neal and Mozzie.

programme.title: White Collar
programme.desc: Neal feels conflicted about scamming an innocent mark while running a con for the Pink Panthers. Meanwhile, Peter is working with a reckless Interpol agent who could put their entire operation in jeopardy.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda Gordon, a young woman, has got the ability to talk to ghosts, as she struggles to live as close to normal a life as she can. She helps earthbound spirits to cross over to the other world as their earthly representative. Whether it's guilt or some unfinished business that is keeping them from attaining eternal peace, it's up to Melinda to figure it all out.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda tries to help a former rock star named Brandon who is apparently being harassed by his father's ghost, because he wanted his son to be a classical musician. Melinda discovers that Brandon's father has his own ghost, Brandon's dead former band mate, who was jealous of Brandon's talent. Melinda must now find a way to calm the former band mate's ghost so Brandon's father can give him the encouragement he needs to go back to his rock music.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy
programme.desc: Captivating American medical drama series that follows professional and private lives of various doctors, interns, residents, and attendings that are working in the fictional Seattle Grace Hospital. Meet Meredith Grey and her friends, physicians Cristina Yang, Izzie Stevens, Alex Karev, and George O'Malley, who have to balance their complicated personal lives with crazy schedules and stressful residency requirements while they are overseen by Miranda Bailey, a senior resident, who works with Derek Shepherd, head of neurosurgery and Meredith's love interest, and Preston Burke, head of cardiothoracic surgery. Young and still inexperienced physicians will have to deal with life-or-death consequences on a daily basis, while they make new friends, new enemies and new lovers every step of the way.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy
programme.desc: Captivating American medical drama series that follows professional and private lives of various doctors, interns, residents, and attendings that are working in the fictional Seattle Grace Hospital. Meet Meredith Grey and her friends, physicians Cristina Yang, Izzie Stevens, Alex Karev, and George O'Malley, who have to balance their complicated personal lives with crazy schedules and stressful residency requirements while they are overseen by Miranda Bailey, a senior resident, who works with Derek Shepherd, head of neurosurgery and Meredith's love interest, and Preston Burke, head of cardiothoracic surgery. Young and still inexperienced physicians will have to deal with life-or-death consequences on a daily basis, while they make new friends, new enemies and new lovers every step of the way.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy
programme.desc: Captivating American medical drama series that follows professional and private lives of various doctors, interns, residents, and attendings that are working in the fictional Seattle Grace Hospital. Meet Meredith Grey and her friends, physicians Cristina Yang, Izzie Stevens, Alex Karev, and George O'Malley, who have to balance their complicated personal lives with crazy schedules and stressful residency requirements while they are overseen by Miranda Bailey, a senior resident, who works with Derek Shepherd, head of neurosurgery and Meredith's love interest, and Preston Burke, head of cardiothoracic surgery. Young and still inexperienced physicians will have to deal with life-or-death consequences on a daily basis, while they make new friends, new enemies and new lovers every step of the way.

programme.title: The Americans
programme.desc: When a retaliatory American operation in Moscow claims the life of a high-placed KGB officer with whom Elizabeth shared a deep personal bond, the assassination has a profound impact on her. Despite explicit orders to the contrary, a determined Elizabeth decides to take matters in her own hands and exact revenge on the CIA bureaucrat responsible for issuing the kill-order. Unable to dissuade her but well aware she can't pull of the operation alone, a reluctant Philip agrees to help Elizabeth execute the risky - and potentially treasonous - mission.In the wake of recent events at the Rezidentura, the newly promoted Nina is privy to information that could be of great value to Stan, but she's more concerned with learning the identity of Vlad's killer... information Stan is understandably reluctant to share. Meanwhile, as Sandra grows increasingly suspicious of her husband's extracurricular activities, a night of drinking leads to an accusation, and a suspicious Elizabeth continues to question Claudia (aka Grannie's) motives.

programme.title: Body of Proof
programme.desc: A rich investment fund manager, Gerry Roberts, stands trial for defrauding a billion dollars, but he's kidnapped out of the court. A protestor outside the courthouse is run over and killed, and a video surfaces of Gerry being killed but, is it real?

programme.title: Body of Proof
programme.desc: A schizophrenic girl at a mental institution is murdered. Megan and Tommy interview a young patient who seems sane and lucid, she tells them she saw the killer climb down from a heating vent in the ceiling, but he meant to kill her, not the victim.

programme.title: Body of Proof
programme.desc: Drama series about a team of crime-solving medical examiners in Philadelphia. When a plane plunges into Philadelphia's power grid, the team must strive to understand why the onboard security guard suddenly went berserk and opened fire. A stolen body, a saboteur inside the morgue and power cuts leave them further in the dark. Meanwhile, Tommy and Riley are involved in a serious accident while investigating the crash site.

programme.title: Station 19
programme.desc: The latest series from the executive producers of "Grey's Anatomy," "Scandal" and "How to Get Away with Murder," follows a group of heroic firefighters at Seattle Fire Station 19 - from captain to newest recruit - as they risk their liveS in the line of duty and off the clock. These brave men and women are like family, literally and figuratively, and together they put their own lives in jeopardy as first responders to save the lives of others.

programme.title: Station 19
programme.desc: The latest series from the executive producers of "Grey's Anatomy," "Scandal" and "How to Get Away with Murder," follows a group of heroic firefighters at Seattle Fire Station 19 - from captain to newest recruit - as they risk their liveS in the line of duty and off the clock. These brave men and women are like family, literally and figuratively, and together they put their own lives in jeopardy as first responders to save the lives of others.

programme.title: Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Ezgi and Özgür, who see the police in front of them, are shocked. Özgür, who thinks that Tolga is complaining about Ezgi, goes crazy. They all have to go to the police station together. Even if Ezgi, whose testimony is taken, is released, they do not let go of this work and try to prove Ezgi's innocence. Against all the difficulties, the most important thing for Özgür and Ezgi is their love for each other. But Tolga and Serdar have no intention of leaving them alone. Meanwhile, Ezgi has prepared a surprise bachelorette party for Cansu. Cansu is very happy to have fun ...

programme.title: Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Özgür was very overwhelmed due to all that he has been through lately and decides to take a break and goes in the forest to clear his mind. But his peaceful moments there does not last long, Ezgi, Ozan and Deniz goes to find him. They all have a fun day together. Özgür takes his strength from Ezgi in every negativity he experiences. Every moment he shares with her, he realizes that he cannot be without her and proposes to Ezgi. Ezgi is finally living her dream, finding true love. She says yes to his proposal to be happy forever with Özgür.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda is haunted by the spirit of a young man who wants her to visit his wife, Donna, to make amends. But Melinda discovers that Donna is his former wife who divorced him because he was obsessed with his ex- girlfriend. Meanwhile, Melinda meets Delia Banks, the mother of a boy who is determined to steal some valuable memorabilia from her store, and Melinda is surprised to find out what is really motivating him.

programme.title: M.O.D.O.K.
programme.desc: Young M.O.D.O.K. has kidnapped the family and replaced them with robots that trick M.O.D.O.K. into thinking Jodie wants him back. M.O.D.O.K. learns the truth and goes to free his real family. The family meet up inside the carnival-themed arena Murderworld, where young M.O.D.O.K. and Arcade reveal that each family member has two robotic replicas and that they must fight to the death, unsure of who is real or fake. Jodie goes toe-to-toe with Young M.O.D.O.K. The family leaves feeling united for the first time in a while.

They all have to go to the police station together. Even if Ezgi, whose testimony is taken, is released, they do not let go of this work and try to prove Ezgi's innocence. Against all the difficulties, the most important thing for Özgür and Ezgi is their love for each other. But Tolga and Serdar have no intention of leaving them alone. Meanwhile, Ezgi has prepared a surprise bachelorette party for Cansu. Cansu is very happy to have fun ...

programme.title: Lyle, Lyle, Crocodile
programme.desc: When the Primm family (Constance Wu, Scoot McNairy, Winslow Fegley) moves to New York City, their young son Josh struggles to adapt to his new school and new friends. All of that changes when he discovers Lyle - a singing crocodile (Shawn Mendes) who loves baths, caviar and great music-living in the attic of his new home. The two become fast friends, but when Lyle's existence is threatened by evil neighbor Mr. Grumps (Brett Gelman), the Primm's must band together with Lyle's charismatic owner, Hector P. Valenti (Javier Bardem), to show the world that family can come from the most unexpected places and there's nothing wrong with a big singing crocodile with an even bigger personality.

programme.title: Gnomeo & Juliet
programme.desc: Animated film about two garden gnomes from rival families that fall in love. The red garden gnomes of Mr Capulet and the blue gnomes of his neighbour, Miss Montague, are permanently at war with each other across the garden fence. But when Juliet leaves the red garden to hunt for a flower, she meets the dashing Gnomeo without knowing he is a blue and they fall in love. They have to keep their love a secret from their parents, as well as the brutal Tybalt, the fiercest of the reds and Gnomeo's hated enemy. Can they find a way to be together, or will the war between the blues and the reds destroy them all?

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: Hank, a loveable dog with a head full of dreams about becoming a samurai, sets off in search of his destiny.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: From the creators of Shrek comes DreamWorks Animation's Trolls, a smart, funny and irreverent comedy about the search for happiness, and just how far some will go to get it. This hilarious film transports audiences to a colorful, wondrous world populated by the overly optimistic Trolls, who have a constant dance in their step and a song on their lips, and the comically pessimistic Bergens, who are only happy when they have Trolls in their stomachs. After the Bergens invade Troll Village, Poppy (Kendrick), the happiest Troll ever born, and the overly-cautious curmudgeonly Branch (Timberlake) set off on a journey to rescue her friends. Together, this mismatched duo embarks on a mission full of adventure and mishaps – trying to tolerate each other long enough to get the job done. Utilizing music to further the film's narrative, the Trolls soundtrack is produced by Justin Timberlake and features original songs by Justin Timberlake and Gwen Stefani, in addition to a number of classic hits from the '60s – '80s.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: For the first time in the cinematic history of Spider-Man, our friendly neighborhood hero's identity is revealed, bringing his Super Hero responsibilities into conflict with his normal life and putting those he cares about most at risk. When he enlists Doctor Strange's help to restore his secret, the spell tears a hole in their world, releasing the most powerful villains who've ever fought a Spider-Man in any universe. Now, Peter will have to overcome his greatest challenge yet, which will not only forever alter his own future but the future of the Multiverse.

programme.title: See How They Run
programme.desc: In 1950s London, a world-weary inspector and an eager rookie constable take on a puzzling whodunit within the glamorously sordid world of underground theater, investigating a mysterious homicide at their own peril.

programme.title: A Taste of Hunger
programme.desc: A couple who sacrifice everything to achieve the highest possible accolade in the culinary world - a Michelin star.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Action comedy. Written and directed by Elizabeth Banks (who also stars), this third instalment in the Charlie's Angels series stars Kristen Stewart, Naomi Scott and Ella Balinska as the new generation of Angels: Sabina, Elena and Jane. This time out, the Angels are working for a private detective company named the Townsend Agency, headed up by Charlie (Robert Clotworthy). When the agency is informed that Elena Houghlin (Scott) - an engineer working for tech entrepreneur Alexander Brok (Sam Claflin) - wants to expose her superiors for creating a potentially deadly device called Calisto, she gets recruited as an honorary Angel to help destroy Calisto before the device can be duplicated. Under the guidance of Charlie's assistant Rebekah (Banks), the Angels fight to protect this revolutionary technology from becoming weaponised. But as their assignment becomes increasingly treacherous and complicated, they must rely on each other to get the job done and figure out who they can really trust. Also starring Dijmon Hounsou, Nat Faxon and Patrick Stewart. Network Premiere.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Action-packed superhero adventure starring Vin Diesel. Soldier Ray Garrison (Diesel) is the very definition of an all-American hero. He's got a lethal military mind and has just spearheaded an extremely dangerous mission rescuing hostages in Kenya. Fair enough, then, that he goes on a well-earned break to Italy to recharge with his wife Gina (Talulah Riley). Unfortunately, their vacation turns into a holiday from hell - and not the food poisoning and cockroaches in the bathroom kind, either. Ray and Gina are kidnapped by a group of mercenaries connected to the hostage mission he's just completed. Their leader, Axe (Toby Kebbell), wants information. When Ray doesn't give it to him, Axe executes both him and Gina. Film over? Not quite. Back in the US, visionary scientist Dr Emil Harting (Guy Pearce) brings Ray back to life, with a few added bonuses including superhuman strength and the handy power to heal wounds almost instantly. Ray learns that he's just one of Dr Harting's super soldiers. But when he starts having flashbacks to what happened in Italy, he's hellbent on revenge. The problem is, those flashbacks keep contradicting themselves. It seems he's going to have to search for the truth as well. Network Premiere.

programme.title: Dragged Across Concrete
programme.desc: Crime movie. American crime movie, produced in 2018. Two overzealous cops find themselves suspended, when a video of their strong-arm tactics leaks on the internet. Low on cash but with many obligations, they descend into the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Oppenheimer
programme.desc: From iconic tentpole filmmaker Christopher Nolan, comes his first biographical drama about the brilliant physicist J. Robert Oppenheimer's role in the development of the atomic bomb and his pulse-pounding paradox of risking the world in order to save it .

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: For the first time in the cinematic history of Spider-Man, our friendly neighborhood hero's identity is revealed, bringing his Super Hero responsibilities into conflict with his normal life and putting those he cares about most at risk. When he enlists Doctor Strange's help to restore his secret, the spell tears a hole in their world, releasing the most powerful villains who've ever fought a Spider-Man in any universe. Now, Peter will have to overcome his greatest challenge yet, which will not only forever alter his own future but the future of the Multiverse.

programme.title: UFC. Alexandre Pantoja-Kai Asakura
programme.desc: Martial Arts based TV programme. UFC stands for the Ultimate Fighting Championship which is an American mixed martial arts (MMA) promotion company based in Las Vegas that is owned by William Morris Endeavour.The purpose of UFC fighting was to establish the most effective martial art in a contest that had no weight classes and minimal rules that were as follows: no biting, hair pulling, groin shots and eye gouging. Legendary fighters well known for their ability to win in UFC fighting are Anderson Silva, Brock Lesnar, Connor McGregor and Ken Shamrock. Women's MMA has seen Ronda Rousey defend her title from 2012 to 2015 before she was defeated by Holly Holm another belt holder in more than one martial art.

programme.title: Football: Bundesliga. Leverkusen - St. Pauli
programme.desc: Germany has the most attended football league in the world, in the Bundesliga. We bring these authentic fab experiences to your living room with all the key moments of the 2019-20 season, to ensure that your appetite for German football is well and truly met. The likes of Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich are met with stern competition this season, as RB Leipzig look to build on their third-placed finish from last season. This programme brings all the games of the german top-flight into one place, so that you can easily catch up with the week's action. As we reach the business end-of-the-season, watch the victors and losers dictate the final table. With relegation spots and Champions League places yet to be decided, it promises to be a rather exciting conclusion for all those concerned.

Don't miss a moment of the hard-hitting action!

programme.title: Basketball: EuroLeague. Olympiacos - Paris
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.title: Football: La Liga. Athletic Bilbao - Villarreal
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Bargain Block follows home renovation experts and partners Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas on their journey to restore Detroit's iconic American neighborhoods one house at a time. With sound advice and support from their friend—lifetime Detroit resident and real estate expert Shea Hicks-Whitfield, who is expecting her first child—Keith and Evan buy multiple rundown and abandoned houses on a single block, take them down to the studs, and create affordable, stylish and fully furnished starter homes that are ideal for first-time homebuyers. Now settled in the Motor City, the couple, who have renovated and purchased their own home and opened a new retail store and workshop, infuse every property with a functional layout, artful design and beautiful repurposed furniture. The end result is incredible transformations of dilapidated homes that are an inspiration to the entire neighborhood.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: This is a property hunting show with a very expensive twist. David Bromstad joins people as they search for their dream homes with a dreamy budget, that's because all of the guest on this particular house hunting show are lottery winners. programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Christina Anstead and Tarek El Moussa are Californian realtors, ex-spouses and the hosts of Flip or Flop show, which is the original show in the Flip or Flop franchise. The hosts buy neglected homes, mainly bank-owned, short sales or foreclosures, to renovate and resell them. It is often buying a pig in a poke, as they never know until they start renovation what the real condition of the estate is. It is a risky business, some houses require minimal investments, while some are the worst nightmare. Tarek and Christina aren't afraid of any hardships and every time work hard to sell at a profit.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Atlanta
programme.desc: This reality renovation show, a spin-off of the popular Flip or Flop reality home improvement series, takes you to the American state of Georgia as Ken and Anita Corsini welcome you to Atlanta! Together they buy up neglected homes in need of a bit of love and attention to renovate them so they can be sold at a profit. They take on all sorts of projects, big and small, but they're never entirely sure of the challenges they face with the home until they start to restore it. Ken is an experienced real estate investor who has bought and sold over 500 properties. But that doesn’t mean it’s all plain-sailing. Ken and his wife Anita must use their experience, expertise and creativity as they face the difficulties that come with flipping houses.

programme.title: Pool Kings
programme.desc: Well-do-to clients wishing for their own slice of paradise in their very back yard. Sounds like a job for the pool kings. Dramatic, in-ground pools with water features, decorative extras, outdoor kitchens and yes, even mini water parks. Innovative and outlandish designs, courtesy of California Pools, one of the largest pool builders in the U.S, and Tennessee-based Peek Pools & Spas bring the latest trends and modern features of back yard pools.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Bargain Block follows home renovation experts and partners Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas on their journey to restore Detroit's iconic American neighborhoods one house at a time. With sound advice and support from their friend—lifetime Detroit resident and real estate expert Shea Hicks-Whitfield, who is expecting her first child—Keith and Evan buy multiple rundown and abandoned houses on a single block, take them down to the studs, and create affordable, stylish and fully furnished starter homes that are ideal for first-time homebuyers. Now settled in the Motor City, the couple, who have renovated and purchased their own home and opened a new retail store and workshop, infuse every property with a functional layout, artful design and beautiful repurposed furniture. The end result is incredible transformations of dilapidated homes that are an inspiration to the entire neighborhood.

programme.title: Pool Kings

Dramatic, in-ground pools with water features, decorative extras, outdoor kitchens and yes, even mini water parks. Innovative and outlandish designs, courtesy of California Pools, one of the largest pool builders in the U.S, and Tennessee-based Peek Pools & Spas bring the latest trends and modern features of back yard pools.

programme.title: James Nesbitt: Disasters That Changed Britain
programme.desc: Award winning actor James Nesbitt presents this documentary series covering the most devastating disasters to shake Britain in the last 60 years. Since the end of the Second World War, Great Britain has had its fair share of unfortunate events. From the Munich air disaster of 1958 to the 2017 Grenfell Tower fire, Nesbitt unpicks the events that preceded these disasters and attempts to explain why they happened.This documentaries shines a light on the the human cost of these tragedies and analyses the political and cultural factors that may have contributed to them. As these disasters made huge impacts on the Britain we know today, the changes that were made in the wake of the horrific events are examined. Donald McIntyre and Anna Richardson also join with their own investigations into events that happened years before that had unforeseen consequences.

programme.title: Engineering an Empire
programme.desc: Documentary series, hosted by Peter Weller, an actor and a professor at Syracuse University, that explores the engineering and architectural achievements that were characteristic of some of the greatest civilizations on this planet - Rome, Egypt, Greece, the Aztecs, the Maya, Russia, China, the Persians, the Byzantines, Britain, France, and Italy in the late 15th and 16th centuries. Using interviews with experts, re-enactments, and computer-generated graphics, this programme looks at various structures, buildings and mechanical inventions, from Menes' dam built in around 3000 BC in Egypt to the world's first locomotive invented in Britain.

programme.title: Search for the Lost Giants
programme.desc: Search for the Lost Giants follows two brothers on their quest to find lost giants. According to the Bible there were ancient giants wandering along the Earth. A few years ago some Freemasons found stone structures and corridors underground that indicated a lost civilization. The brothers Bill and Jim Viera are looking for evidence of missing bones from ancient skeletons that are suspected to have clocked in at over seven feet tall.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Deep Sea Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Have a look at the history series and its four episodes telling us how Ross Kemp, presenter and journalist, is making his life-long dream come true. He dives down on shipwrecks to uncover hidden stories and recover true treasures and mysterious stories hidden behind. Neil Brock is his personal guide and dive supervisor providing him a special intensive training course. Expert divers Emily Turton and Mallory Haas accompany Ross along his exploration around various parts of the UK.

programme.title: Where Did It Come From?
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring the history of Earth's greatest man-made structures and creations. Where Did It Come From? reveals the earliest examples of brilliance and ingenuity from past pioneers. From the Roman highway project; a civil engineering feat establishing a network of unprecedented highways, to Egypt's iconic structures, this series reveals the incomprehensible ides brought to life by magnificent minds, and in some cases, brutal slavery. Join host Michael Guillen as he dives into this fascinating world of both civil and social engineering, born out of ideas we still use today.

programme.title: Rome: Rise & Fall of an Empire
programme.desc: A television documentary series which tells the full story of the origins, development and downfall of the famous Roman Empire between the 2nd century BC to the era of the last Western Roman emperor in the 5th century AD. The Romans are regarded as one of the most revolutionary Empires in the entire course of history and a substantial amount of theories, principles and engineering techniques they experimented with are still applied to this day. This thirteen-part series explores the Germanic, Britannic and other barbarian tribal wars which ultimately led to the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: An FBI cold case that has laid dormant for 70 years leads a group of world-renown investigators on the ultimate manhunt to finally answer the question: Did Adolf Hitler survive World War II? In early 2014 the FBI declassified hundreds of confidential documents showing that Hitler may have not committed suicide but rather escaped to South America after the fall of Germany. A memo from J. Edgar Hoover himself states "American Army officials in Germany have not located Hitler's body nor is there any reliable source that will say definitely that Hitler is dead." Armed with the most cutting edge technology and these newly released FBI files the team will approach this case like a modern death claims investigation. Whether they are investigating a mysterious Nazi lair deep in the Argentinian jungle or diving for evidence of a missing U-Boat that could of shuttled Hitler to South America our team will focus on the tried and tested tenants for solving a fraudulent death case: follow the money where was the subject last seen, eyewitness reports, make contact with known associates and forensics.With declassified worldwide intelligence providing a wealth of new clues and modern technology never before available we reopen this world famous cold case in hopes of solving the mystery surrounding the demise of one of the biggest criminals of all time.

programme.title: The Curse of Civil War Gold
programme.desc: The Curse of Civil War Gold is a non-fiction series about American Civil War history. Michigan native, part time treasure hunter Kevin Dykstra and his team search for lost treasures of Civil War Gold, estimated to be worth millions of dollars. They join forces with Marty Lagina from The Curse of Oak Island trying to solve the mystery and find the lost gold. The story goes that Union soldiers tracked down Confederate president Jefferson Davis in 1865 and confiscated his gold. Later it was smuggled north and ended up in Lake Michigan. And this is exactly where Kevin and his crew head to.

The story goes that Union soldiers tracked down Confederate president Jefferson Davis in 1865 and confiscated his gold. Later it was smuggled north and ended up in Lake Michigan. And this is exactly where Kevin and his crew head to.

programme.title: UFO Files
programme.desc: In the search for life beyond our planet, this documentary investigates areas on earth that are said to have had UFO activity, conspiracy theories and phenomenons. Interviewing a variety of scientists and experts on UFOs and examining when possible evidence can prove or suggest anything towards super natural life. From going off of tales that have been told and spread through generations and or cultures to personal experiences where sighting have occurred the series covers the super natural phenomenon that is life beyond earth.

programme.title: Ancient Discoveries
programme.desc: Have a look at the technologies from the past. You will be surprised to find out in what extent ancient knowledge influences modern technology. The truth about the past is much more complicated and fascinating than we imagine. This eye-opening series is filmed on location in Italy, Greece, Egypt, Holland, and England, and other locations of the world where historical events actually happened, and with the help of computer animation ancient machines and mechanisms are reconstructed. As well the series uses contributions from archaeologists and other experts, footage of historical sites and artifacts and dramatized reconstructions.

programme.title: Serial Killer Earth
programme.desc: Gripping and unsettling documentary series that features a team of experts who in each episode examine various footage from news and home video, as well as eyewitness testimony, in order to explain, understand and inform viewers of what actually happened during some of the most devastating natural disasters- including Hurricane Katrina, the earthquake and tsunami that devastated Japan, a monstrous earthquake in Haiti, avalanche of rocks and debris that destroyed a village in Honduras, and many other hurricanes, earthquakes, tsunamis, floodings, droughts and devastating forest fires. They will also investigate how these recent disasters compare and contrast with the most historic natural disasters of the past.

programme.title: MonsterQuest
programme.desc: There have been stories for centuries about huge, aggressive albino sperm whales. They were immortalised by the novel "Moby Dick." These stories told of whales targeting ships and ramming them with their huge heads. Could stories like this be true?

programme.title: Ancient Impossible
programme.desc: Ancient Impossible reveals how many of today's technological achievements were actually developed centuries ago. Colossal monuments, impossible feats of engineering, and technologies so precise they defy reinvention. The ancient world was far more advanced than we ever imagined. We'll travel through history to reveal a radically different picture of the past, with innovations so far ahead of their time, they're still in use today. Now, new science uncovers a lost world more like our own than we ever suspected, and reveals how modern technology has its blueprint in the ancient world.

programme.title: Mankind Decoded
programme.desc: Using dramatic reconstructions, this fascinating documentary series explores the evolution and advancement of the human race, dissecting the key events and changes that have affected and altered various civilisations. Each episode in this 12-part series focusses on a unique transformation of our ancestors, as they discovered more and more about the planet they inhabit. With expert historians offering explanations to these changes, the series reveals how powerful forces of nature compelled humans to adapt, the birth of war, the discovery of fire and metals, and the building of giant structures, among many others.

programme.title: Mankind Decoded
programme.desc: Using dramatic reconstructions, this fascinating documentary series explores the evolution and advancement of the human race, dissecting the key events and changes that have affected and altered various civilisations. Each episode in this 12-part series focusses on a unique transformation of our ancestors, as they discovered more and more about the planet they inhabit. With expert historians offering explanations to these changes, the series reveals how powerful forces of nature compelled humans to adapt, the birth of war, the discovery of fire and metals, and the building of giant structures, among many others.

programme.title: Battles BC
programme.desc: Step back in time and revisit some of the most brutal battles that took place before Christ. Recreated with stunning technology, we reveal these violent conflicts like never before, examining the soldiers, strategies and weapons deployed by the powerful legions. From Hannibal's clashes with Rome to Alexander the Great's pursuits throughout India, these conflicts have had a resounding impact on our history and with these reconstructions you will see the ferocious aspects of war in antiquity.

programme.desc: There have been stories for centuries about huge, aggressive albino sperm whales. They were immortalised by the novel "Moby Dick." These stories told of whales targeting ships and ramming them with their huge heads. Could stories like this be true?

programme.title: Ancient Impossible
programme.desc: Ancient Impossible reveals how many of today's technological achievements were actually developed centuries ago. Colossal monuments, impossible feats of engineering, and technologies so precise they defy reinvention. The ancient world was far more advanced than we ever imagined. We'll travel through history to reveal a radically different picture of the past, with innovations so far ahead of their time, they're still in use today. Now, new science uncovers a lost world more like our own than we ever suspected, and reveals how modern technology has its blueprint in the ancient world.

programme.title: Mankind Decoded
programme.desc: Using dramatic reconstructions, this fascinating documentary series explores the evolution and advancement of the human race, dissecting the key events and changes that have affected and altered various civilisations. Each episode in this 12-part series focusses on a unique transformation of our ancestors, as they discovered more and more about the planet they inhabit. With expert historians offering explanations to these changes, the series reveals how powerful forces of nature compelled humans to adapt, the birth of war, the discovery of fire and metals, and the building of giant structures, among many others.

programme.title: Mankind Decoded
programme.desc: Using dramatic reconstructions, this fascinating documentary series explores the evolution and advancement of the human race, dissecting the key events and changes that have affected and altered various civilisations. Each episode in this 12-part series focusses on a unique transformation of our ancestors, as they discovered more and more about the planet they inhabit. With expert historians offering explanations to these changes, the series reveals how powerful forces of nature compelled humans to adapt, the birth of war, the discovery of fire and metals, and the building of giant structures, among many others.

programme.title: Battles BC
programme.desc: Step back in time and revisit some of the most brutal battles that took place before Christ. Recreated with stunning technology, we reveal these violent conflicts like never before, examining the soldiers, strategies and weapons deployed by the powerful legions. From Hannibal's clashes with Rome to Alexander the Great's pursuits throughout India, these conflicts have had a resounding impact on our history and with these reconstructions you will see the ferocious aspects of war in antiquity.

programme.title: James Nesbitt: Disasters That Changed Britain
programme.desc: Award winning actor James Nesbitt presents this documentary series covering the most devastating disasters to shake Britain in the last 60 years. Since the end of the Second World War, Great Britain has had its fair share of unfortunate events. From the Munich air disaster of 1958 to the 2017 Grenfell Tower fire, Nesbitt unpicks the events that preceded these disasters and attempts to explain why they happened.This documentaries shines a light on the the human cost of these tragedies and analyses the political and cultural factors that may have contributed to them. As these disasters made huge impacts on the Britain we know today, the changes that were made in the wake of the horrific events are examined. Donald McIntyre and Anna Richardson also join with their own investigations into events that happened years before that had unforeseen consequences.

programme.title: UFO Files
programme.desc: In the search for life beyond our planet, this documentary investigates areas on earth that are said to have had UFO activity, conspiracy theories and phenomenons. Interviewing a variety of scientists and experts on UFOs and examining when possible evidence can prove or suggest anything towards super natural life. From going off of tales that have been told and spread through generations and or cultures to personal experiences where sighting have occurred the series covers the super natural phenomenon that is life beyond earth.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: HISTORY's hit series, PAWN STARS, enters viewers inside the door of a family run pawnshop in Las Vegas, where three generations of men from the Harrison family grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey jointly run the business, with clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. This family lives and breathes the pawning business, using their sharp-eyed skills to carefully assess the value of items their colorful customers bring in, ranging from the obscure to the truly historical objects.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Exciting American docu-reality show in which Allen Haff and Ton Jones, aka ''Auction Hunters'', travel across the US, participating in storage unit auctions, in an attempt to find hidden treasures and rare items that will be worth lots of money. Each episode shows viewers the whole process, from bidding, to winning abandoned storage units, appraising the objects they find, and selling the most interesting and valuable items to experts or collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters

This family lives and breathes the pawning business, using their sharp-eyed skills to carefully assess the value of items their colorful customers bring in, ranging from the obscure to the truly historical objects.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Forged in Fire, an American competition series aired on the History Channel, challenges four new competitors to produce a knife in their own style with a small variety of metal objects to create from. The series, hosted by Wil Willis, consists of a three-round elimination contest to forge bladed weapons, with the final winner receiving $10,000 and the day's championship title. Judged by experts in weapon history and use, the last two people standing must create in their own forge a Moro Kris sword, a blade which dates back to 300BC, in just five days. Filmed in Brooklyn, New York, the set referred to as "The Forge" sets the scene for this suspenseful show with propane forges, power hammers and hydraulic presses, with medical personnel being close by to treat any injuries or other health problems. If the medical personnel suspect that the competitors are unable to continue safely, they will be disqualified. Once each competitor has created their weapon, it will be put through a series of tests including chopping/slashing/stabbing objects such as ropes, ice blocks, animal carcasses and steel car doors. Having to meet a number of criteria's, the smiths battle it out, without their swords, to become the best black-smith.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Groups of independent shippers compete with each other in this American reality series, as they bid for the right to haul unconventional items that many conventional carriers deem unfeasible to transport. The crews must first win the right to ship the items by bidding on uShip, an online auction house that is one of the largest of its kind in the world. Once they have won the contract, they prepare the items for shipping, which is often easier said than done. The crews' performances are scrutinised throughout, and their operational abilities are pushed to their limits as they transport both bizarre and tricky shipments across the country.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Storage Wars show a team of professional buyers will prove that for a good buy you need more than certain sum of money. When rent is not paid on a storage locker for a certain period, the contents can be sold as a single lot of items in the form of an auction. The best experts are fighting for containers' contents, hundreds of thousands of dollars are sometimes in the game. Every participant has only some minutes to inspect the contents, and that only without entering the storage room, just looking inside. Each purchase can become a win or a loss, and nobody knows exactly whether they are buying real treasures or garbage.

Ancient cave drawings of strange creatures, an asphalt-like substance in an Egyptian pyramid made from the remains of unidentified creatures, continued mass sightings in the USA -- these are just a few of the strange stories that will be investigated.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens Special Presentation
programme.desc: Throughout human history, there have been sudden and dramatic leaps in our evolution that simply cannot be explained by Darwinian theory. Ancient Astronaut theorists propose that the "missing link" is extraterrestrial intervention.

programme.title: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: Rivaling the famous Area 51 in Nevada for UFO sightings and paramormal activity, is the lesser known, but equally fascinating, Uinta Basin in Utah and, in particular, Skinwalker Ranch. For the first time, a team of scientists and experts have been granted unlimited access to the infamous and secretive 512-acre property in order to unlock the mysteries of more than 200 years of UFO activity, bizarre animal mutations and preternatural phenomena. Making good use of state-of-the-art tecnology such as drone thermography, ground-penetrating radar and lasers, the team apply their knowledge and expertise to make shocking discoveries.

programme.title: Beyond Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: Andy and Paul team up with the investigator of Skinwalker Ranch to probe an abandoned New Mexico ranch whose owner claims is infested with malevolent demons; their attempts at communication with this phenomenon opens up a chilling "conversation."

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The world is full of incredible engineering projects and buildings designed to make life easier. Unfortunately a great number of these outstanding structures are abandoned now for some reason or the other and left empty to decay. The documentary TV series dives in the past and explores how and why they were built, their influence on environment and costs of failure. It also answers the questions if it is possible to make something out of the ruins and reuse the abandoned structures. From old rusty bridges to ship graveyard colonized by wildlife, from military airport to Hitler's bunkers, ghost towns and abandoned villages- get to know forgotten structures that change the world.

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: It took only six weeks for the Nazi Army to conquer France, with an onslaught of tanks, aircraft and German troops. Witness the extraordinary military success of the Blitzkrieg campaign, through rare footage and firsthand accounts.

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: Relics from the crucifixion of Jesus Christ have fascinated the faithful for 2000 years--from the wooden cross and iron nails, to the crown of thorns and Spear of Destiny. But do these sacred artefacts still exist? And if so, where are they?

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Mafia and Britain
programme.desc: Ross starts his journey under the arches of Blackfriars bridge in London. In 1982, under this bridge a man was found. He had apparently hanged himself. The man was Roberto Calvi, better known as "God's Banker".

programme.title: Secrets of the Hells Angels
programme.desc: ATF agent Jay Dobyns goes undercover to infiltrate the Hells Angels. He's backed up by a female agent, Jenna Maguire, who plays the role of his 'old lady', but the dream of becoming a fully patched Hell's Angel pushes Jay to the point of destruction.
