programme.title: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: True-crime documentary series exploring chilling crimes committed by sisters. Produced by Khloe Kardashian, possibly one of the most famous sisters in the world, and no stranger to sibling conflict, the series explores cases where sisters have worked both in tandem and against each other. With interviews from law enforcement officials involved in the respective cases at the time of investigation, Twisted Sisters reveals the chilling brutality of these violent atrocities, and shows how officers unraveled the sisters' relationships to help them solve the case.

programme.title: Blood Relatives
programme.desc: It is often easy to regard other families as picture perfect, harmonious examples of pillars of the community. But sometimes, these facades hide dreadful criminal intent and gruesome violence. Brenda Strong narrates this show which exposes murderous secrets hidden within the family unit. Each epsiode explores a separate story involving a family tragedy and reveals the motives of other family members who are potential suspects in the crime. From sibling rivalry to conflicts over money to jealousy and infidelity, there are many factors involved which can lead to a family member paying the ultimate price. The skilled story-telling will draw the viewer in and keep them on the edge of their seat as they try to guess who the killer is.

programme.title: Blood Relatives
programme.desc: It is often easy to regard other families as picture perfect, harmonious examples of pillars of the community. But sometimes, these facades hide dreadful criminal intent and gruesome violence. Brenda Strong narrates this show which exposes murderous secrets hidden within the family unit. Each epsiode explores a separate story involving a family tragedy and reveals the motives of other family members who are potential suspects in the crime. From sibling rivalry to conflicts over money to jealousy and infidelity, there are many factors involved which can lead to a family member paying the ultimate price. The skilled story-telling will draw the viewer in and keep them on the edge of their seat as they try to guess who the killer is.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Based on real life events. Evil Lives Here is a true crime story show that speaks to family members of well-known murderers and criminals. It includes re-enactments, police footage, family photographs and videos that gives you the view through the murderer's eyes. The programme is also styled to make you imagine it in the eyes of a loved one that you know. It is an in-depth investigation into the criminal's life and the life of the family after the crime. It also looks into possible reasons why the criminal committed the crime without placing a viewpoint.

programme.title: Deadliest Mums & Dads
programme.desc: An abusive and vengeful father lures his young sons to his house. Little do they know that he's planning a devastating act of revenge.

programme.title: Deadliest Mums & Dads
programme.desc: A 5-year-old's death in hospital seems to be a tragedy, but doctors soon suspect his mother is involved. Police uncover a horrific truth.

programme.title: Who the Hell...
programme.desc: Shocking revelations ensue in this deceptive documentary series, where marital relationships built on lies are examined, revealing cases of betrayal, bemusement, and sheer audacity. Featuring dramatised reconstructions and interviews with the spouses involved, each episode tells a story about a particular relationship that has fallen apart after an outrageous discovery. These husbands and wives thought they were marrying their soulmates, but after noticing something peculiar about their better half, they decided to investigate further, revealing cases of double-lives, criminal activity, even sinister killings.

programme.title: Casey Anthony: Killer Mom?
programme.desc: A 3-part documentary crime series examines one of the most famous cases in the USA- the Casey Anthony case, the 22-year-old Florida woman who was accused of the murder of her 2-year-old daughter, Caylee. The viewers will have a chance to meet Caylee's grandparents, Cindy and George Anthony and hear their first-hand story of the tragic details surrounding the death of their granddaughter. The series will also reveal some new details surrounding the problematic investigation of the case that outraged the nation.

programme.title: Bad Blood
programme.desc: This documentary series follows family members who have betrayed their relatives and committed murder against their loved ones. ''Bad Blood'' gives them a chance to each tell their side of the story as estranged family members confront each other for the first time after being driven apart by a heinous crime. During these heart-wrenching discussions, new information might be uncovered, but the ultimate goal is to seek forgiveness for their actions.

programme.title: Last Night in...
programme.desc: Investigations of real-life murders which occurred during nighttime in different towns across America. Night is the part of the day when it's easiest for dangerous killers to catch their victims. Individuals who find themselves alone in the dark become targets of horrible predators who are looking for an opportunity to kill. In the morning their loved ones are looking for them desperately.

programme.title: Before They Kill Again
programme.desc: No one knows how many victims a serial killer targeting hunters has killed. With the next hunting season looming, they must find the madman.

programme.desc: Maria's world shatters when her husband Joel, starts an affair. When Maria threatens divorce, Joel makes a deadly plan to stop her.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: True-crime documentary series exploring chilling crimes committed by sisters. Produced by Khloe Kardashian, possibly one of the most famous sisters in the world, and no stranger to sibling conflict, the series explores cases where sisters have worked both in tandem and against each other. With interviews from law enforcement officials involved in the respective cases at the time of investigation, Twisted Sisters reveals the chilling brutality of these violent atrocities, and shows how officers unraveled the sisters' relationships to help them solve the case.

programme.title: Kodu mägedes
programme.desc: Lisa abistab Huber-Almis oma perekonda. Ootamatu öö Georg Leitneriga muudab ta õe Marie jaoks kogu loo oluliselt keerulisemaks. Sebastian Leitner püüab leida lepitust, kuid pühadeks koju tulnud külalised annavad hoogu kadedusele ja tõukavad tagant suuri otsuseid.

programme.title: Kidzone lastehommik _ Käpapatrull
programme.desc: Käpa-Patrull on eelkooliealiste sari, peaosas grupp kangelaslikke kutsikaid: Chase, Marshall, Rocky, Zuma, Rubble ja Skye, keda juhib 10-aastane tehnikataibuga poiss Ryder. Olles unikaalne segu probleemide lahendamise oskustest, ägedatest sõidukitest ja armsast rohkest kutsahuumorist, teeb Käpa-Patrull koostööd ülitähtsatel päästeoperatsioonidel, et kaitsta Seiklustelahe kogukonda. Tuletõrjekoer Marshallist politseikoer Chase'ini, ja Skye'ni, kes lendab kõrgelt oma helikopteriga, näitavad nad tiimitöö ja hea kodakondsuse tähtsust. Neil kõigil on seljas omaenda eriline Kutsakott, mis aitab neil kõigega toime tulla - kassipoegade aitamisest rongi päästmiseni kalju äärelt! Ja pole vahet kui suur on seiklus, Käpa-Patrullil on alati aega mänguks, naeruks ja üheks kõrvasügamiseks Ryderilt. Lõbus Käpa-Patrulli fakt: Ryder päästis kõik need kutsad ja õpetas neile nende Käpa-Patrulli oskused.

programme.title: Kidzone lastehommik _ Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey on kuueaastane väsimatu Austraalia karjakoer, kellele meeldib väga mängida ja kes teeb igapäevasest pereelust enneolematu seikluse.

programme.title: Kidzone lastehommik _ Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey on kuueaastane väsimatu Austraalia karjakoer, kellele meeldib väga mängida ja kes teeb igapäevasest pereelust enneolematu seikluse.

programme.title: Kidzone lastehommik _ Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey on kuueaastane väsimatu Austraalia karjakoer, kellele meeldib väga mängida ja kes teeb igapäevasest pereelust enneolematu seikluse.

programme.title: Kidzone lastehommik _ Alvin ja koopaoravad
programme.desc: Käsna-Kalle Kantpüks on animafilmisari, mille peaosas on kollane merikäsn Käsna-Kalle, kes elab ookeanisügavustes veealuses linnas, mille nimi on Bikiini Põhi. Koos oma sõbra, roosa meritähe Patrickuga, satub ta kõige hullumeelsematesse ja põnevamatesse seiklustesse. Käsna-Kallel on väga energiline ja optimistlik iseloom, ning ta töötab kokana restoranis Krõbe Krabi, kus valmistab merepõhja parimaid burgereid.

programme.title: Kidzone lastehommik _ Alvin ja koopaoravad
programme.desc: Käsna-Kalle Kantpüks on animafilmisari, mille peaosas on kollane merikäsn Käsna-Kalle, kes elab ookeanisügavustes veealuses linnas, mille nimi on Bikiini Põhi. Koos oma sõbra, roosa meritähe Patrickuga, satub ta kõige hullumeelsematesse ja põnevamatesse seiklustesse. Käsna-Kallel on väga energiline ja optimistlik iseloom, ning ta töötab kokana restoranis Krõbe Krabi, kus valmistab merepõhja parimaid burgereid.

programme.title: Kidzone lastehommik _ Scoob!
programme.desc: Sooby-Doo ja tema sõprade ees on nende senise elu kõige väljakutsuvam mõistatus. Nad peavad peatama katastroofi toova Kerberose kummituse ning peagi selgub, et Scoobyle on saatus määranud enneolematult olulise ülesande.

programme.title: Heeringas Veenuse õlal
programme.desc: Legendaarse sketshi-saate lahe huumor - naljakam kui eales varem! Vaimukaid sketshe esitavad armastatud näitlejad Taavi Teplenkov, Tiit Sukk, Marilyn Jurman, Tiina Tauraite, Margus Prangel ja Liina Vahtrik.

programme.title: Lustlik reis Korful
programme.desc: Saatejuht Katrin Lust koos perega võttis ette reisi imelisele Korfule avastama saare erakordselt ilusat loodust ja rikkalikku loomariiki. Teises saates sõidavad nad saare põhja osasse ja avastavad seal tõelise peidetud paradiisi. Kui Korfu reisi algus oli veidi nurgeline, siis nüüd lummab Kreeka iga päevaga enam. Saame ka teada, et Korful võib sama raha eest saada kesise 3* hotelli kui ka luksusliku butiikhotelli.

programme.title: Öökülaline
programme.desc: Harva räägib Liisi Koikson enda elust, mõtetest ja tunnetest. Täna on erakordne võimalus osa saada Liisi Koiksoni maailmast, külastades tema kahte kodu: Tallinnas ja Rootsis. Oodata on kauneid ja liigutavaid hetki, siirast naeru ja avameelseid vestlusi. Saatejuht Mart Normet, operaatorid Madis Reimund ja Aivo Rannik, rezhissöör Andreas Lenk, helioperaator Tanel Paats, toimetajad Anne-Mari Müller ja Kairit Tsäro-Mirme.

programme.title: Roaldi retked
programme.desc: Naljaga pooleks võib öelda, et Eesti Vabariigi üheks suurimaks ekspordiartikliks on Maarjamaa naise ilu. Aga ilu on alati vaataja silmades ning sel nädalal sõidabki Roald Johannson kaugele Kaplinna, et justnimelt oma silmaga veenduda, kuidas Põltsamaa neiu Getriin teeb Lõuna-Aafrika Vabariigis ägedat tähelendu kohalikus modellimaailmas.

programme.title: Südamesoov
programme.desc: Tartu ülikooli kliinikumis tegutseb eriline osakond, kus keerulised teemad nagu valu ja surm on töö osaks iga päev. Nad pingutavad pidevalt selle nimel, et need, kellele muud ravi enam pakkuda ei saa, tunneks end võimalikult hästi. Elu lõpu murede leevendamine on lihtsam, kui seda saab teha kohas, mida oma hubasusega võiks ka koduks pidada. Kõigi sealsete patsientide ning imeliste töötajate heaks "Südamesoov" seekord tegutsebki.

programme.title: Sellest saab meie suvi
programme.desc: Romantiline tõsielusari! Kes jätkavad armastuseotsinguid ekraanil ja kes saavad oma austajatega privaatselt edasi suhelda. Vallalised kutsuvad kirjade põhjal välja valitud kosilased grupikohtingule. Kohtingute lõpus tuleb vallalistel otsustada, millised kosilased endale nädalaks koju elama kutsuda. Saatejuht on Romi Hasa.

programme.title: Inga Linström: Armas vaenlane
programme.desc: Elli perekonna restorani tegevus on ohus. Põhjuste väljaselgitamiseks asub Elli varjatult sinna tööle. Tekib kahtlus, kas sabotaaži taga on Elli ülemus Lucas, kellega Elli töö käigus üha lähedasemaks muutub. Selgub, et Elli isa karlil ja vanaema Hildal on saladus, millest nad ei taha rääkida.

programme.title: Reporter+
programme.desc: Uudistemagasinide lipulaev, mis toob olulisemad ja põnevamad uudised kodumaalt ja mujalt maailmast vaatajateni Reporterile omasel mahlakal moel. Saatejuhid on alati soliidsed Jaanus Koort, Simon Suviste ja Tõnis Sarap.

programme.title: Kuldvillak
programme.desc: "Kuldvillak" on kaasakiskuv telemäng. Igas saates asuvad võistlustulle kolm inimest. Nad peavad valima endale sobiva teema. Kui saatejuht Eeva Esse on küsimuse esitanud, loeb võrdselt nii mängija reaktsioonikiirus kui ka teadmiste hulk. Kes kõige kiiremini reageerib, saab õiguse vastata. Õige vastus toob mängija arvele küsimuse väärtuses raha, kui aga vastaja eksib, tuleb suu rahast puhtaks pühkida! Vale vastuse korral ütleb saatejuht õige vastuse ja see aitab kodusel televaatajal ka oma teadmisi proovile panna, kaasa mängida ja seeläbi end harida. Kui mängijal õnnestub aga võita viis saadet järjest, on ta tunnistatud Kuldvillaku tšempioniks ja ta annab võimaluse järgmistele...

programme.title: Minu elu viis
programme.desc: Muusikalises arvamismängus tulevad ilmsiks Eesti poliitikute kõige ilusamad ja valusamad mälestused. Milline laul saatis ühe poliitiku armumist? Aga kelle muusikapala tuletab meelde kõige raskemat õppetundi? Oma hingelähedasi laule jagavad Kristina Šmigun-Vähi, Jüri Ratas, Jaak Madison, Anastassia Kovalenko-Kõlvart ja Hendrik Terras.

programme.title: Sassis
programme.desc: Puhastamaks oma nime skandaalidest, laseb Evelin teha kõmureporteril endast portreesaate. See aga vastupidiselt loodetule, paiskab niigi vabalangemises oleva maine täielikult torudest alla.

programme.title: Naised vormis
programme.desc: Saksakorra heade töötulemuste eest saadab emafirma juht Arved Hunt Karl-Madise preemiareisile Soome. Priit käitub kahtlaselt ja kolleegid on sunnitud talle saba tegema, et tema saladusele jälile jõuda. Dorise kooseluprobleemid võtavad uusi tuure. Kadri vanemad toovad talle eeskujuks venda Kauri, kellel on elus ootamatult hästi hakanud minema. Naised saavad abipalve armukadedalt Lealt, kelle nooruspõlve armsam Oskar on kahtlastel asjaoludel hinge heitnud. Lea kahtlustab, et mehe 27-aastat noorem naine tappis ta, et pärandust endale saada ja nüüd abiellub ta juba järgmise rikkuriga. Nelik peab mõtlema geniaalse plaani, kuidas musta lese pulma infiltreeruda.

programme.title: Jõulud Dolllywoodis
programme.desc: Romantilises pühadefilmis naaseb New Yorgist pärit ürituste planeerija Tennesseesse, et Dollywoodis jõulupidustusi korraldada, kuid ta pannakse paari tegevjuhiga, kes arvab, et saab üksinda palju paremini hakkama.

programme.title: Salapärane jõulupidu
programme.desc: Romantilises jõulufilmis on viis külalist kokku kutsutud võõrastemajja, et seal jõule tähistada. Omaniku abiga avastab Sarah, et neid kõiki ühendab sündmus minevikust, mis võib nende elud igaveseks pea peale pöörata.

programme.title: Kire hind
programme.desc: Pingeline duell tõsiuskliku kristlase ja ateisti vahel ähvardab väljuda kõigist mõistlikest piiridest.

programme.title: Postimees.ee
programme.desc: No description available

programme.title: Reporter+
programme.desc: Uudistemagasinide lipulaev, mis toob olulisemad ja põnevamad uudised kodumaalt ja mujalt maailmast vaatajateni Reporterile omasel mahlakal moel. Saatejuhid on alati soliidsed Jaanus Koort, Simon Suviste ja Tõnis Sarap.

programme.title: Telehommik
programme.desc: "Tere hommikust, Telehommik alustab," ütlevad saatejuhid Kristjan Gold ja Romi Hasa teile Kanal 2 otsestuudiost. Kaasahaarav hommikuprogramm annab hommikule ja kogu päevale asjaliku ja praktilise ning huvitava ja positiivse stardi. Telehommik toob juba varahommikul vaatajani uudised üle Eesti!

programme.title: Ночной перерыв
programme.desc: No description available

programme.title: Неизвестная Россия
programme.desc: "Неизвестная Россия" - авторский проект Вадима Кондакова. Это получасовые документальные истории о местах и людях, о которых мало кто знает. И которые станут для зрителя настоящим открытием. Автор побывал в самой самой западной точке страны, в Калининграде, где люди, без света и воды, живут в казематах заброшенного немецкого форта XIX века. И на далеких Курильских островах, в городе-призраке, про жителей которых почему-то забыли на материке. Кроме того, "Неизвестная Россия" расскажет о том, что за таинственный сигнал из космоса поймали в астрофизической обсерватории Нижнего Архыза. И можно ли стать дорожным полицейским, если ты родился в городе дальнобойщиков. В общем, "Неизвестная Россия" показывает страну такой, какой ее не знают даже сами россияне.

programme.title: Неизвестная Россия
programme.desc: "Неизвестная Россия" - авторский проект Вадима Кондакова. Это получасовые документальные истории о местах и людях, о которых мало кто знает. programme.title: Никто не узнает
programme.desc: Игорь и Даша, находясь в разных городах, учатся жить друг без друга. Тем временем Митя в Питере прилагает максимум усилий, чтобы сблизиться с Дашей, в критической ситуации даже спасая ей жизнь. В его планы вмешивается Ника, неожиданно приехавшая с твердым намерением вернуть мужа в семью. Герман решает, что его брат встречается со школьницей Мышью, что становится спусковым крючком для его расшатанной психики …

programme.title: Никто не узнает
programme.desc: Игорь и Даша – красивая и благополучная семейная пара с 15-летним стажем отношений. Он — крупный чиновник, она — фотограф. После случившегося прямо на улице сердечного приступа Игорь принимает решение "подарить" жене ребенка. Сам он детей иметь не может, поэтому предлагает супруге самой найти донора среди их общих друзей. Все они – умные и успешные люди под сорок, неразлучная компания со школьной скамьи, всегда поддерживающая друг друга. Игорь убеждает Дашу, что кто-нибудь из них поможет и в этот раз. Она шокирована, но из любви к мужу готова совершить невозможное…

programme.title: Европейские ценности
programme.desc: В кодексе Евросоюза есть такая ценность - сохранность истории. Как эта ценность может воплощаться в жизни? Показываем на примере Италии. Здесь, как и везде, исторические глубинки пустеют, великие стены прошлого осыпаются. Итальянцы придумали продавать ветхие дома за 1 евро, чтобы остановить исчезновение своих исторических ценностей. Мы проехали Италию от центра Сицилии до глубинок Тосканы, чтобы показать вам, что у них получилось с идеей "дом за евро". В это выпуске вы узнаете: как это возможно, чтобы один евро - сохранил и оживил целый город? Что если правительство отдает историческое наследие страны её жителям для сохранности? И что таким образом сохраняется как самое ценное?

programme.title: Переживу
programme.desc: Актриса, режиссер и певица Света Бень даже после переезда в Берлин остается лицом белорусской независимой музыки. Благодаря совместному с Галей Чикис альбому \"Прием!\" это лицо можно видеть по всей Европе. Иногда Свете даже не хватает времени на мороженое в любимой кафешке района Нойкёльн.

programme.title: Желание сердца
programme.desc: Говорят, что ни одно доброе дело не остается безнаказанным. Кейли Сукияйнен исполняет сердечные желания тех людей, которые всегда были рядом с другими, так или иначе поддерживали их, воодушевляли, но при этом оставляли себя на втором плане. Пришло время осуществить их сокровенные желания!

programme.title: Анатомия убийства
programme.desc: Евгения Волкова – женщина с непростой профессией и непростой судьбой. Она – патологоанатом, и у неё есть тайна, которая заставляет её бежать из родного города и устроиться простой сиделкой в богатый подмосковный дом. Вскоре выясняется причина, по которой открылась вакансия: предыдущая сиделка Раисы Самсоновой погибла при таинственных обстоятельствах. Мириться со скелетами в шкафу не в характере Евгении. Она узнаёт все неприглядные секреты этого, на первый взгляд, благонравного семейства и находит убийцу. В расследовании ей помогает сосед – красивый мужчина с ироничным взглядом, прикованный к инвалидному креслу. Как выясняет Евгения, он зарабатывает на жизнь, сочиняя женские романы под псевдонимом Наталья Душевная. Но это далеко не всё, что он скрывает…

programme.title: Анатомия убийства
programme.desc: Евгения Волкова – женщина с непростой профессией и непростой судьбой. programme.title: Ва-Банк!
programme.desc: Интеллектуальная викторина "Ва-банк!" — аналог известной во всем мире игры "Jeopardy!" (дословный перевод - опасность, риск). По правилам игры три участника отвечают на вопросы разной стоимости и пытаются набрать как можно больше очков. Ведущим дебютного сезона стал актер Русского театра, яркий и харизматичный Александр Жиленко. "Ва-банк!" - это не просто интеллектуальная игра, а настоящая народная викторина. Ведь только у нас в одной студии за звание лучшего знатока могут побороться домохозяйка, писатель и программист. Но, конечно же, не обойдется в этом сезоне и без звезд. Следите за эфиром!

programme.title: Преступления из прошлого
programme.desc: В 1941 году чаепитие в Бронксе закончилось убийством, и исход расследования зависит от храбрых женщин,готовых дать показания о своих ужасных встречах, чтобы наказать убийцу.

programme.title: Снегирь
programme.desc: По мотивам романа Георгия Владимова "Три минуты молчания". Потрепанный сейнер "Снегирь" – дом для банды морских бродяг. Они все разные, но есть кое-что общее – желание взять улов побогаче, заработать, вернуться домой живыми. Частью этого мира становятся два новичка — Никита и Максим. Ледяные волны, каторжный труд на ржавом судне, тонны вонючей рыбы и команда сварливых неудачников – не таким им виделся этот летний вояж. С видео для блога придется повременить и недовольство оставить при себе. Море изменчиво, и шторм – не главное испытание, которое ждет команду корабля.

programme.title: Riot days
programme.desc: Riot Days - изобретательный и шокирующий спектакль по мемуарам Марии Алёхиной из Pussy Riot. С этим перфомансом арт-группа объездила более 200 стран Европы, Северной и Южной Америки, Австралии и Океании. Спектакль получил множество престижных наград, а также собрал восторженные отзывы в прессе. "Невозмоэно отвести взгляд. Мощный и захватывающий" - так, например, о Riot Days писало британское издание The Gardian. Теперь этот впечатляющий спектакль доступен в телеверсии режиссера Романа Волобуева.

programme.title: Кофе с кардамоном
programme.desc: Драматическая история запретной любви юной девушки Анны к взрослому женатому польскому шляхтичу Адаму. Глубокие трепетные чувства пары развиваются на фоне революционных событий 1848–1849 годов – во времена "Весны народов". История предательства, страсти и невероятной любви не оставит равнодушным никого. Смогут ли герои сохранить свою любовь и остаться счастливыми, несмотря на обстоятельства, общественное мнение и устоявшиеся стереотипы?

programme.title: Кофе с кардамоном
programme.desc: Драматическая история запретной любви юной девушки Анны к взрослому женатому польскому шляхтичу Адаму. И на далеких Курильских островах, в городе-призраке, про жителей которых почему-то забыли на материке. Кроме того, "Неизвестная Россия" расскажет о том, что за таинственный сигнал из космоса поймали в астрофизической обсерватории Нижнего Архыза. И можно ли стать дорожным полицейским, если ты родился в городе дальнобойщиков. В общем, "Неизвестная Россия" показывает страну такой, какой ее не знают даже сами россияне.

programme.title: Неизвестная Россия
programme.desc: "Неизвестная Россия" - авторский проект Вадима Кондакова. Это получасовые документальные истории о местах и людях, о которых мало кто знает. И которые станут для зрителя настоящим открытием. Автор побывал в самой самой западной точке страны, в Калининграде, где люди, без света и воды, живут в казематах заброшенного немецкого форта XIX века. И на далеких Курильских островах, в городе-призраке, про жителей которых почему-то забыли на материке. Кроме того, "Неизвестная Россия" расскажет о том, что за таинственный сигнал из космоса поймали в астрофизической обсерватории Нижнего Архыза. И можно ли стать дорожным полицейским, если ты родился в городе дальнобойщиков. В общем, "Неизвестная Россия" показывает страну такой, какой ее не знают даже сами россияне.

programme.title: Садовое кольцо
programme.desc: Когтев продолжает расследование. Он ловит Ларису на лжи и узнает, что именно она была причиной травмы Лиды. Аня сбегает от Артема, и тогда он избивает Риту, т.к считает ее виновной в поведении дочери. Андрей все глубже погружается в депрессию. Адвокат, нанятый Брусковым, добивается оправдания Ильи. Вера едет поблагодарить Брускова, и утром просыпается в его постели. Аня прекращает всякое общение с Артемом, она намерена воспитывать будущего ребенка сама.

programme.title: Садовое кольцо
programme.desc: Вера и Илья сидят в маленьком кафе. Илья рассказывает матери все: как он страдал видя тот обман, который окружал Веру долгие годы ее жизни, как встретил Лиду, которая открыла ему глаза на многое, как появился их с Лидой план. И почему он не состоялся. Он рассказывает, как погибла Лида. Исповедь сына приводит Веру в ужас, и ей предстоит принять решение, как сложится ее собственная жизнь и жизнь ее семьи в дальнейшем...

programme.title: Европейские ценности
programme.desc: Знающие водители давно уже говорят о польском "дорожном чуде". В этом выпуске мы решили проверить это чудо и проехали по всем типам дорог Польши - от проселочных до автобанов. Увидим, как им это удалось, как ЕС создает трансъевропейскую дорожную сеть и узнаем, реальная ли ценность - европейское качество дорог?

programme.title: Ремонт на сдачу
programme.desc: В сегодняшнем выпуске Мерлин, которая все еще в инвалидной коляске, придется поработать дома: Катрин и Рейго, собственники маленького домика, требующего ремонта, привозят его прямо во двор Мерлин.

programme.title: Анатомия убийства
programme.desc: Евгения Волкова – женщина с непростой профессией и непростой судьбой. Она – патологоанатом, и у неё есть тайна, которая заставляет её бежать из родного города и устроиться простой сиделкой в богатый подмосковный дом. Вскоре выясняется причина, по которой открылась вакансия: предыдущая сиделка Раисы Самсоновой погибла при таинственных обстоятельствах. Мириться со скелетами в шкафу не в характере Евгении. Она узнаёт все неприглядные секреты этого, на первый взгляд, благонравного семейства и находит убийцу. В расследовании ей помогает сосед – красивый мужчина с ироничным взглядом, прикованный к инвалидному креслу. Как выясняет Евгения, он зарабатывает на жизнь, сочиняя женские романы под псевдонимом Наталья Душевная. Но это далеко не всё, что он скрывает…

programme.title: Анатомия убийства

programme.title: TVNET на русском
programme.desc: Гостем передачи "Кто вам платит?" в студии RUS TVNET стал историк моды Александр Васильев, который рассказал о своих частых приездах в Ригу, плюсах эмиграции, нежелании рисковать ехать в Россию и даже прокомментировал сходство с Моргенштерном и путаницу с солистом группы "Сплин".

programme.title: Ва-Банк!
programme.desc: Интеллектуальная викторина "Ва-банк!" — аналог известной во всем мире игры "Jeopardy!" (дословный перевод - опасность, риск). По правилам игры три участника отвечают на вопросы разной стоимости и пытаются набрать как можно больше очков. Ведущим дебютного сезона стал актер Русского театра, яркий и харизматичный Александр Жиленко. "Ва-банк!" - это не просто интеллектуальная игра, а настоящая народная викторина. Ведь только у нас в одной студии за звание лучшего знатока могут побороться домохозяйка, писатель и программист. Но, конечно же, не обойдется в этом сезоне и без звезд. Следите за эфиром!

programme.title: Преступления из прошлого
programme.desc: В 1941 году чаепитие в Бронксе закончилось убийством, и исход расследования зависит от храбрых женщин,готовых дать показания о своих ужасных встречах, чтобы наказать убийцу.

programme.title: Снегирь
programme.desc: Студенты мореходки Никита и Максим отправляются проходить практику на рыболовное судно \"Снегирь\". Суровые моряки совсем не рады, что теперь им придётся не только учить двух подростков, но и следить, как бы те не испортили снаряжение и не свалились за борт в холодные волны Баренцева моря. Пока новенькие с переменным успехом притираются к команде и новым условиям, улов оставляет желать лучшего, и капитан решает ненадолго заплыть в территориальные воды Норвегии.

programme.title: Riot days
programme.desc: Riot Days - изобретательный и шокирующий спектакль по мемуарам Марии Алёхиной из Pussy Riot. С этим перфомансом арт-группа объездила более 200 стран Европы, Северной и Южной Америки, Австралии и Океании. Спектакль получил множество престижных наград, а также собрал восторженные отзывы в прессе. "Невозмоэно отвести взгляд. Мощный и захватывающий" - так, например, о Riot Days писало британское издание The Gardian. Теперь этот впечатляющий спектакль доступен в телеверсии режиссера Романа Волобуева.

programme.title: Оттепель
programme.desc: Виктор Хрусталев — молодой, талантливый оператор. Однажды он выпивал со своим другом-сценаристом Костиком в общаге ВГИКа. И нужно же было такому случиться, Костя выпал из окна и погиб. После его смерти он обнаруживает сценарий, который не был в свое время утвержден, и понимает, что это совершенно чумовая вещь. Он мечтает снять по этому сценарию фильм. На похоронах он встречается с режиссером Егором Мячиным. И вскоре им подвернулась возможность вместе поучаствовать на съемках картины под названием "Девушка и бригадир". Присутствует в картине и любовная интрига. Виктор и Егор поочередно встречаются со студенткой химфака МГУ Марьяной, которая попадает на их же картину в качестве главной актрисы. Чтобы показать колорит тех времен, в завершении каждой серии звучат стихи и песни той эпохи.

programme.title: Оттепель
programme.desc: Виктор Хрусталев — молодой, талантливый оператор. Однажды он выпивал со своим другом-сценаристом Костиком в общаге ВГИКа. programme.title: Ночной перерыв
programme.desc: No description available

programme.title: Zoom the White Dolphin
programme.desc: A thirteen-year-old Jean and his little sister Marina live on an exotic island with their uncle Patrick. One day they meet and a white dolphin named Oum. They make friends, Oum is an extremely intelligent animal. Together they have numerous exciting adventures. There are several other animals, who have fun with them- a mynah bird, a koala, and a sloth.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: A young boy who aims to be a professional Beyblade player. He aims to get to X Tower, where professional Beyblade players gather.

programme.title: The Secret Garden
programme.desc: Family - Fantasy. Following the unexpected loss of her parents, a 10-year-old girl moves in her uncle's estate. Her life is boring and monotonous until she discovers a secret garden...

programme.title: Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Computer-animated epic fantasy superhero sequel series. It's dragons versus Photac beasts in the streets of Imperium, but the Claws stop Lloyd and Wyldfyre's efforts to free the escaped dragons as Sora and Arin search for Riyu. The young dragon's spark would allow Sora to shut down the Photacs for good - unfortunately, the Teen Protection Force brings him before the Empress... Meanwhile, Nya and Kai reunite under mysterious circumstances and face an apparition.

programme.title: Ghostwriter
programme.desc: When a ghost haunts a neighborhood bookstore and starts releasing fictional characters into the real world, a group of friends work to solve an exciting mystery surrounding the ghost's unfinished business. The Emmy Award-winning series, which has also earned a highly coveted Prix Jeunesse Award, a Parents' Choice Gold Medal Award and recognition from Common Sense Media since its debut, was developed for television by J.J. Johnson and Andrew Orenstein with Academy Award-winning and DGA Award-nominated Luke Matheny directing five episodes from the season. Matheny and Orenstein executive produce alongside Johnson, Christin Simms, and Blair Powers for Sinking Ship Entertainment and Kay Wilson Stallings for Sesame Workshop.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: Comedy animation about two close siblings, both with big characters, who are at the same time both best friends and each other's biggest enemy. Wendy is a 13-year-old girl who likes to listen to music, use her phone and hang out with her boyfriend. Wendy is eager to be grown up and mature. But her energetic little sister, Marine, is often close by with a headful of crazy ideas. Wendy is irritated by Marine and the invasion of her privacy. But although they can fight, as sisters do, they are very loyal to each other and always make up in the end.

programme.title: Power Rangers Dino Charge
programme.desc: In this children's series, based on a prehistoric Earth where an alien entrusted powerful Energems to 10 dinosaurs, but when the dinosaurs went extinct, the Energems were lost. Now an intergalactic bounty hunter is determined to reclaim the Energems and destroy our planet. A new team of Power Rangers must find the lost Energems and use their Dino Chargers to power up a dino-fueled battle gear, Zords and Megazords to save the world. Will the Power Rangers be able to save our planet?

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: Often told she is too little to do all the things she wants to do, Polly doesn't let this stand in her way and proves what every kid should know... that being little isn't a limitation. Instead, its her greatest strength! Inheriting a magic locket that allows her to shrink to only 4 inches tall, she discovers that no matter how small she is, she can still have big adventures and create a big difference for her and her best friends! Based on the famous Polly Pocket doll, this Canadian-American animation TV series features 26 episodes of big adventures, lots of imagination and even more fun!

programme.title: Barbie: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Join Barbie "Malibu" Roberts and Barbie "Brooklyn" Roberts for fun, laughter and exciting new adventures. The series follows Barbie and Barbie as they attend a year of performing arts high school in NYC, set out to record a music demo, and take odd jobs to fund their dreams, all while exploring the Big Apple and traveling back to Malibu often to visit family and friends. Filled with stories about friendship, family, passion and perseverance, the series follows this iconic duo as they work hard and have fun chasing their dreams.

programme.title: Zoom the White Dolphin
programme.desc: A thirteen-year-old Jean and his little sister Marina live on an exotic island with their uncle Patrick. One day they meet and a white dolphin named Oum. They make friends, Oum is an extremely intelligent animal. Together they have numerous exciting adventures. There are several other animals, who have fun with them- a mynah bird, a koala, and a sloth.

They make friends, Oum is an extremely intelligent animal. Together they have numerous exciting adventures. There are several other animals, who have fun with them- a mynah bird, a koala, and a sloth.

programme.title: Super Wings!
programme.desc: A girl in Bogota asks the Super Wings for a spray- painting drone to help her take part in a mural contest. When her jealous little dog steals the controls causing the drone to paint the town they have to get it back before he makes a huge mess. But townsfolk love what her dog has done and everyone realizes that all creativity is good.

programme.title: Super Wings!
programme.desc: Jett and Paul head to Saint Gallen, Switzerland and deliver a gingerbread man costume that emits the smell of freshly— baked gingerbread cookies. / Jett and Mira fly to San Cristobal, Ecuador to deliver super strong bubble solution. The package is for a boy who wants to blow super strong bubbles that will last and last. / When a girl named Sylviya asks for a special watering can for her flowers, Jett and Dizzy head to Bulgaria. This leads to an encounter with bees and a new Super Wing named Bucky. / A young boy named Gio asks the Super Wings to build him a special suit to wear to the local Mud Festival that will protect him from getting muddy. / A young boy in Denmark orders egg capsules to hold three baby "block" dinosaurs he invented. He wants to present the eggs to their mothers in Blockosaurs Park.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is a little girl who is full of beans. She faces many problems up in the Swiss alps whilst living with her grandfather. Heidi lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life. This bubbly, young orphan girl will learn the priceless value of friendship and mutual respect. Follow her journey as she discovers life's ups and downs.

programme.title: Barbie: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Join Barbie "Malibu" Roberts and Barbie "Brooklyn" Roberts for fun, laughter and exciting new adventures. programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: While watching a documentary on wolves, the progenitors of dogs, Boy teases Dog for being a softie. Stung, Dog leaves and comes upon a pack of feral dogs. Just what Dog needs to learn to be tough and show Boy just how great he really is! Dog takes on all the behavior of a Dog Fonzie (although being a true juvenile delinquent doesn't exactly come easily to him). But soon he's loving it. Meanwhile, the rest of the gang are worried when Dog doesn't come home, so they head out in search. When they find Dog with the feral mutts, they see he's now too cool for school and wants no part of the "old" family who thinks he's just some softie. But when forced to make a choice between loyalty to the pack and loyalty to Boy, friendship comes through and saves the day.

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: Meet the unique and a slightly dysfunctional family. A group that consist of a boy, the oldest in the family who is a bit anxious, a girl who is rebellious, and a dog, a cat who behaves bizarrely, a mouse who is highly intelligent and anthropomorphic cheese who is drama queen makes a rather strange and quirky blended family. They have crazy adventures all the time as they must learn to love each other and live together under the same roof.

programme.title: Stoked
programme.desc: Captivating animated series that folllows the lives of six teenagers who all share love for surfing and spend their summer working at Surfer's Paradise Ridgemount Resort, in British Columbia. Meet Emma, Reef and Fin who join locals Broseph, Lo, and Johnny, and hope they will have the summer of their lives, working at the famous Surfer's Paradise Hotel. They will be more that surprised when they find out that their jobs are awful, as they have to deal with ugly uniforms, bad working hours, house that is in terrible shape and the manager who isn't the nicest of people. However, things are not so bad, as they get the opportunity to do the thing they love the most- surf, on their days off.

programme.title: Holly Hobbie
programme.desc: This series stars Ruby Jay as Holly Hobbie, a teenage girl from the small town of Collinsville who has dreams of being a singer-songwriter. Holly lives with her parents, Robert (Evan Buliung) and Katherine (Erin Karpluk), her older brother Robbie (Charles Vandervaart) and younger sister Heather (Kate Moyer). Hollie is always willing to stand up for the things she believes in even if it means causing discomfort to those around her. The show deals with themes such as the friendship between Hollie and her best friends, Amy and Piper, and other relatable topics like social media, jealousy and family relationships and so will appeal to children of this age group.

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: Bunk'd shows Ravi Ross and his sisters Emma and Zuri who decide to leave noisy streets of New York and set off to a rustic summer camp Kikiwaka in Maine where their parents met as teenagers. The camp got its name after a magic creature Kikiwaka that leaves nearby. From the first minutes of their stay guys realize that holidays are not going to be easy and relaxing, as the head of Kikiwaka turns out to remember their Mom who stole her boyfriend. That boyfriend later became the father of the three. Plus the conditions in the camp are very specific and far from perfect, health code and safety regulations are seriously violated. Ravi has a weird roommate, Zuri's roommate is a nerd, so kids start to doubt whether it is worth staying. Also modern technologies like phones and notebooks are not available in the camp, which makes it even harder. Fortunately the teens are smart enough to figure out their way out of the most difficult and strange situations.

programme.title: Ghostwriter
programme.desc: When a ghost haunts a neighborhood bookstore and starts releasing fictional characters into the real world, a group of friends work to solve an exciting mystery surrounding the ghost's unfinished business. The Emmy Award-winning series, which has also earned a highly coveted Prix Jeunesse Award, a Parents' Choice Gold Medal Award and recognition from Common Sense Media since its debut, was developed for television by J.J. Johnson and Andrew Orenstein with Academy Award-winning and DGA Award-nominated Luke Matheny directing five episodes from the season. Matheny and Orenstein executive produce alongside Johnson, Christin Simms, and Blair Powers for Sinking Ship Entertainment and Kay Wilson Stallings for Sesame Workshop.

programme.title: Lego DREAMZzz
programme.desc: Animated series about a group of kids who join a secret agency to protect sleeping children. The hunt for the Sandman, the only one who can repair Lunia's hourglass, leads to a crash landing in the Murky Realm - the kids begin to forget the most important aspects of who they are as they fight off the vicious sirens that patrol the foggy landscape but are then offered refuge by the ever-creepy Neverwitch... can she be trusted, however? After all, this is the place where memories go to die...

programme.title: Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Computer-animated epic fantasy superhero sequel series. It's dragons versus Photac beasts in the streets of Imperium, but the Claws stop Lloyd and Wyldfyre's efforts to free the escaped dragons as Sora and Arin search for Riyu. The young dragon's spark would allow Sora to shut down the Photacs for good - unfortunately, the Teen Protection Force brings him before the Empress... Meanwhile, Nya and Kai reunite under mysterious circumstances and face an apparition.

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: While watching a documentary on wolves, the progenitors of dogs, Boy teases Dog for being a softie. Stung, Dog leaves and comes upon a pack of feral dogs. programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: Comedy animation about two close siblings, both with big characters, who are at the same time both best friends and each other's biggest enemy. Wendy is a 13-year-old girl who likes to listen to music, use her phone and hang out with her boyfriend. Wendy is eager to be grown up and mature. But her energetic little sister, Marine, is often close by with a headful of crazy ideas. Wendy is irritated by Marine and the invasion of her privacy. But although they can fight, as sisters do, they are very loyal to each other and always make up in the end.

programme.title: Power Rangers Dino Charge
programme.desc: In this children's series, based on a prehistoric Earth where an alien entrusted powerful Energems to 10 dinosaurs, but when the dinosaurs went extinct, the Energems were lost. Now an intergalactic bounty hunter is determined to reclaim the Energems and destroy our planet. A new team of Power Rangers must find the lost Energems and use their Dino Chargers to power up a dino-fueled battle gear, Zords and Megazords to save the world. Will the Power Rangers be able to save our planet?

programme.title: Lego DREAMZzz
programme.desc: Animated series about a group of kids who join a secret agency to protect sleeping children. Witnessing the plight of Nova and the Insomniacs, Izzie convinces the others to find them in the Dream World and bring them to the Candy Realm where they can have the sweetest dream ever - however, when they stumble upon some grimspawn also seeking a vacation from the world of nightmares, they soon realise that the Night Hunter is close behind... meanwhile, Cooper tries to activate Lunia's hourglass.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: A young boy who aims to be a professional Beyblade player. He aims to get to X Tower, where professional Beyblade players gather.

programme.title: Kidz Megamix
programme.desc: Most wanted, most traced, most current music videos for the teenage fans.

programme.title: Barbie: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Join Barbie "Malibu" Roberts and Barbie "Brooklyn" Roberts for fun, laughter and exciting new adventures. The series follows Barbie and Barbie as they attend a year of performing arts high school in NYC, set out to record a music demo, and take odd jobs to fund their dreams, all while exploring the Big Apple and traveling back to Malibu often to visit family and friends. Filled with stories about friendship, family, passion and perseverance, the series follows this iconic duo as they work hard and have fun chasing their dreams.

programme.title: Zoom the White Dolphin
programme.desc: A thirteen-year-old Jean and his little sister Marina live on an exotic island with their uncle Patrick. One day they meet and a white dolphin named Oum. They make friends, Oum is an extremely intelligent animal. Together they have numerous exciting adventures. There are several other animals, who have fun with them- a mynah bird, a koala, and a sloth.

programme.title: The Secret Garden
programme.desc: Family - Fantasy. Following the unexpected loss of her parents, a 10-year-old girl moves in her uncle's estate. Her life is boring and monotonous until she discovers a secret garden...

programme.title: Transformers: Cyberverse
programme.desc: Bumblebee receives an important task, several lives depend on him but the problem is that he has forgotten everything! It's a good thing that his friend and partner Windblade comes to the rescue and helps him repair his damaged memory files. Each new memory reopens Bumblebee's past adventures on Cybertron, before arrival to Earth. He experiences fun moments with his friends all over again, moments that changed his life. This past has made him the hero we all know. Each step in fighting Bumblebee's amnesia provides new tips to the friends, so sooner or later it will help them perform their mission and stay away from trouble.

programme.title: Power Rangers Dino Charge
programme.desc: In this children's series, based on a prehistoric Earth where an alien entrusted powerful Energems to 10 dinosaurs, but when the dinosaurs went extinct, the Energems were lost. A new team of Power Rangers must find the lost Energems and use their Dino Chargers to power up a dino-fueled battle gear, Zords and Megazords to save the world. Will the Power Rangers be able to save our planet?

programme.title: Horrid Henry
programme.desc: Horrid Henry is always getting in trouble. He is a head strong, prankster with a strong disregard for authority. His selfish ways cause chaos wherever he goes, and he is relentless when it comes to outsmarting enemies, teachers, babysitters, or pretty much any adult. And to make matters worse Henry's little brother Peter is Perfect. Whilst Henry never seems to learn from his Horrid behvaiour, Perfect Peter's gets more perfect every day.

programme.title: Stoked
programme.desc: Captivating animated series that folllows the lives of six teenagers who all share love for surfing and spend their summer working at Surfer's Paradise Ridgemount Resort, in British Columbia. However, things are not so bad, as they get the opportunity to do the thing they love the most- surf, on their days off.

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: Often told she is too little to do all the things she wants to do, Polly doesn't let this stand in her way and proves what every kid should know... that being little isn't a limitation. Instead, its her greatest strength! Inheriting a magic locket that allows her to shrink to only 4 inches tall, she discovers that no matter how small she is, she can still have big adventures and create a big difference for her and her best friends! Based on the famous Polly Pocket doll, this Canadian-American animation TV series features 26 episodes of big adventures, lots of imagination and even more fun!

programme.title: Super Wings!
programme.desc: A girl in Bogota asks the Super Wings for a spray- painting drone to help her take part in a mural contest. When her jealous little dog steals the controls causing the drone to paint the town they have to get it back before he makes a huge mess. But townsfolk love what her dog has done and everyone realizes that all creativity is good.

programme.title: Super Wings!
programme.desc: Jett and Paul head to Saint Gallen, Switzerland and deliver a gingerbread man costume that emits the smell of freshly— baked gingerbread cookies. / Jett and Mira fly to San Cristobal, Ecuador to deliver super strong bubble solution. The package is for a boy who wants to blow super strong bubbles that will last and last. / When a girl named Sylviya asks for a special watering can for her flowers, Jett and Dizzy head to Bulgaria. This leads to an encounter with bees and a new Super Wing named Bucky. / A young boy named Gio asks the Super Wings to build him a special suit to wear to the local Mud Festival that will protect him from getting muddy. / A young boy in Denmark orders egg capsules to hold three baby "block" dinosaurs he invented. He wants to present the eggs to their mothers in Blockosaurs Park.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is a little girl who is full of beans. She faces many problems up in the Swiss alps whilst living with her grandfather. Heidi lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life. This bubbly, young orphan girl will learn the priceless value of friendship and mutual respect. Follow her journey as she discovers life's ups and downs.

programme.desc: When a ghost haunts a neighborhood bookstore and starts releasing fictional characters into the real world, a group of friends work to solve an exciting mystery surrounding the ghost's unfinished business. The Emmy Award-winning series, which has also earned a highly coveted Prix Jeunesse Award, a Parents' Choice Gold Medal Award and recognition from Common Sense Media since its debut, was developed for television by J.J. Johnson and Andrew Orenstein with Academy Award-winning and DGA Award-nominated Luke Matheny directing five episodes from the season. Matheny and Orenstein executive produce alongside Johnson, Christin Simms, and Blair Powers for Sinking Ship Entertainment and Kay Wilson Stallings for Sesame Workshop.

programme.title: Transformers: Cyberverse
programme.desc: Bumblebee receives an important task, several lives depend on him but the problem is that he has forgotten everything! It's a good thing that his friend and partner Windblade comes to the rescue and helps him repair his damaged memory files. Each new memory reopens Bumblebee's past adventures on Cybertron, before arrival to Earth. He experiences fun moments with his friends all over again, moments that changed his life. This past has made him the hero we all know. Each step in fighting Bumblebee's amnesia provides new tips to the friends, so sooner or later it will help them perform their mission and stay away from trouble.

programme.title: Holly Hobbie
programme.desc: This series stars Ruby Jay as Holly Hobbie, a teenage girl from the small town of Collinsville who has dreams of being a singer-songwriter. Holly lives with her parents, Robert (Evan Buliung) and Katherine (Erin Karpluk), her older brother Robbie (Charles Vandervaart) and younger sister Heather (Kate Moyer). Hollie is always willing to stand up for the things she believes in even if it means causing discomfort to those around her. The show deals with themes such as the friendship between Hollie and her best friends, Amy and Piper, and other relatable topics like social media, jealousy and family relationships and so will appeal to children of this age group.

programme.title: Bunk'd
programme.desc: Bunk'd shows Ravi Ross and his sisters Emma and Zuri who decide to leave noisy streets of New York and set off to a rustic summer camp Kikiwaka in Maine where their parents met as teenagers. The camp got its name after a magic creature Kikiwaka that leaves nearby. From the first minutes of their stay guys realize that holidays are not going to be easy and relaxing, as the head of Kikiwaka turns out to remember their Mom who stole her boyfriend. That boyfriend later became the father of the three. Plus the conditions in the camp are very specific and far from perfect, health code and safety regulations are seriously violated. Ravi has a weird roommate, Zuri's roommate is a nerd, so kids start to doubt whether it is worth staying. Also modern technologies like phones and notebooks are not available in the camp, which makes it even harder. Fortunately the teens are smart enough to figure out their way out of the most difficult and strange situations.

programme.title: Power Rangers Dino Charge
programme.desc: In this children's series, based on a prehistoric Earth where an alien entrusted powerful Energems to 10 dinosaurs, but when the dinosaurs went extinct, the Energems were lost. Now an intergalactic bounty hunter is determined to reclaim the Energems and destroy our planet. A new team of Power Rangers must find the lost Energems and use their Dino Chargers to power up a dino-fueled battle gear, Zords and Megazords to save the world. Will the Power Rangers be able to save our planet?

programme.title: Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Computer-animated epic fantasy superhero sequel series. Meanwhile, Nya and Kai reunite under mysterious circumstances and face an apparition.

programme.title: Stoked
programme.desc: Captivating animated series that folllows the lives of six teenagers who all share love for surfing and spend their summer working at Surfer's Paradise Ridgemount Resort, in British Columbia. Meet Emma, Reef and Fin who join locals Broseph, Lo, and Johnny, and hope they will have the summer of their lives, working at the famous Surfer's Paradise Hotel. They will be more that surprised when they find out that their jobs are awful, as they have to deal with ugly uniforms, bad working hours, house that is in terrible shape and the manager who isn't the nicest of people. However, things are not so bad, as they get the opportunity to do the thing they love the most- surf, on their days off.

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: Often told she is too little to do all the things she wants to do, Polly doesn't let this stand in her way and proves what every kid should know... that being little isn't a limitation. Instead, its her greatest strength! Inheriting a magic locket that allows her to shrink to only 4 inches tall, she discovers that no matter how small she is, she can still have big adventures and create a big difference for her and her best friends! Based on the famous Polly Pocket doll, this Canadian-American animation TV series features 26 episodes of big adventures, lots of imagination and even more fun!

programme.title: Super Wings!
programme.desc: A girl in Bogota asks the Super Wings for a spray- painting drone to help her take part in a mural contest. When her jealous little dog steals the controls causing the drone to paint the town they have to get it back before he makes a huge mess. But townsfolk love what her dog has done and everyone realizes that all creativity is good.

programme.title: Super Wings!
programme.desc: Jett and Paul head to Saint Gallen, Switzerland and deliver a gingerbread man costume that emits the smell of freshly— baked gingerbread cookies. / Jett and Mira fly to San Cristobal, Ecuador to deliver super strong bubble solution. The package is for a boy who wants to blow super strong bubbles that will last and last. / When a girl named Sylviya asks for a special watering can for her flowers, Jett and Dizzy head to Bulgaria. This leads to an encounter with bees and a new Super Wing named Bucky. / A young boy named Gio asks the Super Wings to build him a special suit to wear to the local Mud Festival that will protect him from getting muddy. / A young boy in Denmark orders egg capsules to hold three baby "block" dinosaurs he invented. He wants to present the eggs to their mothers in Blockosaurs Park.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is a little girl who is full of beans. She faces many problems up in the Swiss alps whilst living with her grandfather. Heidi lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life. This bubbly, young orphan girl will learn the priceless value of friendship and mutual respect. Follow her journey as she discovers life's ups and downs.

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: Meet the unique and a slightly dysfunctional family. His selfish ways cause chaos wherever he goes, and he is relentless when it comes to outsmarting enemies, teachers, babysitters, or pretty much any adult. And to make matters worse Henry's little brother Peter is Perfect. Whilst Henry never seems to learn from his Horrid behvaiour, Perfect Peter's gets more perfect every day.

programme.title: Horrid Henry

programme.title: Kidz Megamix
programme.desc: Most wanted, most traced, most current music videos for the teenage fans.

programme.title: Barbie: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Join Barbie "Malibu" Roberts and Barbie "Brooklyn" Roberts for fun, laughter and exciting new adventures. The series follows Barbie and Barbie as they attend a year of performing arts high school in NYC, set out to record a music demo, and take odd jobs to fund their dreams, all while exploring the Big Apple and traveling back to Malibu often to visit family and friends. Filled with stories about friendship, family, passion and perseverance, the series follows this iconic duo as they work hard and have fun chasing their dreams.

programme.title: Zoom the White Dolphin
programme.desc: A thirteen-year-old Jean and his little sister Marina live on an exotic island with their uncle Patrick. One day they meet and a white dolphin named Oum. They make friends, Oum is an extremely intelligent animal. Together they have numerous exciting adventures. There are several other animals, who have fun with them- a mynah bird, a koala, and a sloth.

programme.title: Zoom the White Dolphin

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: A young boy who aims to be a professional Beyblade player. He aims to get to X Tower, where professional Beyblade players gather.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is a little girl who is full of beans. She faces many problems up in the Swiss alps whilst living with her grandfather. Heidi lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life. This bubbly, young orphan girl will learn the priceless value of friendship and mutual respect. Follow her journey as she discovers life's ups and downs.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Adorable Peppa Pig is admired not only by kids but also by adults all over the world. Peppa lives together with her family, George Pig-her little brother, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig. Peppa likes to jump in muddy puddles and play with her best friend Suzy Ship. George is too small, he barely talks, he never separates from his toy dinosaur. Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig are loving and caring parents, they go to work every day. Whether they're playing games, going to the playground or visiting their cousins, Peppa and her family are there to educate on everything life-related.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Two new pupils arrived at Peppa's and George's play group, Peggy and Pandora, who are identical twins. Since it's their first day they get to pick the activity the group will do. They love puzzles and solving mysteries, so Madam Gazelle gives them a jigsaw to solve. When it's time for her to let their dad know how are they getting on, Madam can't find her phone. Luckily the twins love solving mysteries and their dad is a policeman who taught them a lot.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig are loving and caring parents, they go to work every day. Whether they're playing games, going to the playground or visiting their cousins, Peppa and her family are there to educate on everything life-related.

programme.title: Pikwik Pack
programme.desc: Pikwik Pack follows four adorable animals, Suki the hedgehog, Axel the raccoon, Tibor the hippo and Hazel the cat as they deliver magical packages filled with love to the kind citizens of Pikwik. Every day, a new surprise package arrives. The team might face rough rapids, stormy skies, or a foggy forest, but when they work together, they always deliver! The series is packed with big adventures, silly hijinks, and heartfelt charm that will entertain preschoolers while underscoring the value of community, responsibility and teamwork.

programme.title: Remy & Boo
programme.desc: This children's animation follows the adventures of Remy, a six-year-old girl, and her unusual best friend, Boo, a large, mushy, pink robot. Combining Remy's invincible and courageous attitude and Boo's gung-ho spirit, the duo enjoy many fun-filled and exciting exploits in Dolphin Bay. The charming and humorous stories reveal the importance and power of having meaningful friendships. Among many of the subjects covered, episodes touch on issues such as trust, helping others, overcoming difficulties, curiosity, bravery, and being creative.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey is Australian TV animated series, the main character is a Blue Heeler puppy named Bluey, he lives with his family: father Bandit, mother Chilli and his younger sister Bingo. It is worthy of note that Blue Heeler is an Australian breed that is in top ten according to intelligence level. Bluey is a tireless, smart, quick puppy, extremely curious in everything that is going on around him. Bingo is always by his side in his adventures. Bluey's family relationship is very warm, supportive and realistic, that arouses additional interest in this series. This kind of family reminds us of our own families or of the ones we want to have. Each story is an emotional true event from everyday real life with its own drama, lessons and conclusions.

programme.title: Tobot: Daedo's Heroes
programme.desc: It's been two years since the disappearance of the villainous robot army. During that time, the Tobots have become legends and are no longer needed. Ryan, Kory, and Dylan have headed into Fifth Grade, and Franklin (Ryan and Kory's dad) and Limo (Dylan's dad) run an auto repair shop together. But when new villainous robots and an evil mastermind appear, the peace of the city is threatend and the Tobots are forced to get back in the game.

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: Follow the amazing animated adventures of the Cassidy family, who live in ''Dino Ranch'', a special and unique ranch in which dinosaurs roam freely. Meet Bo and Jane Cassidy and their children Jon, Min, and Miguel, and join them as they help dinos and have lots of fun along the way.

programme.title: Super Wings!
programme.desc: Jett and Paul head to Saint Gallen, Switzerland and deliver a gingerbread man costume that emits the smell of freshly— baked gingerbread cookies. / Jett and Mira fly to San Cristobal, Ecuador to deliver super strong bubble solution. The package is for a boy who wants to blow super strong bubbles that will last and last. / When a girl named Sylviya asks for a special watering can for her flowers, Jett and Dizzy head to Bulgaria. This leads to an encounter with bees and a new Super Wing named Bucky. / A young boy named Gio asks the Super Wings to build him a special suit to wear to the local Mud Festival that will protect him from getting muddy. / A young boy in Denmark orders egg capsules to hold three baby "block" dinosaurs he invented. He wants to present the eggs to their mothers in Blockosaurs Park.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: With a little magic and a daily dollhouse delivery, explore the fantastical dollhouse with Gabby and all her kitty friends. Gabby is a positive and determined 11-year-old girl who embraces imperfection and turns mistakes into growth. Her best friend Pandy Paws is always by her side, ready for any adventure with a snack and a smile. Come along with them and the other Gabby Cats on quirky adventures, and play, craft, dance and discover new things every day!

programme.title: Paprika
programme.desc: The Paprika Twins Stan and Olivia live on an imaginative island and are always looking to make their day more exciting. The energetic duo never let anything get in their way, not even Stan's wheelchair. Supported by their friends Big foot, Puff, Podium and Magma the Paprika twins can turn any boring day into a wild adventure, making friends and singing songs along the way. Stan has a disability and can be recognised by his wheelchair doubles, which allow Olivia to tag along without having to run alongside him meaning they can always stick together. The almost identical twins couldn't be more different, However their differences is exactly why they're such a perfectly balanced duo.

programme.title: The Miniwhats
programme.desc: The MiniWhats are a joyful gang of six friends. Like most kids, they use drawings to find answers to their daily life questions… To do so, they use a magic pencil, bringing all their sketches to life. What a lucky bunch!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas and Friends presents life on Island of Sodor somewhere in Britain. There are several railways where all machines are animate creatures, they live and work there. Each of them tries to perform their job perfectly. The main character is a little blue tank engine Thomas, who travels to different places, gets to know different people and helps everybody who need it. Sometimes Thomas makes mistakes but it only teaches him not to repeat them in future. His friends are as hardworking as he is. Thomas and his team deliver mails, repair railway, take passengers wherever they need. Thomas and Friends can teach young viewers significant lessons of true value of friendship and importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: The series follows fun adventures of Good Luck Bear, Funshine Bear, Cheer Bear, Grumpy Bear, and Share Bear. They start a new adventure through the Silver Lining, a strange world neighbored by the Whiffles. Whiffles are a group of innocently happy creatures that plant seeds to keep the magical land of Care-A-Lot and the neighboring Silver Lining growing. The Care Bears spread caring and sharing throughout the land. They teach to rely on friendship, and be brave. Their enemies are the Bad Crowd, which are led by Bluster to plant the Bad Seeds.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Teletubbies stars iconic characters; Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po. Their world is full of love and laughter as they explore Home Dome and the magical countryside of Teletubbyland through play. Familiar and beloved features from the original series return - The Noo-noo, Tubby Custard, Tubby Toast, Baby Sun, rabbits and the Voice Trumpets - along with some brand new surprises. Look out for the Tubby Phone and the Teletubbies' touch screen tummies which link to preschool children exploring, laughing and learning - just like the Teletubbies!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: "Over the hills and far away, Teletubbies come to play". The tales of four colourful Teletubbies; Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-laa and Po in an infant-pleasing televised programme, featuring activities such as rolling around on the ground, laughing and playing as well as watching real people on the television through their bellies. The programme also features a baby face as the Sun. Now, "Say hello, EH OH"

Her best friend Pandy Paws is always by her side, ready for any adventure with a snack and a smile. Come along with them and the other Gabby Cats on quirky adventures, and play, craft, dance and discover new things every day!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Teletubbies stars iconic characters; Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po. Their world is full of love and laughter as they explore Home Dome and the magical countryside of Teletubbyland through play. Familiar and beloved features from the original series return - The Noo-noo, Tubby Custard, Tubby Toast, Baby Sun, rabbits and the Voice Trumpets - along with some brand new surprises. Look out for the Tubby Phone and the Teletubbies' touch screen tummies which link to preschool children exploring, laughing and learning - just like the Teletubbies!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: "Over the hills and far away, Teletubbies come to play". The tales of four colourful Teletubbies; Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-laa and Po in an infant-pleasing televised programme, featuring activities such as rolling around on the ground, laughing and playing as well as watching real people on the television through their bellies. The programme also features a baby face as the Sun. Now, "Say hello, EH OH"

programme.title: Tobot: Daedo's Heroes
programme.desc: It's been two years since the disappearance of the villainous robot army. During that time, the Tobots have become legends and are no longer needed. Ryan, Kory, and Dylan have headed into Fifth Grade, and Franklin (Ryan and Kory's dad) and Limo (Dylan's dad) run an auto repair shop together. But when new villainous robots and an evil mastermind appear, the peace of the city is threatend and the Tobots are forced to get back in the game.

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: Follow the amazing animated adventures of the Cassidy family, who live in ''Dino Ranch'', a special and unique ranch in which dinosaurs roam freely. Meet Bo and Jane Cassidy and their children Jon, Min, and Miguel, and join them as they help dinos and have lots of fun along the way.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey is Australian TV animated series, the main character is a Blue Heeler puppy named Bluey, he lives with his family: father Bandit, mother Chilli and his younger sister Bingo. It is worthy of note that Blue Heeler is an Australian breed that is in top ten according to intelligence level. Bluey is a tireless, smart, quick puppy, extremely curious in everything that is going on around him. Bingo is always by his side in his adventures. Bluey's family relationship is very warm, supportive and realistic, that arouses additional interest in this series. This kind of family reminds us of our own families or of the ones we want to have. Each story is an emotional true event from everyday real life with its own drama, lessons and conclusions.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Adorable Peppa Pig is admired not only by kids but also by adults all over the world. Peppa lives together with her family, George Pig-her little brother, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig. Peppa likes to jump in muddy puddles and play with her best friend Suzy Ship. George is too small, he barely talks, he never separates from his toy dinosaur. Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig are loving and caring parents, they go to work every day. Whether they're playing games, going to the playground or visiting their cousins, Peppa and her family are there to educate on everything life-related.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Two new pupils arrived at Peppa's and George's play group, Peggy and Pandora, who are identical twins. Since it's their first day they get to pick the activity the group will do. They love puzzles and solving mysteries, so Madam Gazelle gives them a jigsaw to solve. When it's time for her to let their dad know how are they getting on, Madam can't find her phone. Luckily the twins love solving mysteries and their dad is a policeman who taught them a lot.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Remy & Boo
programme.desc: This children's animation follows the adventures of Remy, a six-year-old girl, and her unusual best friend, Boo, a large, mushy, pink robot. Combining Remy's invincible and courageous attitude and Boo's gung-ho spirit, the duo enjoy many fun-filled and exciting exploits in Dolphin Bay. The charming and humorous stories reveal the importance and power of having meaningful friendships. Among many of the subjects covered, episodes touch on issues such as trust, helping others, overcoming difficulties, curiosity, bravery, and being creative.

programme.title: Pikwik Pack
programme.desc: Pikwik Pack follows four adorable animals, Suki the hedgehog, Axel the raccoon, Tibor the hippo and Hazel the cat as they deliver magical packages filled with love to the kind citizens of Pikwik. Every day, a new surprise package arrives. The team might face rough rapids, stormy skies, or a foggy forest, but when they work together, they always deliver! The series is packed with big adventures, silly hijinks, and heartfelt charm that will entertain preschoolers while underscoring the value of community, responsibility and teamwork.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: The series follows fun adventures of Good Luck Bear, Funshine Bear, Cheer Bear, Grumpy Bear, and Share Bear. They start a new adventure through the Silver Lining, a strange world neighbored by the Whiffles. Whiffles are a group of innocently happy creatures that plant seeds to keep the magical land of Care-A-Lot and the neighboring Silver Lining growing. The Care Bears spread caring and sharing throughout the land. They teach to rely on friendship, and be brave. Their enemies are the Bad Crowd, which are led by Bluster to plant the Bad Seeds.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic

programme.title: Edmond and Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Edmond and Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond, the squirrel, and Lucy, the bear cub, have their daily adventures in the forest. Nature is their best playmate!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas and Friends presents life on Island of Sodor somewhere in Britain. There are several railways where all machines are animate creatures, they live and work there. Each of them tries to perform their job perfectly. The main character is a little blue tank engine Thomas, who travels to different places, gets to know different people and helps everybody who need it. Sometimes Thomas makes mistakes but it only teaches him not to repeat them in future. His friends are as hardworking as he is. Thomas and his team deliver mails, repair railway, take passengers wherever they need. Thomas and Friends can teach young viewers significant lessons of true value of friendship and importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Good Night!

Get ready for bed with Lili and Teddy Bear, as their soothing lullabies will help young children settle down and peacefully prepare for bedtime.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is a little girl who is full of beans. She faces many problems up in the Swiss alps whilst living with her grandfather. Heidi lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life. This bubbly, young orphan girl will learn the priceless value of friendship and mutual respect. Follow her journey as she discovers life's ups and downs.

programme.title: The Adventures of Little Penguin
programme.desc: Leah is deep in the study of her newfound, fantastic backstory. Oscar is having a lot of fun with the three Ninja penguins. The fun is a little too noisy for Leah's taste, so Joe takes it upon him to train the three Ninja penguins elsewhere. They are somewhat undisciplined and self-centered. And Oscar is not performing well in the individual exercises. As the three Ninja penguins finally begin to cooperate, they almost make themselves worthy of the Phoenix Temple medal. But it takes the master of teamwork, Oscar, to complete the mission. / With Leah being the descendant of Princess Yuenu, Joe sends her and Oscar on a quest for yet another piece of magic armor. The journey takes them deep inside a big mountain. Oscar and his infinity bag of tools uncover the hidden treasure they came for. But no one saw Emile coming! There will be intense martial arts displays and chases in minecarts - and again, the winner is not Emile.
