Although this is partly correct, this series will provide an answer to a question - What if the truth was slightly different?

programme.title: The Rise of the Dictators
programme.desc: Cult of Personality. A strong decisive leader will emerge when the conditions are right, but there's a process to winning over a population; they need to sell themselves and build a cult of personality.

programme.title: Jesus' Family Secrets
programme.desc: Newfound writings have turned the history of Christianity upside down; did Jesus marry Mary Magdalene and have children with her? We try to solve one of the world's most puzzling mysteries.

programme.title: Who Wrote the New Testament?
programme.desc: When was the New Testament written and who wrote it? The greatest specialists in the study of the holy text are called upon to solve the mystery and to try to answer all of these questions.

programme.title: Who wrote the Bible?
programme.desc: Viasat History. In an exciting archaeological and scientific investigation, we meet the most eminent specialists in the Bible to try to answer one fundamental question: who wrote the Holy Book?

programme.title: Bible Hunters
programme.desc: The Search for Bible Truth. Examine the stories of people who travelled to Egypt in 19-20th centuries to uncover the earliest Christian texts. Their discoveries shed controversial new light on the story of the Bible.

programme.title: Bible Hunters
programme.desc: The Search for Lost Gospels. Discoveries in Egypt in the 19th and 20th centuries included strange zodiacs, hymns to Egypt's solar god, and heretical Christian texts. These threatened to shake the foundations of Christianity.

programme.title: Rise and Fall: The Turning Points of World War II
programme.desc: Rise and Fall: The Turning Points of World War II (2019), uses depiction of friction, for both sides of the war. The show premiered with six episodes and it has managed to gauge a profuse interest for the conflict, that has been present for a number of years. From "The Gathering Storm" to "Blitzkreig", this television series touches on all the key moments that divided public opinion and were a main contributor, to the overall outcome of the Second World War. In keeping with the structure of the programme, the series methodically validates key events in the WW2 timeline. Follow the lives of the soldiers on the Western & Eastern front through original footage and historical narration that declares interesting facts, throughout.

programme.title: Rise and Fall: The Turning Points of World War II
programme.desc: Rise and Fall: The Turning Points of World War II (2019), uses depiction of friction, for both sides of the war. programme.title: World War II: The Price of Empire
programme.desc: Documentary series that tells the story of the greatest man made event in history - World War II, from the beginning to an end, using archive footage and testimonies of more than fifty eyewitnesses to the war. Often the story of WWII begins with the rise of the Third Reich in Germany, and is told from 1 September 1939 with Germany's invasion of Poland. But this story will start earlier, as empires of the east had been in conflict since Japan's invasion of China in 1937. The wars of east and west fused to become the Second World War, changing the political map of the world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Celtic Grave
programme.desc: A farmer in Wales stumbles upon buried relics that up-end the known story of Britain's Roman period. It's a chariot, which 2000 years ago signalled the burial site of a warrior. Follow the unfolding discovery that reveals new theories about one of Britain's most violent periods.

programme.title: Vikings: The Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Viasat History. For the first time in a hundred years, a Viking burial ship will be dug up in Norway; with full access to the archaeological site, we will follow every step of this extremely rare excavation.

programme.title: Female Spies of WWII
programme.desc: Heroes & History. As the Allies cornered the Nazis, D-Day loomed and the Russians dominated the East, the SOE deployed their best agents to help free France; these were the war's boldest and most dazzling heroines.

programme.title: D-Day: The Soldiers' Story
programme.desc: Viasat History. Giles Milton visits key D-Day sites along the Normandy coastline - including Omaha Beach and Pegasus Bridge - and we hear the stories of the men and women on both the attacking and defensive lines.

programme.title: D-Day: The Soldiers' Story
programme.desc: Viasat History. Giles Milton guides us round Normandy - the place where the D-Day invasion proved successful - from the gliders who went behind enemy lines to paratroopers who ambushed vital German generals.

programme.title: History Uncovered
programme.desc: Documentary series that revisits some of the biggest history-related myths of the 20th century, in order to shed a new light and uncover the real truth behind some of them. You will have a chance to reveal some details that have been forgotten or sometimes overshadowed. We believe that Hiroshima caused Japan to surrender, that the Marshall Plan saved Europe, that Adolf Hitler was a military genius, and that Mao Zedong was a necessary evil for China's modernization. Although this is partly correct, this series will provide an answer to a question - What if the truth was slightly different?

programme.title: Conquistadors: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: The accidental discovery of the New World by Christopher Columbus sparked an age of exploration for the Spanish Empire - and a dark new chapter in the history of the Americas.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Hosted by Jamie Theakston the series uncovers the shocking truth hidden behind great myths and historical legends, conspiracy theories and lost civilizations. He concentrates on certain parts of history where there are still question marks remaining. Jamie aims at uncovering the core of top stories, he investigates, gathers evidence and facts, analyses and studies and presents unbelievable information in the series. The viewers can find out truth about the death of Mussolini, the bloodline of Christ and the real Mary Magdalene, lost treasure of the Templars, and the secrets of the Alchemists and mysteries of the Vatican. Welcome if you love history with a portion of mystery on the side.

programme.title: Out of Europe - A New Story of Human Evolution?
programme.desc: Viasat History. For decades most experts have been convinced that Africa is the cradle of mankind, but researchers have come across more finds in recent years that cast doubt on this well-established theory.

programme.title: The Enigma of the Swamp Mummy
programme.desc: The Tollund Man is a natural mummy offering a rare face-to-face encounter with the past; who was he, how did he live, and what was he doing here in the peat with a rope around his neck?

programme.title: History Uncovered
programme.desc: Documentary series that revisits some of the biggest history-related myths of the 20th century, in order to shed a new light and uncover the real truth behind some of them. You will have a chance to reveal some details that have been forgotten or sometimes overshadowed. We believe that Hiroshima caused Japan to surrender, that the Marshall Plan saved Europe, that Adolf Hitler was a military genius, and that Mao Zedong was a necessary evil for China's modernization. Although this is partly correct, this series will provide an answer to a question - What if the truth was slightly different?

programme.title: History Uncovered

Although this is partly correct, this series will provide an answer to a question - What if the truth was slightly different?

programme.title: The Rise of the Dictators
programme.desc: Cult of Personality. A strong decisive leader will emerge when the conditions are right, but there's a process to winning over a population; they need to sell themselves and build a cult of personality.

programme.title: Jesus' Family Secrets
programme.desc: Newfound writings have turned the history of Christianity upside down; did Jesus marry Mary Magdalene and have children with her? We try to solve one of the world's most puzzling mysteries.

programme.title: Who Wrote the New Testament?
programme.desc: When was the New Testament written and who wrote it? The greatest specialists in the study of the holy text are called upon to solve the mystery and to try to answer all of these questions.

programme.title: Who wrote the Bible?
programme.desc: Viasat History. In an exciting archaeological and scientific investigation, we meet the most eminent specialists in the Bible to try to answer one fundamental question: who wrote the Holy Book?

programme.title: Bible Hunters
programme.desc: The Search for Bible Truth. Examine the stories of people who travelled to Egypt in 19-20th centuries to uncover the earliest Christian texts. Their discoveries shed controversial new light on the story of the Bible.

programme.title: Bible Hunters
programme.desc: The Search for Lost Gospels. Discoveries in Egypt in the 19th and 20th centuries included strange zodiacs, hymns to Egypt's solar god, and heretical Christian texts. These threatened to shake the foundations of Christianity.

programme.title: Rise and Fall: The Turning Points of World War II
programme.desc: Rise and Fall: The Turning Points of World War II (2019), uses depiction of friction, for both sides of the war. The show premiered with six episodes and it has managed to gauge a profuse interest for the conflict, that has been present for a number of years. From "The Gathering Storm" to "Blitzkreig", this television series touches on all the key moments that divided public opinion and were a main contributor, to the overall outcome of the Second World War. In keeping with the structure of the programme, the series methodically validates key events in the WW2 timeline. Follow the lives of the soldiers on the Western & Eastern front through original footage and historical narration that declares interesting facts, throughout.

programme.title: World War II: The Price of Empire
programme.desc: Documentary series that tells the story of the greatest man made event in history - World War II, from the beginning to an end, using archive footage and testimonies of more than fifty eyewitnesses to the war. Often the story of WWII begins with the rise of the Third Reich in Germany, and is told from 1 September 1939 with Germany's invasion of Poland. But this story will start earlier, as empires of the east had been in conflict since Japan's invasion of China in 1937. The wars of east and west fused to become the Second World War, changing the political map of the world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Celtic Grave
programme.desc: A farmer in Wales stumbles upon buried relics that up-end the known story of Britain's Roman period. It's a chariot, which 2000 years ago signalled the burial site of a warrior. Follow the unfolding discovery that reveals new theories about one of Britain's most violent periods.

programme.title: Vikings: The Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Viasat History. For the first time in a hundred years, a Viking burial ship will be dug up in Norway; with full access to the archaeological site, we will follow every step of this extremely rare excavation.

programme.title: Female Spies of WWII
programme.desc: Heroes & History. As the Allies cornered the Nazis, D-Day loomed and the Russians dominated the East, the SOE deployed their best agents to help free France; these were the war's boldest and most dazzling heroines.

programme.title: D-Day: The Soldiers' Story
programme.desc: Viasat History. Giles Milton visits key D-Day sites along the Normandy coastline - including Omaha Beach and Pegasus Bridge - and we hear the stories of the men and women on both the attacking and defensive lines.

programme.title: D-Day: The Soldiers' Story
programme.desc: Viasat History. Giles Milton guides us round Normandy - the place where the D-Day invasion proved successful - from the gliders who went behind enemy lines to paratroopers who ambushed vital German generals.

programme.title: History Uncovered
programme.desc: Documentary series that revisits some of the biggest history-related myths of the 20th century, in order to shed a new light and uncover the real truth behind some of them. Although this is partly correct, this series will provide an answer to a question - What if the truth was slightly different?

programme.title: Conquistadors: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: The accidental discovery of the New World by Christopher Columbus sparked an age of exploration for the Spanish Empire - and a dark new chapter in the history of the Americas.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Hosted by Jamie Theakston the series uncovers the shocking truth hidden behind great myths and historical legends, conspiracy theories and lost civilizations. He concentrates on certain parts of history where there are still question marks remaining. Jamie aims at uncovering the core of top stories, he investigates, gathers evidence and facts, analyses and studies and presents unbelievable information in the series. The viewers can find out truth about the death of Mussolini, the bloodline of Christ and the real Mary Magdalene, lost treasure of the Templars, and the secrets of the Alchemists and mysteries of the Vatican. Welcome if you love history with a portion of mystery on the side.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Hosted by Jamie Theakston the series uncovers the shocking truth hidden behind great myths and historical legends, conspiracy theories and lost civilizations. He concentrates on certain parts of history where there are still question marks remaining. Jamie aims at uncovering the core of top stories, he investigates, gathers evidence and facts, analyses and studies and presents unbelievable information in the series. The viewers can find out truth about the death of Mussolini, the bloodline of Christ and the real Mary Magdalene, lost treasure of the Templars, and the secrets of the Alchemists and mysteries of the Vatican. Welcome if you love history with a portion of mystery on the side.

programme.title: A Walk To Remember
programme.desc: In Beaufort, North Carolina, a prank on a student goes terribly wrong and puts the student in the hospital. Landon Carter, a popular student with no defined plans for the future, is held responsible and forced to participate in after-school community service activities as punishment, which include starring as the lead in the school play. Also participating in these activities is Jamie Sullivan, the reverend's daughter who has great ambitions and nothing in common with Landon. When Landon decides he wants to take his activities seriously, he asks Jamie for help and begins to spend most of his time with her. But he starts to develop strong feelings for her, something he did not expect to do. The two start a relationship, much to the chagrin of Landon's old popular friends and Jamie's strict reverend father. But when a heart-breaking secret becomes known that puts their relationship to the test, it is then that Landon and Jamie realize the true meaning of love and fate.

programme.title: The Soloist
programme.desc: A recently divorced journalist in Los Angeles meets a homeless musician who studied at Juilliard for two years before his schizophrenia reduced him to living on the streets, and he tries to help the former prodigy by publishing articles about him.

programme.title: Labor Day
programme.desc: (2013) 104 mins 12 Kate Winslet, Josh Brolin and Gattlin Griffith star in writer-director Jason Reitman's drama, adapted from the novel by Joyce Maynard. Winslet plays Adele, divorced and depressed after a string of miscarriages that followed the birth of her only son Henry (Griffith), who is now 13. On a trip to the supermarket, mother and son are accosted by escaped convict Frank (Brolin) who forces them to provide him with refuge at their home. Frank was jailed for the murder of his girlfriend, but he claims it was an accident. Gradually the captor/hostage relationship morphs into something more sympathetic, as Frank becomes a father figure to Henry, and romance blossoms between him and Adele. But although these damaged individuals seem to have formed a harmonious family unit, a planned escape over the border to Canada arouses suspicions...

programme.title: Runaway Bride
programme.desc: Ike Graham, New York columnist, writes his text always at the last minute. This time, a drunken man in his favourite bar tells Ike about Maggie Carpenter, a woman who always flees from her grooms in the last possible moment. Ike, who does not have the best opinion about females anyway, writes an offensive column without researching the subject thoroughly. The next day, Ike gets fired by his publisher (and former wife), because he went too far and faked the facts, which real journalists don't do. Ike's only way back into the business now is to do a fact-based report on Maggie and her upcoming fourth wedding attempt, which Ike predicts to fail again. So, as he circles her like a vulture his prey-to-be, Maggie's opinion of Ike sinks below zero. Not only is Ike waiting for her to fail again but the whole town is poking fun at Maggie about her mistakes. But that is a point which Ike doesn't like.

programme.title: The Words
programme.desc: Romantic drama starring Bradley Cooper, Olivia Wilde and Zoe Saldana. Rory Jansen, a struggling writer, publishes a novel and achieves overnight success. He starts to feel the repercussions of stealing someone else's story.

programme.title: A Midsummer Night's Dream
programme.desc: Imagine Shakespeare's most delirious comedy, about a group of aristocrats, peasants and fairies united in romantic confusion and magic-fueled escapades in an enchanted forest. Now imagine it performed by a cast as starry as the night of hilarity and passion that forms the play's centerpiece. With Michelle Pfeiffer as the fairy queen, Rupert Everett as her brooding husband, Calista Flockhart and Christian Bale as two of the mortals who wander into their realm and Kevin Kline as the hapless laborer who is made an ass of (literally) by a magic spell, the misguided couplings build to a climax...but everything must be sorted out by morning.

programme.title: The Soloist
programme.desc: A recently divorced journalist in Los Angeles meets a homeless musician who studied at Juilliard for two years before his schizophrenia reduced him to living on the streets, and he tries to help the former prodigy by publishing articles about him.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Romantic comedy-drama. Hugh Grant, Nicholas Hoult and Toni Collette star in this adaptation of Nick Hornby's bestselling novel, from a screenplay written and directed by brothers Chris and Paul Weitz. Thanks to his father writing a still-popular Christmas song in the 1950s, Will (Grant) has reached the age of 38 without ever working or taking on any of life's responsibilities. Instead, he simply indulges in his love of hi-tech gadgets; and women - though he always ends any budding relationships after a couple of months. He is blissfully happy. Or, rather, he thinks he is. But when he begins deceitfully posing as a single parent in order to date single mothers, he meets the depressed Fiona (Collette) and her canny 12-year-old son Marcus (Hoult). It's a fateful encounter, which, through bonding with the boy and a near-tragedy, drives Will to belatedly take his first steps towards maturity... Also starring Rachel Weisz.

programme.title: Changing Lanes
programme.desc: An attorney in a rush to make a court appointment to file legal papers involving a multi-million dollar trust accidentally collides with an alcoholic insurance salesman, who also is a rush for a court appointment involving the custody of his children. The attorney leaves the scene of the accident and strands the salesman, causing him to miss his custody hearing. During the process of the post-crash discussion, the attorney accidentally drops the papers he needs to present in court. The judge gives him until the end of the day to present the papers and thus begins a cat and mouse game between the proponents. A few questionable actions later on both parties' part, they finally start questioning their actions and their lives. In the end, both come to new understanding of what is important and appear to be set in new ethical and moral directions. Contains mild violence and profanity.

programme.title: Shanghai
programme.desc: An American man returns to a corrupt, Japanese-occupied Shanghai four months before Pearl Harbor and discovers his friend has been killed. While he unravels the mysteries of the death, he falls in love and discovers a much larger secret that his own government is hiding.

programme.title: Once
programme.desc: One fateful night on a quiet Dublin street, two lost souls cross paths. A broken-hearted street musician (Glen Hansard), lamenting his lost love, catches the attention of a vibrant, yet struggling single mother and immigrant (Markéta Irglová), who yearns for something more in her lonely existence. A casual conversation leads to a life changing moment for both, when the two sit down at a piano in the back of a music shop and find the perfect harmony their voices naturally make. Over the course of just a few days, the pair finds new hope, creative passion and a little bit of romance, as they attempt to put their lives back together. Glen Hansard and Markéta Irglová's song "Falling Slowly" won the 2008 Academy Award for Best Original Song.

programme.title: Smilla's Sense of Snow
programme.desc: A 6 y.o. Inuit boy runs off a snowy roof in Copenhagen and dies. Smilla, a half Inuit who lives in the building and knows the boy, looks into it. What makes an acrophobic boy run up on the roof? The clues take her to Greenland.

programme.title: Full Speed
programme.desc: The family goes on vacation with their grandfather, but their new car cannot be stopped and because of that they have to avoid a hundred cars in order not to collide with them, and they drive more than 120 per hour. This vacation will certainly not be forgotten.

programme.title: A Walk To Remember
programme.desc: In Beaufort, North Carolina, a prank on a student goes terribly wrong and puts the student in the hospital. Landon Carter, a popular student with no defined plans for the future, is held responsible and forced to participate in after-school community service activities as punishment, which include starring as the lead in the school play. Also participating in these activities is Jamie Sullivan, the reverend's daughter who has great ambitions and nothing in common with Landon. When Landon decides he wants to take his activities seriously, he asks Jamie for help and begins to spend most of his time with her. But he starts to develop strong feelings for her, something he did not expect to do. The two start a relationship, much to the chagrin of Landon's old popular friends and Jamie's strict reverend father. But when a heart-breaking secret becomes known that puts their relationship to the test, it is then that Landon and Jamie realize the true meaning of love and fate.

programme.title: 47 Meters Down
programme.desc: Action thriller starring Mandy Moore and Claire Holt, directed by Johannes Roberts. Kate (Moore) is on holiday with her sister Lisa (Holt) in Mexico, to get over a broken heart. On a night out, the girls agree to go cage diving with two locals, Louis (Yani Gellman) and Benjamin (Santiago Segura). But the next morning on the boat, the sight of the shabby cage is not encouraging, and Lisa must persuade a nervous Kate to go through with it. After Louis and Benjamin go down and see an enormous shark, the girls are lowered in. Underwater, Lisa and Kate are entranced, but when the winch breaks, the cage, the girls and the entire winch mechanism plunge to the ocean floor. Fighting their terror, Kate and Lisa must find a way to get back to the boat with sharks circling above. Network premiere.

programme.title: Fall
programme.desc: Stranded 2,000 feet at the top of a remote, abandoned radio tower, two expert climbers are put to the ultimate test as they desperately fight to survive the elements, a lack of supplies, and vertigo-inducing heights.

programme.title: Cryo
programme.desc: A riveting and mind-bending sci-fi thriller. Five scientists awaken from cryogenic sleep with amnesia in an underground facility, only to discover a killer stalking them.

programme.title: The New Daughter
programme.desc: Thriller starring Kevin Costner and Ivana Baquero. A single father moves his two children to rural South Carolina, only to watch his daughter exhibit increasingly strange behavior.

programme.title: Escape from Pretoria
programme.desc: Thriller. Australian thriller, produced in 2020. Based on the real-life prison break of two political captives, Escape From Pretoria is a race-against-time thriller set in the tumultuous apartheid days of South Africa.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: The Legend of Hercules (2014) is a 3D action fantasy film directed by Renny Harlin and starring Kellan Lutz and Scott Adkins. In Ancient Greece circa 1300 B.C., Queen Alcmene prays to the gods to save the world from her tyrant husband King Amphitryon. The goddess Hera allows her husband Zeus to impregnate Alcemene so that she gives birth to a son who, according to prophecy, will restore peace on earth. When prince Hercules learns of his great destiny, he must make a choice - escape with his true love or fulfill his destiny and become a real hero.

programme.title: Fall
programme.desc: Stranded 2,000 feet at the top of a remote, abandoned radio tower, two expert climbers are put to the ultimate test as they desperately fight to survive the elements, a lack of supplies, and vertigo-inducing heights.

programme.title: Vanguard
programme.desc: Adventure movie. Chinese adventure, produced in 2020. The secret security firm Vanguard is one accountant's last hope for survival as he is targeted by the world's deadliest mercenary organization.

programme.title: Star Trek: Insurrection
programme.desc: Jonathan Frakes' sci-fi adventure stars Patrick Stewart as Captain Jean-Luc Picard, commanding the crew of the Enterprise on a mission to observe the peaceful Ba'ku people. They have eschewed technology for a simple agrarian existence and are blessed by their planet's gift of eternal youth. Unfortunately, the jealous Son'a covet the Ba'ku's longevity and have plans to take over the planet - plans that only Picard and his crew can thwart. The director also stars as Commander William T Riker. Edited for content.

programme.title: The Possession
programme.desc: A young girl is excited when she acquires an antique box at a yard sale, but problems quickly ensue when they begin to experience a series of strange phenomena, prompting the father to do everything he can in hopes of saving his daughter.

programme.title: Dangerous Lives of Altar Boys
programme.desc: Peter Care's cult teen drama stars Emile Hirsch and Kiernan Culkin as Francis Doyle and Tim Sullivan, two rebellious teenage Catholic schoolboys who spend their spare time creating a comic book lampooning their draconian teacher Sister Assumpta (Jodie Foster). When she finds out and punishes them, they decide a suitable revenge will be drugging the town zoo's cougar and placing it in her room. Alongside the prank plotline is a darker one of Francis' love for Margie Flynn (Jena Malone), who harbours a secret about her brother that leads to tragedy. Extracts from the boys' comic book are animated on screen by Todd McFarlane, who revived Spider-man and created the Spawn comic book series, itself later turned into a film.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino's two-part martial arts epic stars Uma Thurman as The Bride, a former assassin whose attempt to retire and raise a family are thwarted when her wedding day becomes a bloodbath. Waking from a coma four years later, and realising she's lost everything including the baby she was carrying, The Bride sets out for revenge. A succession of ultra-violent, tour de force fight sequences follow as The Bride makes her way determinedly through her hit list towards her ultimate goal: to kill Bill. Obtaining the perfect weapon from legendary swordsmith Hattori Hanzo (Sonny Chiba), The Bride must contend with the lethal skills of Bill's Deadly Viper gang such as Elle Driver (Daryl Hannah), O-Ren Ishii (Lucy Liu) and schoolgirl assassin Gogo Yubari (Chiaki Kuriyama) as she inexorably gets closer to fulfilling her bloody scheme of vengeance. First showing on Film4. Cops, criminals, heroes, villains, hitmen, witches and aliens - each operating alone, seeking revenge, justice, love or just a place to call home. The season runs through to Monday 1 April.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
programme.desc: The second part of Quentin Tarantino's martial arts epic sees assassin The Bride (Uma Thurman) continue along her violent path of vengeance towards her ultimate goal: to kill Bill. But first, she must escape from a buried coffin and navigate her way through the remaining Deadly Vipers, Bill's brother Budd (Michael Madsen) and Elle Driver (Daryl Hannah). When The Bride and Bill (David Carradine) finally come face to face, Bill could be forgiven for thinking he has the upper hand in the inevitable fight. But it remains to be seen the true extent of the skills that The Bride learned from legendary martial arts master Pai Mei (Gordon Liu) after Bill took her to him for training years earlier... First showing on Film4. Cops, criminals, heroes, villains, hitmen, witches and aliens - each operating alone, seeking revenge, justice, love or just a place to call home. The season runs through to Monday 1 April.

programme.title: In the Name of the King: A Dungeon Siege Tale
programme.desc: Set in the kingdom of Ehb, the story follows Farmer (Jason Statham), who was adopted by his village. When Farmer's wife, Solana (Claire Forlani), and his son leave to sell vegetables at the town of Stonebridge, Farmer's farm is attacked by creatures called Krugs. With the help of his friend and neighbor Norrick (Ron Perlman), he travels to Stonebridge where his wife and son are. Before he arrives, the Krugs, controlled by the wizard Gallian (Ray Liotta), kill his son and capture his wife. Farmer, with the help of Bastian (Will Sanderson), his brother-in-law, and Norrick sets out to find and rescue his wife. The King's nephew Fallow (Matthew Lillard) is conspiring with the wizard Gallian to take over the kingdom led by King Konreid ('Burt Reynolds').

programme.title: Fall
programme.desc: Stranded 2,000 feet at the top of a remote, abandoned radio tower, two expert climbers are put to the ultimate test as they desperately fight to survive the elements, a lack of supplies, and vertigo-inducing heights.

programme.title: 47 Meters Down
programme.desc: Action thriller starring Mandy Moore and Claire Holt, directed by Johannes Roberts. Kate (Moore) is on holiday with her sister Lisa (Holt) in Mexico, to get over a broken heart. On a night out, the girls agree to go cage diving with two locals, Louis (Yani Gellman) and Benjamin (Santiago Segura). But the next morning on the boat, the sight of the shabby cage is not encouraging, and Lisa must persuade a nervous Kate to go through with it. After Louis and Benjamin go down and see an enormous shark, the girls are lowered in. Underwater, Lisa and Kate are entranced, but when the winch breaks, the cage, the girls and the entire winch mechanism plunge to the ocean floor. Fighting their terror, Kate and Lisa must find a way to get back to the boat with sharks circling above. Network premiere.

programme.title: Fall
programme.desc: Stranded 2,000 feet at the top of a remote, abandoned radio tower, two expert climbers are put to the ultimate test as they desperately fight to survive the elements, a lack of supplies, and vertigo-inducing heights.

programme.title: Cryo
programme.desc: A riveting and mind-bending sci-fi thriller. Five scientists awaken from cryogenic sleep with amnesia in an underground facility, only to discover a killer stalking them.

programme.title: The New Daughter
programme.desc: Thriller starring Kevin Costner and Ivana Baquero. A single father moves his two children to rural South Carolina, only to watch his daughter exhibit increasingly strange behavior.

programme.title: Escape from Pretoria
programme.desc: Thriller. Australian thriller, produced in 2020. Based on the real-life prison break of two political captives, Escape From Pretoria is a race-against-time thriller set in the tumultuous apartheid days of South Africa.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: The Legend of Hercules (2014) is a 3D action fantasy film directed by Renny Harlin and starring Kellan Lutz and Scott Adkins. In Ancient Greece circa 1300 B.C., Queen Alcmene prays to the gods to save the world from her tyrant husband King Amphitryon. The goddess Hera allows her husband Zeus to impregnate Alcemene so that she gives birth to a son who, according to prophecy, will restore peace on earth. When prince Hercules learns of his great destiny, he must make a choice - escape with his true love or fulfill his destiny and become a real hero.

programme.title: Fall
programme.desc: Stranded 2,000 feet at the top of a remote, abandoned radio tower, two expert climbers are put to the ultimate test as they desperately fight to survive the elements, a lack of supplies, and vertigo-inducing heights.

programme.title: Vanguard
programme.desc: Adventure movie. Chinese adventure, produced in 2020. The secret security firm Vanguard is one accountant's last hope for survival as he is targeted by the world's deadliest mercenary organization.

programme.title: Star Trek: Insurrection
programme.desc: Jonathan Frakes' sci-fi adventure stars Patrick Stewart as Captain Jean-Luc Picard, commanding the crew of the Enterprise on a mission to observe the peaceful Ba'ku people. They have eschewed technology for a simple agrarian existence and are blessed by their planet's gift of eternal youth. Unfortunately, the jealous Son'a covet the Ba'ku's longevity and have plans to take over the planet - plans that only Picard and his crew can thwart. The director also stars as Commander William T Riker. Edited for content.

programme.title: The Possession
programme.desc: A young girl is excited when she acquires an antique box at a yard sale, but problems quickly ensue when they begin to experience a series of strange phenomena, prompting the father to do everything he can in hopes of saving his daughter.

programme.title: Dangerous Lives of Altar Boys
programme.desc: Peter Care's cult teen drama stars Emile Hirsch and Kiernan Culkin as Francis Doyle and Tim Sullivan, two rebellious teenage Catholic schoolboys who spend their spare time creating a comic book lampooning their draconian teacher Sister Assumpta (Jodie Foster). When she finds out and punishes them, they decide a suitable revenge will be drugging the town zoo's cougar and placing it in her room. Alongside the prank plotline is a darker one of Francis' love for Margie Flynn (Jena Malone), who harbours a secret about her brother that leads to tragedy. Extracts from the boys' comic book are animated on screen by Todd McFarlane, who revived Spider-man and created the Spawn comic book series, itself later turned into a film.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino's two-part martial arts epic stars Uma Thurman as The Bride, a former assassin whose attempt to retire and raise a family are thwarted when her wedding day becomes a bloodbath. Waking from a coma four years later, and realising she's lost everything including the baby she was carrying, The Bride sets out for revenge. A succession of ultra-violent, tour de force fight sequences follow as The Bride makes her way determinedly through her hit list towards her ultimate goal: to kill Bill. Obtaining the perfect weapon from legendary swordsmith Hattori Hanzo (Sonny Chiba), The Bride must contend with the lethal skills of Bill's Deadly Viper gang such as Elle Driver (Daryl Hannah), O-Ren Ishii (Lucy Liu) and schoolgirl assassin Gogo Yubari (Chiaki Kuriyama) as she inexorably gets closer to fulfilling her bloody scheme of vengeance. First showing on Film4. Cops, criminals, heroes, villains, hitmen, witches and aliens - each operating alone, seeking revenge, justice, love or just a place to call home. The season runs through to Monday 1 April.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
programme.desc: The second part of Quentin Tarantino's martial arts epic sees assassin The Bride (Uma Thurman) continue along her violent path of vengeance towards her ultimate goal: to kill Bill. The King's nephew Fallow (Matthew Lillard) is conspiring with the wizard Gallian to take over the kingdom led by King Konreid ('Burt Reynolds').

programme.title: Fall
programme.desc: Stranded 2,000 feet at the top of a remote, abandoned radio tower, two expert climbers are put to the ultimate test as they desperately fight to survive the elements, a lack of supplies, and vertigo-inducing heights.

programme.title: Super Crazy
programme.desc: A woman in her 40s feels stuck in a routine with her career and her love life. She decides to change things a bit, but the ritual she tries has consequences that will turn her life upside-down.

programme.title: Everyone's Hero
programme.desc: Feel-good, uplifting animation for the kids. A young boy has the chance to become a hero after he retrieves a stolen baseball bat and travels cross-country to return it to its owner.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester Addams has been missing for a long time. His brother, family patriarch Gomez Addams, feels responsible for Fester's departure and laments the decades that have passed without him. Each year on the anniversary of his disappearance, the Addams family holds séance and pleads for his return. On the 25th anniversary of his disappearance, however, they finally receive an answer. A man fitting Fester's description knocks on the door of their mansion, with a shady psychiatrist named Dr. Greta Pinder-Schloss and the Addams' lawyer Tully Alford in tow. According to them, Fester was lost in the Bermuda Triangle and now has amnesia. Is this man really Fester?

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: Anjelica Huston, Raul Julia, Christopher Lloyd. Spooky fantasy comedy sequel. When an adorable baby boy is added to the Addams household, Wednesday and Pugsley aren't necessarily excited about his existence and Gomez and Morticia have to hire a nanny to look after their new baby son and stop him suffering an early death at the hands of his jealous elder siblings. Romance soon blossoms between the new childminder and Uncle Fester, but Fester does not realise that she is planning to kill him once she has gotten hold of the family's fortunes...

programme.title: Mr. Magorium's Wonder Emporium
programme.desc: Tucked away between shiny modern skyscrapers, quirky, old-fashioned Mr Magorium's Wonder Emporium is a toy store literally like no other. In fact, it's a magic toy store and everything in it comes to life, including the store itself. The emporium asks only one thing of its customers - you must believe in it to see it. When the store's frizzy-haired, 243-year-old owner decides it's time to move on, his designated heir is the self-doubting store manager Molly Mahoney. The store throws a fit, sulking and brooding and hurling toys at unwitting customers. It's up to Mahoney - with the help of stuffy accountant Henry "Mutant" Weston and eager young store clerk Eric - to discover the best way to live up to Mr Magorium's legacy.

programme.title: Drillbit Taylor
programme.desc: Steven Brill's comedy stars Troy Gentile, Nate Hartley and Ian Roberts as Ryan (fat and noisy), Wade (shy and skinny), and Jim (just a dork), high school students born to be bullied, in this instance by Filkins (Alex Frost). Deciding to put an end to it, they advertise for a bodyguard but the only one who comes at a price they can afford is ex-Ranger and black ops specialist Drillbit Taylor (Owen Wilson). What they don't know is that he is homeless, has no military experience and just wants their money to fund a trip to Canada. He infiltrates the school posing as a supply teacher but, as well as falling for English teacher Lisa (Leslie Mann), he finds himself increasingly involved in his employers' plight and has to decide whether to stay and fight or cut and run. Edited for content.

programme.title: Son of Rambow
programme.desc: The Brethren regard themselves as God's "chosen ones" and their strict moral code means that Will has never been allowed to listen to music or watch TV.One day he finds himself caught up in the extraordinary world of Lee Carter, the school terror and maker of bizarre home movies.Carter exposes Will to a pirate copy of Rambo: First Blood and from that moment Will's mind is blown wide open and he's easily convinced to be the stuntman in Lee Carters' diabolical home movie.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: (2006) Martin Lawrence hits the dressing-up box again as FBI agent and master of disguise Malcolm Turner in John Whitesell's comedy sequel. This time he's transformed into his gargantuan grandmother alter-ego Hattie Mae Pierce to go undercover as a childminder in the home of the criminal mastermind behind a new computer virus that poses a threat to the free world. It's robust visual gags and pratfalls all the way, as Lawrence navigates Big Momma past the perils of childcare as well as espionage, and tries to negotiate a series of slapstick situations without getting her bloomers in a twist. Edited for language.

programme.title: The Promotion
programme.desc: The Promotion (2008) is an American comedy directed by Steven Conrad and starring Seann William Scott and John C. Reilly. Simple-minded and indecisive Doug Stauber works as an assistant manager in a supermarket chain. He perfectly fulfills his duties trying to satisfy the weirdest customers. Doug really wants to get a promotion in order to move out of a cramped and uncomfortable flat, so he tries to do his job as best as possible. But he has a rival - affable Richard Wehlner, who is also determined to earn a managerial position.

programme.title: Zack and Miri Make a Porno
programme.desc: Bawdy romcom. After discovering that a former classmate of theirs has become a successful adult filmstar, two lifelong platonic friends hit upon a novel way of paying off their mounting debts. With the help of friends, they write, film and star in their own amateur adult movie, but complications arise which almost ruin their friendship for good.

programme.title: They Came Together
programme.desc: This hilarious sendup of everyone's favorite guilty pleasure - the romantic-comedy - stars Paul Rudd and Amy Poehler as the most unlikely couple you'll meet outside a Nora Ephron film. Joel (Rudd) is a big-time corporate suit vying to shut down Molly's (Poehler) quirky indie candy shop around the corner … and to steal her heart. They live happily ever after…until they don't. But maybe they do? From the director of Wet Hot American Summer and Role Models comes this fresh, irreverent comedy with heart.

programme.title: How to Be a Latin Lover
programme.desc: Dumped by his extremely rich 80-year-old wife for a younger boy-toy after 25 years of prosperous marriage, pampered, yet penniless gold-digger Maximo (Eugenio Derbez) is forced to take matters into his own hands, perhaps for the very first time in his once luxurious life. As a result, the ageing gigolo will have no other choice but to seek shelter with his estranged widowed sister Sara (Salma Hayek) and his 10-year-old nephew Hugo. Determined to return to the lap of luxury, Maximo uses Hugo to meet a rich widow - and learns that love and trust must be earned.

programme.title: Taxi 4
programme.desc: Daniel, the driver of a very special taxi in Marseilles, gets a famous soccer player to the stadium in time and later helps his clumsy police friend Emilien catch the dangerous Belgian after he escaped on Emilien's guard.

programme.title: Horrible Histories: The Movie - Rotten Romans
programme.desc: Roman teenager Atti is forced to join the Roman Army when one of his clever schemes falls foul of Emperor Nero. He is sent to "miserable, cold, wet Britain" where "the natives are revolting, quite literally". Things go from bad to worse when Atti is captured by Orla, a feisty teenage Celt desperate to prove herself as a warrior. After narrowly avoiding a very sticky end in a bog, Atti uses his Roman know-how to help Orla save her grandma who's been kidnapped by a rival tribe. Meanwhile, a furious Nero is determined to crush the rebellion, led by Boudicca, Queen of the Iceni. Atti rejoins his Roman troops and discovers they are preparing for an historic showdown with the Celts at the Battle of Watling Street. Atti's brains could save the day, but they could also spell disaster for Orla as the two new friends find themselves lined up on opposite sides of the battlefield.

programme.title: Super Crazy
programme.desc: A woman in her 40s feels stuck in a routine with her career and her love life. She decides to change things a bit, but the ritual she tries has consequences that will turn her life upside-down.

programme.title: The Butcher's Daughter
programme.desc: The editor of a fashion magazine inherits her father's butchery after he dies.

programme.title: Ogre
programme.desc: Terrible events are worrying the inhabitants of the Morvan. Jules, a child who has recently arrived in the village, senses something sinister near his house.

programme.title: The Butler
programme.desc: The Butler (2013) is an American historical drama directed by Lee Daniels and starring Forest Whitaker and Oprah Winfrey. At the White House an elderly butler named Cecil Gaines is waiting for the newly inaugurated president Barack Obama. While waiting, the butler recounts his life story and all the former US presidents he served. A butler's job requires keeping what you heard to yourself and doing your job unnoticed. Serving eight presidents during his tenure, Cecil observed how American society was changing and even he has felt these changes.

programme.title: Rosie
programme.desc: ROSIE tells the story of a mother trying to protect her family after their landlord sells their rented home and they become homeless. Finding a room, even for a night, is a tough job and finding somewhere permanent to live is even harder. Within the confines of their car, Rosie (Sarah Greene), and John Paul (Moe Dunford) strive to maintain a loving home while shielding their young family from the reality of the situation around them. Rosie examines how even in times of crises, the love and strength of a family can endure.

programme.title: Mahler on the Couch
programme.desc: Alma Mahler's affair with the young architect Walter Gropius sets a marital drama in motion that forces her husband Gustav Mahler to seek advice from Sigmund Freud.

programme.title: The Passenger of Summer
programme.desc: A hired labourer, Joseph, works on a farm inhabited by Monique, a war widow, and Jeanne, her captivating daughter who longs to escape to the big city.

programme.title: Anything for Alice
programme.desc: Determined to impress his dream girl no matter what it takes, an affluent young entrepreneur buys the factory where she works and leads her to believe that he's just another employee.

programme.title: Queen to Play
programme.desc: Hotel maid Hélène sets her sights on mastering the game of chess. With some coaching from a doctor who employs her services, Hélène begins to notice big changes in her life.

programme.title: Wicker Park
programme.desc: Passion never dies.

programme.title: Sol
programme.desc: A famous Argentine tango performer has lived in Buenos Aires for many years; behind her smile hides a secret from which she never really recovered: the loss of Raphaël, her only son.

programme.title: The Nest
programme.desc: Alliances change when an armored car with an Albanian mafia boss being held prisoner escapes a mafia army by driving inside a warehouse, which is currently in the process of being robbed by a French gang.

programme.title: Investigating Sex
programme.desc: A group of men and two female stenographers scientifically study sex.

programme.title: See the Sea
programme.desc: Two brothers go on a summer vacation to visit their mother in Saint-Jean-de-Luz; their plan was to go alone on a brothers' road trip across France, but a charming young woman then crosses their path.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A Danish family visits a Dutch family they met on a holiday. What was supposed to be an idyllic weekend slowly starts unraveling as the Danes try to stay polite in the face of unpleasantness.

programme.title: The Butcher's Daughter
programme.desc: The editor of a fashion magazine inherits her father's butchery after he dies.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Feel your heart race when the Kakumbi tree a leopard who's been stalking them. Join Julz on a ZCP lion-collaring mission, go fishing with scout Simon, explore mealtime pack hierarchy, and witness a heartbreaking vigil for a badly injured Kakumbi pup.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A heartwarming documentary series that follows the work of former Herriot Trainee Peter Wright and his partner. The show focuses on the declining veterinary specialism of small animals or livestock, and follows the pair of vets on visit to clients in remote farm locations as they care for animals in the rural communities of North Yorkshire. The show also benefits from the beautiful backgrounds and stunning scenery of the Yorkshire Dales and North York Moors, adding an extra dimension to this veterinary show.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet

The show also benefits from the beautiful backgrounds and stunning scenery of the Yorkshire Dales and North York Moors, adding an extra dimension to this veterinary show.

programme.title: England: A Year In the Wild
programme.desc: Spring in the Dales and Moors is the season of new life when the parks' animals must find a partner, breed and give birth if they are to create the next generation.

programme.title: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Discover the incredible evolutionary adaptations of animals who live in the coldest climates on Earth.

programme.title: In Search of Snow Leopards: Chasing Shadows
programme.desc: Nature documentary - Ep. 1. We reveal the fascinating life of the snow leopards - the most secretive and least understood of all the great cats - as they are filmed in Spiti Valley in the Indian state of Himachal Pradesh.

programme.title: Alaska: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring the wilderness and wildlife of Alaska, narrated by David Suchet. As temperatures hit minus 60 and food becomes scarce, animals such as foxes and hares moult, turning their colourful coats white to camouflage themselves in the snow. Followed by 5 News Update

programme.title: Alaska: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring the wilderness and wildlife of Alaska. With the arrival of spring, days grow longer and temperatures rise. But spring in Alaska is short. Animals have two months to feed, and start a family, while avoiding predators. Spring is also the time that millions of birds return to Alaska. (See Feature)

programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Landscapes
programme.desc: Discover some of the most wonderful natural environments on the planet and meet the people who live and work in these incredible locations. The amazing landscapes will take your breath away, including mountains, forests, rivers and more. Enjoy watching these astonishing visual journeys, featuring interviews with experts.

programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Landscapes
programme.desc: Brand new: Narrated by Robert Lindsay - one of Britain's most celebrated actors - this programme takes us on a breathtaking visual journey through some of the world's most beautiful and extraordinary landscapes, to admire its wonders and discover its secrets. Along the way we encounter its wildlife, geology and the rich history of its people. In this episode, we journey the extraordinary landscape of the Mekong River in South East Asia, following its course through six countries via astonishing waterfalls, the world's most amazing lake, the ancient civilisation of Angkor and one of the world's most diverse rainforests. Our journey along the Mekong River begins at its source in the Tibetan Plateau, a natural wonder in its own right as the largest plateau on earth and the source of seven major rivers. We follow the Mekong as its volume grows, descending through mountainous regions of southern China and reaching the Golden Triangle, the meeting point between three countries: Thailand, Laos and Myanmar. Here, as the Mekong twists it way through borders, the vast surrounding area of forest is a region of astonishing natural diversity, from white-handed gibbons to a thousand bird species. We travel to a tributary river to meet a tiny group of five elephants at the Mandalao sanctuary in Laos. As the river courses through Laos, our journey passes through the exquisite Kuang Si waterfalls and the ancient city of Luang Prabang - a Buddhist spiritual home. We visit Sam Phan Bok, where the Mekong has carved an alien landscape of cratered sandstone, before reaching Cambodia. Here, the Mekong connects to the great natural wonder of the Tonlé Sap great lake - one of the greatest inland fisheries in the world - covering a thousand square miles even in dry season. Nearby, we visit an ancient city built on the Tonlé Sap's waters - the great Khmer city of Angkor - with temples of extraordinary beauty and sophistication. Downriver, we learn how the modern capital of Phnom Penh has been adapted to the Mekong's waters and how, despite the great environmental challenges faced by the Mekong, it sustains fishing and farming communities over thousands of miles, not least in our final destination; Vietnam - the last country the Mekong crosses before it reaches the sea. Here we arrive at the flooded Tra Su mangrove forest, home to the Cajeput tree which rises elegantly above the water. Our final destination is the spectacular floating market at Can Tho, where we meet local journalist Chi Mai and hundreds of traders sell everything from mangoes to noodles on the waters of the Mekong.

programme.title: A Year on Planet Earth
programme.desc: Stephen Fry continues his journey through the year. For much of the Northern Hemisphere, Summer is the season of the Sun. By June, we are half-way through our annual journey - the northern pole is in 24-hours of sunlight, while the south is frozen in darkness. But things aren't as simple as hot and cold, this is a season of feast, famine, fire and torrential rain. In Canada's Rocky Mountains, summers are short. Pika must harvest flowers to feed on before the snow returns, all whilst fending off a few pesky local thieves. For Marion Island's king penguin chicks, life has frozen to a standstill. Their parents left months ago and the chicks are facing starvation. In Northern Australia, it's the dry season, and hooded parrots raise their chicks in termite mounds. But it is bushfire season, and approaching flames are threatening their survival. The same winds that fan the flames blow North over the Maldives, changing ocean currents and bringing with them plankton-rich waters.

programme.title: A Year on Planet Earth
programme.desc: Stephen Fry is on the last leg of his journey. Autumn is the season of change. For many, change brings opportunity, but it also brings huge challenges. In Northern Canada, the cold is felt early, by September temperatures can plummet as low as -20C. But there is one stretch of river that still flows, and 'ice bears' are able to fish for the final salmon of the season. Those that can't survive the cold weather, need to get on the move. Monarch butterflies emerge, and set off on a mammoth migration to Mexico – 2500 miles south. South of the Equator, it is the toughest time of the year in Southern Africa. The rains have been gone for many months, and watering holes have all-but dried up. An elephant calf is dangerously vulnerable to predators. Nearly a year old, its time for a king penguin chick on Marion Island to answer the call of the ocean. She's replaced her fluffy coat with tightly-packed waterproof feathers. It is time for her first ever swim, but troubled waters are ahead.

programme.title: Wild Fighters
programme.desc: The Fight For Territory. Territory is home, the place where animals rest, find food or have their children. Many animals are very territorial: they defend their clan against strangers as their survival depends on it.

programme.title: Wild Fighters
programme.desc: The Fight For Power. Many animals form groups where there is an all-powerful leader; the position of leader is coveted by many, since it usually enjoys advantages when it comes to eating, resting, or reproducing.

programme.title: Nature's Fast Attacks
programme.desc: The Fast and the Furious. This first episode features footage showing the lightning-fast moves that predators deploy to capture their prey and the rapid escape tactics that will see who wins these high-velocity battles.

programme.title: Nature's Fast Attacks
programme.desc: Stealth Hunters. In the battle between predator and prey, we explore how deception and speed can often be the difference between life and death; even some of the fastest hunters use stealth to trick their prey.

programme.title: Hot Life: Africa
programme.desc: The Lion's Driest Savannah. The lions' prey tends to eat when the hunters rest; this means when the sun is at its hottest. A rise in temperature affects the behaviour of the animals that live in these scorching territories.

programme.title: Hot Life: Africa
programme.desc: Leopards live in a thousand ecosystems from the rainy jungles of India to the driest regions of Africa; they adapt to almost any climate, feeding on over 100 different species.

programme.title: Hot Life: Africa
programme.desc: Cheetah's Burning Plains. Being thin, having black spots on whitish hair, hyperventilating and licking regularly to evaporate saliva are the cheetah's most efficient tricks for tolerating its fiery environment.

programme.title: Massive Africa
programme.desc: Take a journey through the wild plains of Africa in this visually stunning documentary series, highlighting the vast continent's diverse wildlife and dramatic landscapes. We travel through varied, untamed regions, including Zambia's Luangwa Valley, the Namib desert, Mala-Mala game reserve and the Okavango Swamps, to film these magnificent creatures in their natural habitats. A breathtaking encapsulation of wildlife on Africa, we showcase the deadly predators that govern these lands and the teeming herds of prey they hunt.

programme.title: The Elephant Hospital
programme.desc: Welcome back to the Elephant Hospital, the largest of its kind in the world. This week, the team of vets are attempting to rehabilitate a mentally ill young bull in the hospital's male herd. Also, Kat gets her hands dirty with elephant dung and Paul helps the vets treat an infected abscess.

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets
programme.desc: Nature documentary - Ep. 2. Dr James treats a Boyd's Forest dragon at the clinic, Dr Shane treats a carpet python called Red, and Dr Catherine sees an emergency case; sun conure parakeet Tequila is in a lot of pain.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: Dive into the breathtaking world of nature as we explore the lives of our planet's weirdest and wildest creatures, learning how they have adapted to their surroundings in order to survive. Some of these remarkable species have lived on our planet for thousands, if not millions, of years. We reveal how these animals have evolved through the generations to remain a thriving species. With the current, devastating environmental plight, Wildest Survival showcases the importance of these wonderful species, showing what we could lose if human habits remain unaltered.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A heartwarming documentary series that follows the work of former Herriot Trainee Peter Wright and his partner. The show focuses on the declining veterinary specialism of small animals or livestock, and follows the pair of vets on visit to clients in remote farm locations as they care for animals in the rural communities of North Yorkshire. The show also benefits from the beautiful backgrounds and stunning scenery of the Yorkshire Dales and North York Moors, adding an extra dimension to this veterinary show.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Head back to the den with the Kakumbi, who are mourning the loss of two pups. Chance upon a hyena den and a lion pride trying to take down a buffalo, then catch up with the Manzi, who are in a standoff with a leopard and a herd of angry elephants.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Feel your heart race when the Kakumbi tree a leopard who's been stalking them. Join Julz on a ZCP lion-collaring mission, go fishing with scout Simon, explore mealtime pack hierarchy, and witness a heartbreaking vigil for a badly injured Kakumbi pup.
